clean_body: I’m not exaggerating when I say Montana is THE most important Senate race on the map. I’m also not exaggerating when I say we could LOSE if you don’t step up today. | = Ah sht, Peter. Another loud-mouthed carpetbagger just launched his campaign for Montana’s Senate seat against Jon Tester. I’m not exaggerating when I say Montana is THE most important Senate race on the map. I’m also not exaggerating when I say we could LOSE if you don’t step up today. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = | = | = | = | = The minute I heard Jon had a new opponent, I had to send you a message. The stakes could not be higher here. Experts rank Montana as a toss-up (yikes!), and polls are virtually tied (double yikes!). To top it off, there’s been over $80 million reserved in TV ad buys. Let that sink in. $80 MILLION. That’s more than any other state because Republicans know the Senate majority comes down to what happens here. If I had any hair, I’d be pulling it out! Look, Jon doesn’t rely on wealthy billionaires or shady special interest groups. Instead, he proudly depends on grassroots supporters like you. body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/migop.org/congratulations-to-president-trump-on-a-big-win-in-south-carolina?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | Good Evening Fellow Republicans,

Tonight, the great state of South Carolina spoke loudly and showed up at the polls to elect President Trump once again. He won the South Carolina Republican Primary by an overwhelming margin.

It is time for us Michiganders to step up and show up for the Michigan Presidential Primary on Tuesday, February 27. Our path to victory in 2024 is simple – “Get Engaged and Get Out To Vote!”

In Liberty,

J. Jordan
Communications Director
**Michigan Republican Party**

With the GOP targeting reproductive freedoms and civil rights more and more each day, codifying the Equal Rights Amendment has never been more important.

name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: Will you help inspire a blue wave in 2024?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We're in for an uphill battle
| | |
---
**It's officially the election year, Peter!** That means it's time to get to work to defend our Democratic Senate majority.
We're in for an uphill battle: _Politico_ is calling the Senate map "hell" for Democrats. If Mitch McConnell flips seats in Ohio, Montana, Pennsylvania or West Virginia, we'll lose our two-seat majority.
**So I'm asking 5,000 Democrats like you to become Senate Majority Defenders before tomorrow at midnight.[Become a member now by making a one-time donation of $5 or more, and you'll be part of the team that helps Democrats create a blue wave this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79669238/457164686/-1442338188?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk230-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJjNTJiNS03NWQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBM_NAc5caGaZTERXeHT0c-iVkU4fhHBPzmdPXG-LZk=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79669249/457164687/-1442338188?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk230-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJjNTJiNS03NWQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBM_NAc5caGaZTERXeHT0c-iVkU4fhHBPzmdPXG-LZk=)
Republicans are raising money hand over fist to flip Senate control. If their plan works, they will try to ban abortion nationwide, make cuts on programs for working families, and put a halt to our Democratic agenda.
**We need to create a grassroots team big enough to take down even GOP millionaires – and that starts with $5 donations from dedicated supporters like you.[So please, if you're ready to help me defend Senate control, chip in $5 now to become a Senate Majority Defender before my deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79669250/457164688/-1442338188?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk230-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJjNTJiNS03NWQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBM_NAc5caGaZTERXeHT0c-iVkU4fhHBPzmdPXG-LZk=)**
Thank you, Peter. It means so much to have you on my team.

– Patty Murray

name: Joe Biden
subject: Let’s finish what we started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Peter, Donald Trump just won the South Carolina GOP primary and is clearly positioned to become his party’s nominee. | | |
---
**Peter, Donald Trump just won the South Carolina GOP primary and is clearly positioned to become his party’s nominee. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain what that means for the stakes of this race and, if you’re able,[consider making a contribution to my campaign.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZCmRjvHgikzZ_Ok_dYKuJpUIh2BEiW1VirfP4vpAhfiLh-p4mx6wc3dmvzdh0Lc7O7WsGdeh-wIfuafi0TvlSetV8u6Lxa6rwcnW9A6XXSwovLuU0vDN7nZRBQTxGLaE1JArfpKgjmntIIEUrdGBj3uie7LAU8mrniUPKsteNWA4UH5oqahDMRDvX4fNLsc0dcZLjd0gqN9pZdRWWPYPaIsgJ_Y-DmS8isQ40x-LBMRaCqekmk5fclhh-5N3H4xB5BJH9lNvndDHl2YbgjYcAiv1I8aJ2GKRWTGqDkTj4rva1WjeNYeLZxwxjhaVLE0JXiwcna_G5fkxZ2oK9eRgqLIPz8P6Bqsd-QrO3pKU-Nwyj4gL7jLPeyqPIvFRAQx_B/445/ZYGYcPaNTWCQSqm8cDLI5w/h0/kP2KmZ8HEMCh1CXnIeAv8FJns6w-0EZJy-JsJKLayc0)** When I launched my campaign for reelection, I said that I believed every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. And that this was ours. _That couldn’t be more true today._ We know who Donald Trump is, and we know what he does. Heck, we know that he is willing to sacrifice _our democracy_ to put himself in power. So, the question before us now is whether we’ll have more freedoms or fewer in the years ahead. More rights, or fewer. I know what I want the answer to be, and I think you do too. **I am asking you to pitch in to this campaign for the first time today. If you’ve been waiting on a moment to get involved in this campaign, Peter, this is it. The stakes of this election could not be higher.** [**So, will you pitch in your first $25 donation to my reelection campaign now? Whatever you’re able to give -- no matter the amount -- will help ensure Donald Trump does not come within two feet of the White House come November.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZCmRjvHgikzZ_Ok_dYKuJpUIh2BEiW1VirfP4vpAhfiLh-p4mx6wc3dmvzdh0Lc7O7WsGdeh-wIfuafi0TvlSetV8u6Lxa6rwcnW9A6XXSwqMUUlydRtOZK_3PoqcaVxxl7LbvgCZJ34ZC6P1CppTIPZdDjHlCM8PO1CK8-SALyQA6153PsVIkysejs71qnnU8W50G2EwdT-Tdq8ytrVgA7ARt6TQLD4ntJcUpgk2ju8RI1j1YoTiAob4KSSGrVtuy_TMe71R9-o_dCwmPqyu3UbF3PJe1hTuwvh0myXJd_NBDhR94rjvXD4JS9ficcnKYn5N9fFFZWe3qEcKQx83gT5YJOvcmCfgzD42pOz7ICN4QDsuI44YGl2PiQdDdl9E/445/ZYGYcPaNTWCQSqm8cDLI5w/h1/C2wTGtm3Kdd5sjFU4aBK18i4aN6A43VUnEbpY6tZISg) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Today's Beyond the Whiteboard is going to attempt to cut through the noise and explain where things stand in our race for the U.S. Senate.
**First off, the polls:** Polling in this race has really fluctuated, But this week two NEW polls dropped. The first, showed us in third place, behind Republican Steve Garvey by six points. The second, conducted later when voters had more time to see our ads, showed us one point ahead of Garvey and in second place. These polls also show that large margins of voters--nearly 20% are still undecided about who to support.
**Wait, second place?** Yep! Second place is good enough this time. In California's primary, the top two vote getters, of any party, advance to the general election.
**That 's why there are so many negative ads:** Adam Schiff and his super PAC are running ads to consolidate Republican support behind our Republican opponent Steve Garvey. Both ads that explicitly tell Fox News viewers that Garvey "voted for Trump twice" and ads that tell voters he has a real shot at flipping the Senate (a load of BS), aim to box us out of the general and end my time in Congress for good.
On top of that, a dark money super PAC funded by a handful of crypto-billionaires has spent $7M on ads attacking me. Their first ad was deemed "false" by independent fact-checkers at the Sacramento Bee, and their second ad is no better, and filled with personal attacks.
**Why do these super PACs care about this race?** This is about some billionaires and corporate interests getting their candidate of choice, someone they've seen bend to their will before. As Slate reported. _"[Garvey] is going to lose. The question is whether, on March 5, his remarkably vapid campaign takes a few California Democrats down with him. If Garvey does advance, it would essentially ensure that a centrist like Schiff would win the general election for the Senate seat--a coup for the old-guard Democratic moderates like Nancy Pelosi, and a frustrating miss for progressives hoping to shift Feinstein's old seat at least slightly to the left."_
**We just can 't keep up, money-wise: **We're being outspent three to one on TV, and Schiff has been aggressively upping his spending the past few days--another sign of how close the polls are.
**Last bit of bad news:** Ballots are being returned at a really low rate, with around 5% returned. We're on track for a low turnout election, even by primary standards. Polls show I tend to do well with younger voters, who tend not to show up in low turnout contests, so this is a worrying sign.
**So here 's the game plan for the final week and a half**: This is still winnable! And because SO many ballots are still out there we know we can pull through. We still have time to place TV ad reservations and can spend more on digital ads minute by minute. So anything you can pitch in now will be put to immediate use helping us stand up to corporate special interests to win this race. **You can use this link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kpsubstackq124 &refcode=0224**
I promise to get back to our normally scheduled content soon--breaking down issues like housing affordability and mental health policy. But my whiteboard and I could be out of Congress for good, so thank you in advance for anything you can give. And California voters--be sure to get your ballot in by March 5th, and tell at least 3 friends to do the same!
--Katie
_Plus, a few photos from the campaign trail!_

clean_body: Today's Beyond the Whiteboard is going to attempt to cut through the noise and explain where things stand in our race for the U.S. Senate. First off, the polls: Polling in this race has really fluctuated, But this week two NEW polls dropped. The first, showed us in third place, behind Republican Steve Garvey by six points. The second, conducted later when voters had more time to see our ads, showed us one point ahead of Garvey and in second place. These polls also show that large margins of voters--nearly 20% are still undecided about who to support. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | ---|---|--- | | | Feb 25 | | | | | | | | | | | | Today's Beyond the Whiteboard is going to attempt to cut through the noise and explain where things stand in our race for the U.S. Senate. First off, the polls: Polling in this race has really fluctuated, But this week two NEW polls dropped. The first, showed us in third place, behind Republican Steve Garvey by six points. The second, conducted later when voters had more time to see our ads, showed us one point ahead of Garvey and in second place. These polls also show that large margins of voters--nearly 20% are still undecided about who to support. Wait, second place? Yep! Second place is good enough this time. In California's primary, the top two vote getters, of any party, advance to the general election. That 's why there are so many negative ads: Adam Schiff and his super PAC are running ads to consolidate Republican support behind our Republican opponent Steve Garvey. Both ads that explicitly tell Fox News viewers that Garvey "voted for Trump twice" and ads that tell voters he has a real shot at flipping the Senate (a load of BS), aim to box us out of the general and end my time in Congress for good. On top of that, a dark money super PAC funded by a handful of crypto-billionaires has spent $7M on ads attacking me. Their first ad was deemed "false" by independent fact-checkers at the Sacramento Bee, and their second ad is no better, and filled with personal attacks. Why do these super PACs care about this race? This is about some billionaires and corporate interests getting their candidate of choice, someone they've seen bend to their will before. As Slate reported. "[Garvey] is going to lose. The question is whether, on March 5, his remarkably vapid campaign takes a few California Democrats down with him. If Garvey does advance, it would essentially ensure that a centrist like Schiff would win the general election for the Senate seat--a coup for the old-guard Democratic moderates like Nancy Pelosi, and a frustrating miss for progressives hoping to shift Feinstein's old seat at least slightly to the left." We just can 't keep up, money-wise: We're being outspent three to one on TV, and Schiff has been aggressively upping his spending the past few days--another sign of how close the polls are. Last bit of bad news: Ballots are being returned at a really low rate, with around 5% returned. We're on track for a low turnout election, even by primary standards. Polls show I tend to do well with younger voters, who tend not to show up in low turnout contests, so this is a worrying sign. So here 's the game plan for the final week and a half: This is still winnable! And because SO many ballots are still out there we know we can pull through. We still have time to place TV ad reservations and can spend more on digital ads minute by minute. So anything you can pitch in now will be put to immediate use helping us stand up to corporate special interests to win this race. You can use this link: &refcode=0224** I promise to get back to our normally scheduled content soon--breaking down issues like housing affordability and mental health policy. But my whiteboard and I could be out of Congress for good, so thank you in advance for anything you can give. And California voters--be sure to get your ballot in by March 5th, and tell at least 3 friends to do the same! --Katie Plus, a few photos from the campaign trail! | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Katie Porter Katie Porter for Senate, PO Box 5176 Irvine, CA 92616, Email us: info@katieporter.com ? ?

With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping the Virginia House and expanding our majorities in the New Jersey legislature. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats are facing nearly a dozen special elections in the next few months. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2024 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**
[Chip in $10 or more before February 29th at midnight to activate your 2024 DLCC membership and make triple the impact. name: Adam Schiff
subject: “Welcome to the end of democracy. We are here to overthrow it completely.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — a
panel discussion called “Adam Schiff Justice” at the Conservative
Political Action Conference, or CPAC, wrapped up yesterday — and wow, was
it a doozy.

CPAC kicked off when the far-right activist who created the “Pizzagate”
conspiracy joined a panel moderated by former Breitbart publisher and
Trump White House advisor Steve Bannon — and his comments were so
disturbing, you need to read them in full:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]Jack Posobiec at CPAC

“Welcome to the end of democracy. We are here to overthrow it completely.
We didn’t get all the way there on January 6, but we will endeavor to get
rid of it and replace it with this right here.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&amount=3&t=1005&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]Derek,
I’m used to facing the attacks — but the right wing is becoming more
extreme and dangerous by the day, and we HAVE to respond. Rush
$3 to
help me fight back:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1008&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1009&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1010&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

This isn’t your parents’ Republican Party. They don’t want to protect
democracy — they want to overthrow it.

I’m not sure any other Democrat aside from President Biden has faced the
relentless attacks from the far-right MAGA movement that I have, and it’s
not going away. They don’t want anyone to stand up to them and seem
determined to make an example out of me by their endless smears.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&amount=3&t=1012&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]Rush
$3 right
now — I’ll never stop standing between the MAGA movement and the democracy
we must protect at all costs, but I can’t do it without your help.

We can never, ever, ever allow the far right’s insurrectionist threats of
violence to go unanswered. They must be stopped — no matter what.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3734?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240224_PM3_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=5654%2E5257348%2E6l2u4f ]DONATE WEEKLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: It’s official, I have a well-funded opponent running against me for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
The MAGA Republican machine couldn’t find a single Republican in Massachusetts to run against me — so they brought in someone from Rhode Island.
| | |
---
It’s official, friend: John Deaton, a well-funded Republican, has launched a campaign to run against me for Senate in Massachusetts.

Apparently, the MAGA Republican machine couldn’t find a single Republican in Massachusetts to run against me — so they brought in someone from Rhode Island who will have the backing of the GOP and special interest groups.

This much is clear: We’re up against national Republicans who are desperate to take back the Senate and pass Trump’s agenda. We’re up against their rich buddies who are trying to stop us from taxing the wealthy, regulating big banks, and making our government work for working people.
**[It’s going to take a strong grassroots movement to compete and win. Can you please split a donation of $5 or anything you can to support my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen’s work? We need to respond to my opponent’s campaign launch with the strongest amount of grassroots donations to protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79670202/457183915/250738360?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3487-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgyMzY0YS03YmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ib02wwBKjzrRDDl5rTbCrztDXRmE5zXQpbWxC6kJXg=)**
I’m proud of the progress we’ve accomplished for Massachusetts families so far — like lowering the cost of hearing aids, passing a new tax on massive corporations that were paying $0 in taxes, securing billions in funding for projects like an electric bus fleet and infrastructure repairs, and so much more.

But there’s plenty more to do for working people in Massachusetts and across the country. We’ve got to bring down the cost of housing. Put child care within reach for all working parents. Protect our Commonwealth from the climate crisis. Take power away from powerful interests like Big Pharma, Big Oil, and big banks and put it in the hands of working people — which means we need to root corruption out of Washington. And I’ve got the most sweeping set of anti-corruption plans since Watergate.
**This election is about who our government works for — and it’s about defending our democracy and our basic freedoms. I’m fighting to keep our Senate majority because if Republicans win any more power, they’ll restrict abortion access everywhere, even in blue states that have passed abortion protections — like Massachusetts. They’ll threaten voting rights, LGBTQIA+ rights, Social Security, Medicare, and the Affordable Care Act — and they’ll reward the rich and powerful and embolden an extremist base across the country. **

So I’m staying in this fight to stop MAGA extremism, continue standing up to powerful special interests, and make real change for working people. Are you with me?
**_[Please respond to my opponent’s announcement with a donation of $5 or anything you can to support this campaign and Jacky Rosen. Grassroots supporters like you have helped defeat the GOP and special interests in the past, and I need your support again as we take on this new fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79670203/457183916/250738360?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3487-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgyMzY0YS03YmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ib02wwBKjzrRDDl5rTbCrztDXRmE5zXQpbWxC6kJXg=)_**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
|
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=2arHJE80mtDquXEtGPdMylACCzxHeSRblQaI%2Bw5d5cz%2BzuUsk10yuTxTFdliz8uwgqw6QlZiEwCw%2BDkq8tDVgz5MJp98BmM4L4mU7WTd3xu3AYHWtCEZdOBbbWZ80LxxWs1niNh3MEqH2BQm7P%2Fo6Mc9AKLGiOlptcpaqNmM4f%2BMGP2wpkl7PD2jIDED8ti5R5L%2FRwmcE30W8xg2upd4Oc6damwn26GtDsL0TdSUSN%2B4Fe4zWuj%2FAFc62CG2I%2B%2BezWvODomWtXILDasfWlm90moVgHVVuCtJ2miBHnFqUCTAOOfvOx77OQHuhGN7rHTGwkYaHnECjeaI6z%2BFq1efdplePH304lAh1%2BYwU2MtOUJF415I6OFROjZWrj4%2F54f5Ne13xIMFovSRPh7XH1sNTXaCZGBJSWma3Ui1PFJHMkk%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. name: Forward Party
subject: Meet Leslie, will you follow in her footsteps?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Volunteer in your state.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=8bN0s8S48ukOuMaWzZXwkQhKlv5I-M7NyCRBIqr07WA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_four&n=1)
---
Sunday, February 25, 2024 | Hi Peter! This is Leslie Villegas writing to you today. In November 2021, I was a waitress, a college student, and one of the first volunteers for the Forward Party. **I didn’t have a political background and didn’t know exactly how I’d be able to contribute.** What motivated me to act was a deep dissatisfaction with the two major parties and the way our toxic politics made it difficult to talk even with my closest family members. After joining as a volunteer, I got to work directly with the national Forward Party team, received a ton of resources and mentoring, made friends from every political background, and helped grow the movement. I’m also a member of the national Forward Party team now as a Regional Organizing Coordinator, working with volunteers from all walks of life who decided to take action to make our democracy better. **My story is only one of our over 30,000 volunteers nationwide,** and I’m sure it’s not unlike your own. I was inspired to get involved thanks to one of my favorite quotes, “action is the antidote to despair.” [**Will you take action today by becoming a volunteer in your state?**](https://home.forwardparty.com/volunteer_find_your_state?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_four&n=2) Thank you for taking a chance on moving our country FORWARD.
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=-jNYQHDSCODqvsvvkQjCebNXx3FPD4HtAXoe2_7pMsKPwFLohJEcwdWTtMa5t2qf&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_four&n=3) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73yykDVHBy9R7_37SfsWquiKcPpl4Exm_p1rhAI9Pc7NA6&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_four&n=4) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=NeYFSHY3wLA-A6ZQ4K_eCvyPLw9XUBWykYMXk8oA7_LNnXphtAdktvI5g8wUyf0V&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_four&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6i5PvN90auMLBUZcrsOIFE-uLgidxjXG2b2smd_yMHhS&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_four&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNxuXNwbqz_G4Mz33GgyYdDwLBac0zK-Y4qjy8_Fupjjv&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_four&n=7) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. I didn’t have a political background and didn’t know exactly how I’d be able to contribute. What motivated me to act was a deep dissatisfaction with the two major parties and the way our toxic politics made it difficult to talk even with my closest family members. After joining as a volunteer, I got to work directly with the national Forward Party team, received a ton of resources and mentoring, made friends from every political background, and helped grow the movement. I’m also a member of the national Forward Party team now as a Regional Organizing Coordinator, working with volunteers from all walks of life who decided to take action to make our democracy better. My story is only one of our over 30,000 volunteers nationwide, and I’m sure it’s not unlike your own. I was inspired to get involved thanks to one of my favorite quotes, “action is the antidote to despair.” Thank you for taking a chance on moving our country FORWARD. Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Will you help defeat this liberal lineup?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8tEBNb0jE3sNtt%2b81dguJw&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30721%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q5Mk3giwQyJMH7hQRP8suQ&sysid=1)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That’s a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30722%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PDop%2bqDK8Ejrid1Rfbo2ug&sysid=1)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30723%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2Lo6eKsCjrqfhC7iRD%2bmxQ&sysid=1)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=smmNPwJH3tb3U4zDByhw2A&sysid=1)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30735%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CznLTp70FNmWUDR5SADfig&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30736%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eEr8q%2fjjosMFixD7fl%2bY%2bQ&sysid=1)
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbikg6bgpurdqghjdb9c4jp1qo7stltpv0ukc9c0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3imep76c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt9u5sb0nvh7l52tpnmmpuin7t99tk75b0m6du70_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3imep76c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztf580epafi2e2nkvsfie3bhdrfbq0aci8j1kpr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3imep76c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf2878a5c30n4elb79soh0f48gk0mhd8kq05ts18_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3imep76c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4ml378g1drivf6sesf7sb4gcoqlmlj6jj58vvao_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3imep76c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32c5gm2o30c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0bb05ojl0m73ik61k3l4ff7ld8ndmhm1tjcc5o8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3imep76c1h2bs)_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684437%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YjgLb9gQyDDoitM27mW45w&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684438%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WwvuSMvkDVxSQ0WmvFh9eQ&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684439%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c4zwI6Mj%2b34%2bJmnvCioxNw&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684430%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t4E3jQGpxFT7bQnbBEkfFA&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Update

Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. American Update PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgqtic53alsg5bub45i3d8at9hltckslq7m8h98g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o77c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z38eb8kvj9en36gu53bdm22tkime21crdmhmqul8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o77c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zabgca97sgk61cjr641rdo5flncupdlnlh6ll63g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o77c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc5v4m398f4nbis032693t3q1s7ap0psunspl8u0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o77c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Will you help defeat this liberal lineup?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z99n2ulfes3b6dmri0chbtagovihiac2aocqb1vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o72cth2bs)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0ojgo9pu72tu39iu3kmr9jo4i8qvg0ger9s6080_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o72cth2bs)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpcll1ha4gs8gh91r7m27q40g3gc0cpv4lgjvj30_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o72cth2bs)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3n84s2hc1ps2o5f37bt2540gu6d9dl1srvnkkv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o72cth2bs)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt2oqev0vl2g6o3httamsed9uk2dunvbvc0ql2qg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o72cth2bs)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1mj9kn81rmu88g41nuttnl0qc6659d9ppuuti10_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o72cth2bs)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeeqqirjctejhb8mb42ub3k2s5c2lube4lo58oj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o72cth2bs)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr9tcrcjve5q5jamir3crqllcr6sm8oofqummji0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o72cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6r8607u1cc7cil50rho15edsbfu9q7e59n9jveo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3im1o72cth2bs)
---
| | **PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE**
---
PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389
---

Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts. It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here’s the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I’m Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here’s the gist:](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30733%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JU1bGc3zxu0ejyu3kgAKng&sysid=1 "I have a plan for a
CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let’s make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There’s just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It’s not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30734%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LDjldtqOjgzzYS8uO56cJA&sysid=1 "That’s why I’m coming to
you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart
these efforts?")**_ I know it’s a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it’ll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn’t convince you to want to help, I don’t know what will! Are you in?_
---
| | | [PITCH IN TEN BUCKS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30745%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bxi8EF89%2bjlt8sUKkZdeTA&sysid=1 "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30746%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N5uTi4uLRQ4rtMT%2b%2fAbMaA&sysid=1 "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30747%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GPxV03byIPMiEfNDtZr0ag&sysid=1 "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30748%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jtycAhWFehIatjdN2mrsqg&sysid=1 "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don’t do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of “Bank Your Vote”

---

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zduurfq92u1pg2mnaja8sfh9i96r8dpl5nd4u3sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm0or2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z57aa3errn811fbflpi58hgas969a0v2d30it4qg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm0or2c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjjtf3f251r3de0ijsncuiu5jmrgnq485j3q37ig_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm0or2c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoso1qvj4e2bt325iqs3m21gin8u170bb4udhejg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm0or2c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh5ho216kbdlsi9nsggbpeaho8ttpfmdgqi9aejo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm0or4cth2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu6vhoh3o4bl367a0d4ctgarnhqongtb65l9bei0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm0or4cth2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdggk5nn97smdv9noj7k0d72vc49tb9l41sba4co_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm0or4cth2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv9uaf6cocr4a4ulv0r01kn8j8qfed2l473i4pag_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm0or4cth2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

GOP Presidential
---

name: Freedom Watch
subject: Three years in prison for a flag
body:
Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No. Did he break windows? No. Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5vaq7hvv1fbo93vsr6927vkn9jb9b3lehs36bs0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob0c3h2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv845bsenj68g7i93qr5cbo8mmmv2h7imahmjc5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob0c3h2bs)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fuel my critical, class action lawsuits to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt5ano85r4cqlkam0qb5lqj1c70d1qvgkec00dr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob0c3h2bs)**

One year ago, January 6 Peaceful Protester Kevin Seefried was sentenced to three years in federal prison.

Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No.

Did he break windows? No.

**Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because he carried a Confederate flag through the U.S. Capitol building on Jan. 6, 2021.**

The NBC News headline says it all:

"Man who carried a Confederate Flag in the Capitol on Jan. 6 is sentenced to 3 years."

**You 'll notice there isn't one word there about the crimes he allegedly committed ... just the flag.**

U.S. District Judge Trevor McFadden, incredibly a Trump appointee, blasted Ken's carrying of the flag as "shocking" and "outrageous." Just goes to show that all of the establishment judges on the DC Federal Court are compromised, if not corrupt!

**Kevin carried the flag only as a symbol of protest, not to support racism or slavery. And the Confederate Flag is not such a symbol in any event, but instead Southern pride!**

But that didn't save him ... neither did his forced public apology.

What's worse, the federal prosecutor wanted Kevin to serve 70 months - 5 years and 10 months - in prison for his "crimes!"

**Meanwhile, Black Lives Matter and Antifa thugs who 've rioted, burned down businesses, beaten, and terrorized everyday Americans haven't even been ARRESTED!**

This is outrageous!

**To be frank, I feel a growing sense of urgency about January 6 patriots. They need a legal breakthrough SOON.**

And you're the key to making these pivotal fights as effective as possible.

**[Patriot, please help fully fund these critical fights for our innocent fellow Americans with your best gift right now of $25, $50, $100 or more.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb3qnud7ooghkkc39pdmd8m202o5mfpm4837852g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob0c3h2bs)**

Don't delay.

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, I 'm counting on you**. **[Please give at least a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z855cscl5qv7gqt3vuav6e30rvcp74n6p3n1kksg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob0c3h2bs)**

1600 Daily

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Will you help me strike out this liberal lineup?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbajhg8nqv8r3nbmaocs2kvubv9s5o0gtjjm03ho_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob5cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn0gfdqtp4tg6n87feke2dp8nefeoqpnfvnssqk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob5cdh2bs)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z98du3m9qrriortdkgqgbsdum4j53o821ru8mr3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob5cdh2bs)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkdjpg82qi0vqr5d4eb93h606k0ojtm82riabaa8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob5cdh2bs)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqb9ihvmuku038mrvogua7oipddaf0tg73jq97bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob5cdh2bs)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb87qb3r5830t6i4jio5h5236baqve2rp0cfanq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob5cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsrqsc8v7ss233bcqteaquqa8m7hoa9883u4is2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob5cdh2bs)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo9te8rfif32janc7gqeg5ptps9ldd1buu7olpkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm4ob5cdh2bs)
---

---

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Invest in Pastors
body:
A spiritual battle is raging in our culture - its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30853%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wpS5JVLSj1639beYWtWSiQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, A spiritual battle is raging in our culture - its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us. TPUSA Faith is on the frontlines trying to make a difference in this spiritual battle. **Jeremiah 29:7 says, “But seek the welfare of the city where I have sent you ... for in its welfare you will find your welfare.”** This verse embodies our mission at TPUSA Faith, and we believe it's a _call for Christians to actively engage with America_. I founded TPUSA Faith - a branch of TPUSA - to EMPOWER believers to live out their faith boldly... CHALLENGE the secular culture... and UPHOLD the inerrancy of scripture. One way we do this is through our **Pastor Summits** , where we gather pastors from across all FIFTY states to inspire, encourage, and equip them to stand firmly for biblical truth and the Kingdom. We are excited to co-host the **Strong Church Dream Conference 2024** at the end of this month. This conference aims to bring pastors and ministry leaders from all FIFTY states to engage in nation-shaping conversations. But we need your help to make this happen. **[Your gift today of $25, $50, or any amount, will help provide scholarships to pastors and ministry leaders, making their trip to the conference affordable, if not completely FREE.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30854%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gF9AtYdJthlCoomOsO11TQ&sysid=1) **
---
[Provide a Scholarship for a Pastor](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30865%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8aodoGZJUBaGTCClDZm%2fnQ&sysid=1)
---
Your support also enables us to host nation-shaping events like the **Strong Church Dream Conference** and other events such as **Freedom Night in America** and our **grassroots Pastor Roundtable discussions**. These initiatives are critical in our mission to engage, equip, and empower the American Church with the essential tools to COUNTER falsehoods and DEFEND the _link between Faith and God-given Liberty_. Your donation will help us uphold the **three non-negotiables** every church must stand for: the Church can never be labeled nonessential again, life begins at conception, and God created male and female - we don't choose. **[**Your gift of $25, $50, or any amount, will empower pastors to stand up against secular culture and spotlight those who have stood up for what is right.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30866%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=br0X1f9%2f4OQNr9hx%2bdI1DQ&sysid=1)**
---
[Provide a Scholarship for a Pastor](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30865%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8aodoGZJUBaGTCClDZm%2fnQ&sysid=1)
---
We are determined to inspire faith, help bring about a REVIVAL in America, and continue to **fight for the welfare of our nation**. Your support is instrumental in achieving these goals. **We are at the forefront of a spiritual battle and your support is critical**. Your generosity will help us continue to equip and empower pastors, reach the next generation, and stand for righteousness in our nation. I want to thank you in advance for considering this request. Your commitment to furthering the Kingdom of God is truly inspiring. Together, we can inspire FAITH, ignite REVIVAL, and change the course of America.
---
[Provide a Scholarship for a Pastor](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30865%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8aodoGZJUBaGTCClDZm%2fnQ&sysid=1)
---
God bless you, Charlie Kirk TPUSA Faith
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30853%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wpS5JVLSj1639beYWtWSiQ&sysid=1)
---
[Support Turning Point USA Faith](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30867%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R5ZoU%2fuXlf7Ihb%2fcsHeO%2fA&sysid=1)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9951%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=UoTJQJWNcH%2fX%2fG5K9O2NaQ&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30868%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qJhheElVHVGSmGMM8sr9dg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30869%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8tOmk3QQBQ5p%2fWE%2bDNNjwg&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9951%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=UoTJQJWNcH%2fX%2fG5K9O2NaQ&sysid=1)

One year ago, January 6 Peaceful Protester Kevin Seefried was sentenced to three years in federal prison.

Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No.

Did he break windows? No.

**Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because he carried a Confederate flag through the U.S. Capitol building on Jan. 6, 2021.**

The NBC News headline says it all:

"Man who carried a Confederate Flag in the Capitol on Jan. 6 is sentenced to 3 years."

**You 'll notice there isn't one word there about the crimes he allegedly committed ... just the flag.**

U.S. District Judge Trevor McFadden, incredibly a Trump appointee, blasted Ken's carrying of the flag as "shocking" and "outrageous." Just goes to show that all of the establishment judges on the DC Federal Court are compromised, if not corrupt!

**Kevin carried the flag only as a symbol of protest, not to support racism or slavery. And the Confederate Flag is not such a symbol in any event, but instead Southern pride!**

But that didn't save him ... neither did his forced public apology.

What's worse, the federal prosecutor wanted Kevin to serve 70 months - 5 years and 10 months - in prison for his "crimes!"

**Meanwhile, Black Lives Matter and Antifa thugs who 've rioted, burned down businesses, beaten, and terrorized everyday Americans haven't even been ARRESTED!**

This is outrageous!

**To be frank, I feel a growing sense of urgency about January 6 patriots. They need a legal breakthrough SOON.**

And you're the key to making these pivotal fights as effective as possible.

**[Patriot, please help fully fund these critical fights for our innocent fellow Americans with your best gift right now of $25, $50, $100 or more.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zecjqcblrs112ec46v8pbs93r4svdlitqc622klo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s3hm2oj4c5h2bs)**

Don't delay.

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Help teach more kids true American history
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsZfXd3iSN
ACI - Giving Tuesday 2022

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osZfXd3iSN

Fellow Patriot,

You've probably noticed that children today aren't
getting the same kind of education that you and I received when
we were growing up.

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish
our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that
has changed.

In today's classroom, children are taught that
America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of
oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead
of what unites us.

To make matters worse: the right of parents to
choose how and where their kids receive their education remains
out of reach for most American families.

And this is exactly why we created our Little
Patriots program-to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and
caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children
unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere
and anytime-completely free of charge.

And now we plan to do even more.

To meet the growing demand for educational
resources that teach children to love their country and its
history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these
educational resources to schools, churches, and community
organizations!

But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I
need your help today.

We depend on the generous support of patriots like
you to help us fund this program and share it with children and
families across our great nation.

If you believe that American children deserve to
receive the best education possible, can I personally ask you to
help me accomplish my goal of getting this first-of-its-kind
curriculum to anyone who needs it?

If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to
more American children, please click the link below to make your
generous tax-deductible gift today:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62851057:sZfXd3iSN:m:3:2532013465:7E5D9216B4FBF7B3AB04E25A6B407BF1:r

Thank you so much for supporting these
efforts-together we can help kids across the U.S. get the
education they deserve.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson

Founder and Chairman

American Cornerstone Institute

Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our
mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious
liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and
developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in
society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's
citizens.

Copyright © 2024 American Cornerstone Institute,
All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isZfXd3iSN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osZfXd3iSN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQQH-N6UDGNgYKitVxSFfsaXXNlZYxs6wjf6CxSbT_PkIhSZ3WfvOkN_P_qq7aOhvWv9rDgF5hUkErbWyJ4Oxq457KtOMrPBWjTJSUlaxRdbEMsmdtVxcw1C3tukZQSovHUAOYdjYCBJMAphYgue46apaec8ZoYYfDQxlraCcaLquZ9kJI3ci2n7nmLREUYdtnZ40OXr9EtPlZBciFGx45b4nwC2ETYVO83wFTpT3gwZqIATDlGKCKuBI2fSc4OwPm55lyjPNpz14Z7Tdt10D4-AWf7CcqDy7FHQ0QPm4Y0wYm27CeXx4Wu3vCR_DauvPRxJAhZMLH26X8dy3PZkGY_FApE5fDd_n1h3Eqft8orQsclu3NOmeTPNawHsLKRF_kH5zmPQAA__8eI5qc)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQQH-N6UDGNgYKitVxSFfsaXXNlZYxs6wjf6CxSbT_PkIhSZ3WfvOkN_P_qq7aOhvWv9rDgF5hUkErbWyJ4Oxq457KtOMrPBWjTJSUlaxRdbEMsmdtVxcw1C3tukZQSovHUAOYdjYCBJMAphYgue46apaec8ZoYYfDQxlraCcaLquZ9kJI3ci2n7nmLREUYdtnZ40OXr9EtPlZBciFGx45b4nwC2ETYVO83wFTpT3gwZqIATDlGKCKuBI2fSc4OwPm55lyjPNpz14Z7Tdt10D4-AWf7CcqDy7FHQ0QPm4Y0wYm27CeXx4Wu3vCR_DauvPRxJAhZMLH26X8dy3PZkGY_FApE5fDd_n1h3Eqft8orQsclu3NOmeTPNawHsLKRF_kH5zmPQAA__8eI5qc) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQQH-N6UDGNgYKitVxSFfsaXXNlZYxs6wjf6CxSbT_PkIhSZ3WfvOkN_P_qq7aOhvWv9rDgF5hUkErbWyJ4Oxq457KtOMrPBWjTJSUlaxRdbEMsmdtVxcw1C3tukZQSovHUAOYdjYCBJMAphYgue46apaec8ZoYYfDQxlraCcaLquZ9kJI3ci2n7nmLREUYdtnZ40OXr9EtPlZBciFGx45b4nwC2ETYVO83wFTpT3gwZqIATDlGKCKuBI2fSc4OwPm55lyjPNpz14Z7Tdt10D4-AWf7CcqDy7FHQ0QPm4Y0wYm27CeXx4Wu3vCR_DauvPRxJAhZMLH26X8dy3PZkGY_FApE5fDd_n1h3Eqft8orQsclu3NOmeTPNawHsLKRF_kH5zmPQAA__8eI5qc)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQQH-N6UDGNgYKitVxSFfsaXXNlZYxs6wjf6CxSbT_PkIhSZ3WfvOkN_P_qq7aOhvWv9rDgF5hUkErbWyJ4Oxq457KtOMrPBWjTJSUlaxRdbEMsmdtVxcw1C3tukZQSovHUAOYdjYCBJMAphYgue46apaec8ZoYYfDQxlraCcaLquZ9kJI3ci2n7nmLREUYdtnZ40OXr9EtPlZBciFGx45b4nwC2ETYVO83wFTpT3gwZqIATDlGKCKuBI2fSc4OwPm55lyjPNpz14Z7Tdt10D4-AWf7CcqDy7FHQ0QPm4Y0wYm27CeXx4Wu3vCR_DauvPRxJAhZMLH26X8dy3PZkGY_FApE5fDd_n1h3Eqft8orQsclu3NOmeTPNawHsLKRF_kH5zmPQAA__8eI5qc)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

body:

| Support Amanda Chase Donate Today THANK YOU
