|
Dear Friends & Supporters, Are you enjoying my thorough daily newsletter and weekly summary?
Please make a donation today to support my efforts to keep you informed.
While I'm no longer in the Senate of Virginia, I'm putting my 8 years of service and experience to work for you.
While the General Assembly is meeting through Saturday, March 9, and is introducing legislation that will effect your quality of life, it's critical that you know what to do to support or oppose certain bills that I've highlighted for you.
Would you be willing to pitch in to cover my costs?
It's about $400 a month just to cover my email service, just for starters. Thanks in advance to those who have already given so generously. I want to be able to continue to provide this service to you.
Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly?
Thank you in advance for your continued support.

Please make a donation today to support my efforts to keep you informed. While I'm no longer in the Senate of Virginia, I'm putting my 8 years of service and experience to work for you. While the General Assembly is meeting through Saturday, March 9, and is introducing legislation that will effect your quality of life, it's critical that you know what to do to support or oppose certain bills that I've highlighted for you. Would you be willing to pitch in to cover my costs? It's about $400 a month just to cover my email service, just for starters. Thanks in advance to those who have already given so generously. I want to be able to continue to provide this service to you. Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly? Thank you in advance for your continued support. | | GET REGULAR UPDATES | After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed. | | [8am Senate Courts of Justice ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4b112dlwO9COAuP5Ru3tO5f2U54RbJ9mcfbkHuawkVstvEt4-DSKxonwTW0xNvKbW7WfVRnwHZeQGnbn9XJWl-g8PFlt9inh90zxiBztD7Rb4xjt7Q_YUV_p5rZGXeLW-tqMbJSuyXtOO3wraBR49Fw=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==)
---
| [H.B. 35](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfXaCqXGTTcNbDl5zTcxwzNXNgClPHq67t0tGgYZF3ybhUHMTdFA6psgK7KcP1EXgUVfjB2AArP-_99zHIyLuFRS2liQquzDL4l_J0Uq9zBl0LXFl099KtwKbtJqOlugdBX3rvMmT986U=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Clark Firearm safety device tax credit; definition of firearm safety device. Expands the definition of "firearm safety device" as it relates to the firearm safety device tax credit to include any device that, when installed on a firearm, is designed to prevent the firearm from being operated without first deactivating the device. The bill provides that the provisions of this act shall be effective for taxable years beginning on and after January 1, 2024.
[H.B. 36](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfEwIwSh1PpwGKd5xU3pQoNC-jMlhjtwhh165zqtunQovX5IgTrsCw72XpX4WnmZAmobpgWqVSiw5bXZZMJ1ZzDwE4NTSCvz-Ovz1K9gE9UgkOs6fdloQvCv9ccgsA2wZsClWrGcqTqhg=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Willett Abuse and neglect of children; causing or enabling child to gain possession of a firearm; penalty. Creates a Class 5 felony for any parent, guardian, or other person who is 18 years of age or older and is responsible for the care of a child under the age of 18 whose willful act or omission causes or enables that child to gain possession of a firearm (i) after having received notice of a preliminary determination, pursuant to relevant law, that such child poses a threat of violence or physical harm to self or others or (ii) when such parent, guardian, or other person responsible for the care of the child knows or reasonably should know that such child has been charged with, either by warrant or petition, convicted of, or adjudicated delinquent of a violent juvenile felony.
[H.B. 158](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfMXrI5CyS27uZdqCTIlGmzAf4HaNWUgGl6fV5A4ZJoBAY1gq_L4BE1ue87XfyzKpbrfzjPFWweCbJVntN93ARfN0ilBXsW7yMvc8DV2lEvDE2QVnENzwYUhFyVvrEo7DGoHgjNSHKwzM=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: McClure Firearm locking device required for sale or transfer of firearm; warning against accessibility to children; penalty. Makes it a Class 3 misdemeanor for any licensed manufacturer, licensed importer, or licensed dealer to sell, deliver, or transfer any firearm to any person other than a licensed manufacturer, licensed importer, or licensed dealer unless the transferee is provided with a locking device for that firearm and the firearm is accompanied by a warning, in conspicuous and legible type in capital letters printed on a separate sheet of paper included within the packaging enclosing the firearm, that firearms should be locked and kept away from children and that there may be civil and criminal liability for failing to do so. The bill provides exceptions for law-enforcement and governmental agencies.
[H.B. 175](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfyubF2vXJnBy6AlAjcrdO-POJey1mnxcuKw-VjwSLful9doMlpr2rU0GBq2YimsWXxoRhlTS1La2CZPepDv01aCM8JMIB_kZPJkDfDM0671qgWPI_S2jZnF0zoc-0nFbvK3zCrXGs8pY=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Simon Carrying assault firearms in public areas prohibited; penalty. Prohibits the carrying of certain semi-automatic center-fire rifles, pistols, and shotguns on any public street, road, alley, sidewalk, or public right-of-way or in any public park or any other place of whatever nature that is open to the public. Under current law, the current prohibition on carrying certain shotguns and semi-automatic center-fire rifles and pistols applies to a narrower range of firearms, only in certain localities, and only when such firearms are loaded.
[H.B. 318](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfunH9bljAcXPh6HOgYlaR_vtohlkZdqpWKNAaqUVakmJk6FJJdeQgMx_ew1hvoTwL1obtCgs0KE2Bdj_TOjdegfCpU8l7Bt4lKPWCh-1Ih_5pI006LNgFDEplK9-l66bXQwXMhKEn2-g=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Helmer Firearm industry members; standards of responsible conduct; civil liability. Creates standards of responsible conduct for firearm industry members and requires such members to establish and implement reasonable controls regarding the manufacture, sale, distribution, use, and marketing of the firearm industry member's firearm-related products, as those terms are defined in the bill. Such reasonable controls include reasonable procedures, safeguards, and business practices that are designed to (i) prevent the sale or distribution of a firearm-related product to a straw purchaser, a firearm trafficker, a person prohibited from possessing a firearm under state or federal law, or a person who the firearm industry member has reasonable cause to believe is at substantial risk of using a firearm-related product to harm themselves or unlawfully harm another or of unlawfully possessing or using a firearm-related product; (ii) prevent the loss of a firearm-related product or theft of a firearm-related product from a firearm industry member; (iii) ensure that the firearm industry member complies with all provisions of state and federal law and does not otherwise promote the unlawful manufacture, sale, possession, marketing, or use of a firearm-related product; and (iv) ensure that the firearm industry member does not engage in an act or practice in violation of the Virginia Consumer Protection Act. The bill also provides that a firearm industry member may not knowingly or recklessly create, maintain, or contribute to a public nuisance, as defined in the bill, through the sale, manufacturing, importing, or marketing of a firearm-related product. The bill creates a civil cause of action for the Attorney General or a local county or city attorney to enforce the provisions of the bill or for any person who has been injured as a result of a firearm industry member's violation to seek an injunction and to recover costs and damages.
[H.B. 351](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfakjrpdXZ52eCGXtwEH0sOXGDBoIGPKyc1sf458bASqxK8lsenNGDMrL_buMZosn4DV8v1IYAVehwANbIGAybWuUV-IcHJ-JaKyM1y6jugPyT2GGqEpiTjlxKTx--gwmr7uSdJAJzJ8k=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Clark Firearm locking device required for purchase of a firearm; households where minor resides; penalty. Requires any person who purchases a firearm to either (i) purchase a locking device for such firearm if such person resides in the same household as a minor or (ii) complete a certification statement on a form provided by the Department of State Police, under penalty of perjury, certifying that he does not reside in the same household as a minor, with exceptions enumerated in the bill. Accordingly, the bill provides that it is unlawful for any licensed manufacturer, licensed importer, or licensed dealer to sell, deliver, or transfer any firearm to any person, other than a licensed manufacturer, licensed importer, or licensed dealer, unless the transferee (a) purchases a locking device for such firearm if such person resides in the same household as a minor or (b) completes a certification statement on a form provided by the Department of State Police, under penalty of perjury, certifying that he does not reside in the same household as a minor. A violation of either provision is a Class 1 misdemeanor.
[H.B. 362](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfzaM-mOfXkOl6DyZFnDwXh1vro1Ru09H0gAIFGL5K6kNyinBDu9XFznmYHFIfvilAT00UKoQhNhJCIT6XbPGUVsT6ktvGWUSezUAmdU1LLTiemdpltxvE2nvcl0XYDfQ-EJrpt5LdKqc=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: McClure Purchase, possession, or transportation of firearm following an assault and battery against a person in a dating relationship with the alleged offender, penalty. Provides that any person who knowingly and intentionally purchases, possesses, or transports any firearm following a misdemeanor conviction for an offense that occurred on or after July 1, 2024, for the offense of assault and battery against a person in a dating relationship, as defined in the bill, with the alleged offender or an offense substantially similar under the laws of any other state or of the United States is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor. The bill provides that a court, after a finding of guilt has been made and prior to entering a final order of conviction, shall determine by a preponderance of the evidence whether the victim of the offense was a family or household member or an intimate or dating partner for the purposes of determining the firearms prohibition.
[H.B. 466](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfOKtJtdRD6rtoZFw31y0KekdVXp4HVLskoAC68NAcnPjmSaPyHWfkO4ww-SqJLRpceSrUHYKN5wNmCNy_cEarhwJaugqHbP7C2uvDvGlm8za80yv5qJtyWg3SoRdCjUU8xctfTCGeQsw=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Helmer Concealed handgun permits; reciprocity with other states. Provides that the Superintendent of State Police, in consultation with the Office of the Attorney General, shall determine whether states meet the statutory qualifications for Virginia to recognize the concealed handgun permit of a person from another state. Under current law, any out-of-state permit is recognized in the Commonwealth provided that (i) the issuing authority provides the means for instantaneous verification of the validity of all such permits or licenses issued within that state, accessible 24 hours a day; (ii) the permit or license holder carries a photo identification issued by a government agency of any state or by the U.S. Department of Defense or U.S. Department of State and displays the permit or license and such identification upon demand by a law-enforcement officer; and (iii) the permit or license holder has not previously had a Virginia concealed handgun permit revoked. The bill also provides that a Virginia resident who has not been issued a valid resident concealed handgun permit may not use a concealed handgun or concealed weapon permit or license issued by another state to carry a concealed handgun in the Commonwealth.
[H.B. 585](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfZ4Otn0jwpqnOlMSCv8Q3ERXh-A9W9-fgtXrOKDM2t6zg6SI0a1ssM24zDDjoXrgeD991I2Fa-Z1doV7sHjaiv0TGWLEG37G1bVLIKcG-sptB4qMBiGIg3jMvqCBAaCUY_OoiofLo8N4=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Mundon King Home-based firearms dealers; prohibited near schools; penalties. Provides that no home-based firearms dealer, as defined in the bill, shall be engaged in the business of selling, trading, or transferring firearms at wholesale or retail within 1.5 miles of any elementary or middle school, including buildings and grounds. The bill provides that any person who willfully violates such prohibition is guilty of a Class 2 misdemeanor for a first offense and guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor for a second or subsequent offense.
[H.B. 797](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfTIIYLG-SvDwqMak8wD1qImr0VXEK6wZE8wYXlFMBFdKQFBzPKyGaiFffnBpTiYNYnQzq6gExrsccSWy8DJohSk9PErXP0IzM1xEdwrcdonweiRMAUGYwyqbxO9fT1zqxStH2_SaG6zM=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Hope Demonstrated competence for a concealed handgun permit; firearms instructors and safety programs. Requires that any course, class, or training to demonstrate competence with a handgun as required to obtain a concealed handgun permit must include a live fire shooting exercise conducted on a range, including the expenditure of a minimum of 10 rounds of ammunition, and provides that no course, class, or training that does not include such live fire shooting exercise meets the requirements to obtain a concealed handgun permit. The bill removes references to the National Rifle Association (the NRA) and the United States Concealed Carry Association from the Code that allow the organizations to certify ranges and instructors and for courses offered by them to serve as proof of demonstrated competence in firearms safety and training for the purpose of obtaining a concealed handgun permit or receiving training as a minor in the use of pneumatic guns.
[H.B. 798](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3Gf57PkgGlH0ns41iMG9Glhm31NBB6yUaDjW1r5rn5EhyZmGUd6LR-v6rk1ykwjUI8Piwc2sEtsbrLAvO89UjDYi49jm8Ts9UfxYyimVwFd3zZ_UsCEneufrxlt4F-WJcIsNoWkbbGV2So=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Hope Purchase, possession, or transportation of firearm following an assault and battery or stalking violation; prohibition period; penalty. Prohibits a person who has been convicted of assault and battery, assault and battery of a family or household member, or stalking from purchasing, possessing, or transporting a firearm. The prohibition expires five years after the date of conviction, at which point the person's firearm rights are restored, unless he receives another disqualifying conviction. A person who violates the provisions of the bill is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor. The bill also extends from three years to five years the existing prohibition period for persons convicted of assault and battery of certain family or household members.
[H.B. 799](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfYPmJ3NEFO1L3LRIF0jNYfSKK8bUdsc3mI7jQkPhlyB0o7g5RRqutluBz-MQG7dhQvM5dwEHjbH0Xe-paTVsCgh4XNh_ZUQ7c71RfqcYF_N1hBHcbN-QD_083al4bNM4zP5_EVn7XC_k=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Hope Concealed handgun permit applications; fingerprints required by local governments. Requires an applicant for a concealed handgun permit or a renewal of such permit to submit fingerprints as part of the application. The bill has a delayed effective date of July 1, 2025.
[H.B. 1386](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfNLZr7wRV2cJtReJC4C8WdPVPO_HHcf-slwadvQczgnGjHV8sM91FnEp6KBQtlDW10gLtiGSFwGsJRPa6Et3fTecraRuB48199oZKeoqjLOg8XkGCghINL903Ind9cZ8OTzMiHzG5Sbw=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Convirs-Fowler Firearms; workplace rules of localities. Provides that any locality that adopts an ordinance prohibiting the public carrying of firearms shall not have workplace rules that are less restrictive than such ordinance.
---

| [H.B. 1505](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfP7DAGfiiPHxeakg0v_Nj1J5_pzzCvIffJlmDtESoZyGYm9_51Al7HeCX4q9piHWnwaLMbnMUuiEglMx6eUL2nhMJu_4OblA0RKJ6FSpycnqwSG2LDagw634KGZ0kWVMOorttIvFp44E=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Austin Intercollegiate athletics; student-athletes; compensation for name, image, or likeness. Makes several changes to existing provisions of law relating to compensation of a student-athlete at a public or private institution of higher education in the Commonwealth (institution) for the use of the name, image, or likeness of such student-athlete, including (i) prohibiting any athletic association, athletic conference, or other organization with authority over intercollegiate athletics from preventing an institution, its supporting foundations, or an entity acting on its behalf from identifying, creating, negotiating, facilitating, supporting, engaging with, assisting with, or otherwise enabling a name, image, or likeness opportunity for a student-athlete; (ii) requiring each institution to develop and submit to the institution's governing board or similar governing body for approval policies or procedures that govern the compensation of a student-athlete for the use of his name, image, or likeness; and (iii) permitting any institution to provide assets, resources, or benefits as an incentive to individuals, companies, or other entities to provide money, benefits, opportunities, or services to an outside entity that supports name, image, or likeness opportunities for the institution's student-athletes.

| [H.B. 405](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfiBjIHcGmJKXGqTBQN3N3re3DBnQz6i9doqh9FctRqnlLGZITuVlnYCNwo5hAMZTSnW1Bl-zSDEVvgx7lsQ7mx0FPCekb7pwlQ6p2imHgLAdr2l_HvsNSfxq3MlNGEz578sEeM6HEHAQ=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: McClure Commission on Electric Utility Regulation; evaluation of infrastructure necessary for electric vehicle charging facilities. Directs the Commission on Electric Utility Regulation (the Commission) to evaluate the design and deployment of the electrical distribution infrastructure necessary to support the installation of electric vehicle charging facilities in new developments consisting of single-family and multifamily residential units. The bill requires the Commission to engage representatives from the residential and commercial development industries, private sector utility consultants, and other stakeholders.

| [H.B. 157](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3Gf4v6-OiwcB5PtTmySLW5KjrkYQGVpoaDjTU3CpVTVdUyNI2OKONPWiKW3kNGD7YGsoab1H-HO4z26LPwFIdnTZHIKT2eWOwR7nyqcx0ikalpZyrVv-cg_UMD3yjG8O0tGWZ57i6xHbaA=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: McClure Minimum wage; farm laborers or farm employees; temporary foreign workers. Eliminates the exemptions from Virginia's minimum wage requirements for (i) persons employed as farm laborers or farm employees and (ii) certain temporary foreign workers. This bill incorporates HB 866.
[H.B. 1069](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3GfFwbifzApxkH2ZEA3GZ5pz93_sEpORHKb4ozkzL8WWJKivB2gbsym-agTJbjH5pyaJ76m3qs9ZmLj-QucXbGgOXPTJkpmFQTNaqXrF2p_B5RVpOmhpqcL82ckA7ap_5hCZ8mVasuXgro=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Willett Liquid nicotine and nicotine vapor products; certification and directory; penalties. Requires every manufacturer of liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor products that are sold for retail sale in the Commonwealth to certify to the Attorney General that (i) the manufacturer has received a marketing authorization or similar order for the liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor product from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) or (ii) (a) the liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor product was marketed in the United States as of August 8, 2016, or (b) the manufacturer submitted a premarket tobacco product application for the liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor product to the FDA on or before September 9, 2020, and such application either remains under review by the FDA or a final decision on the application has not otherwise taken effect. The bill requires a manufacturer to submit such a form for each liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor product that such manufacturer sells for retail sale in the Commonwealth. Under the bill, any manufacturer that falsely represents any of the information required by the certification requirement is guilty of a Class 3 misdemeanor for each false representation.
[H.B. 1284](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DXuNqRP5FzsHIkqb3YPwa3G01GYjJm4OpCxEiBzLQmUIJVyPA3Pp4bd43N-bT3Gfm5SujYOAdSB6bp7pE90FjwPDWHbKu6pFOgkP0das_KKWki4c1lJNM1MZGaXO8o4y-NrnYedER075kF_0dpgeRZdapVWdM3XxacJhCYeyT1bU1FCD8F_pWSbFAxyeevvZZWViUspkVDY=&c=g6VC4K1U8u3sol1tNWOSpHXIYoG2Zku7nMLqxa5pDgxpwU252MrmOA==&ch=WR9jcnj5TLRgmE6lyEUrZxkv6vtyaWMY71juYx7L_Y-tLAr2Gwuvxw==) Patron: Askew Collective bargaining by firefighters and emergency medical services providers. Authorizes firefighters and emergency medical services providers employed by a political subdivision of the Commonwealth to engage in collective bargaining through labor organizations or other designated representatives. The bill provides for the appointment of a three-member board of arbitration regarding any dispute arising between an employer and firefighters or emergency services. Under the bill, determinations made by such board of arbitration are final on a disputed issue and are binding on the parties involved.

clean_body: Participate online or in person here | | | | House Bills Up MONDAY CALL IN REMOTELY OR SHOW UP | | Senate Committee Public Hearings for MONDAY BILLS TO WATCH Monday's Dockets | | == | == Patron: Clark Firearm safety device tax credit; definition of firearm safety device. Expands the definition of "firearm safety device" as it relates to the firearm safety device tax credit to include any device that, when installed on a firearm, is designed to prevent the firearm from being operated without first deactivating the device. The bill provides that the provisions of this act shall be effective for taxable years beginning on and after January 1, 2024. == Patron: Willett Abuse and neglect of children; causing or enabling child to gain possession of a firearm; penalty. Creates a Class 5 felony for any parent, guardian, or other person who is 18 years of age or older and is responsible for the care of a child under the age of 18 whose willful act or omission causes or enables that child to gain possession of a firearm (i) after having received notice of a preliminary determination, pursuant to relevant law, that such child poses a threat of violence or physical harm to self or others or (ii) when such parent, guardian, or other person responsible for the care of the child knows or reasonably should know that such child has been charged with, either by warrant or petition, convicted of, or adjudicated delinquent of a violent juvenile felony. == Patron: McClure Firearm locking device required for sale or transfer of firearm; warning against accessibility to children; penalty. Makes it a Class 3 misdemeanor for any licensed manufacturer, licensed importer, or licensed dealer to sell, deliver, or transfer any firearm to any person other than a licensed manufacturer, licensed importer, or licensed dealer unless the transferee is provided with a locking device for that firearm and the firearm is accompanied by a warning, in conspicuous and legible type in capital letters printed on a separate sheet of paper included within the packaging enclosing the firearm, that firearms should be locked and kept away from children and that there may be civil and criminal liability for failing to do so. The bill provides exceptions for law-enforcement and governmental agencies. == Patron: Simon Carrying assault firearms in public areas prohibited; penalty. Prohibits the carrying of certain semi-automatic center-fire rifles, pistols, and shotguns on any public street, road, alley, sidewalk, or public right-of-way or in any public park or any other place of whatever nature that is open to the public. Under current law, the current prohibition on carrying certain shotguns and semi-automatic center-fire rifles and pistols applies to a narrower range of firearms, only in certain localities, and only when such firearms are loaded. == Patron: Helmer Firearm industry members; standards of responsible conduct; civil liability. Creates standards of responsible conduct for firearm industry members and requires such members to establish and implement reasonable controls regarding the manufacture, sale, distribution, use, and marketing of the firearm industry member's firearm-related products, as those terms are defined in the bill. Such reasonable controls include reasonable procedures, safeguards, and business practices that are designed to (i) prevent the sale or distribution of a firearm-related product to a straw purchaser, a firearm trafficker, a person prohibited from possessing a firearm under state or federal law, or a person who the firearm industry member has reasonable cause to believe is at substantial risk of using a firearm-related product to harm themselves or unlawfully harm another or of unlawfully possessing or using a firearm-related product; (ii) prevent the loss of a firearm-related product or theft of a firearm-related product from a firearm industry member; (iii) ensure that the firearm industry member complies with all provisions of state and federal law and does not otherwise promote the unlawful manufacture, sale, possession, marketing, or use of a firearm-related product; and (iv) ensure that the firearm industry member does not engage in an act or practice in violation of the Virginia Consumer Protection Act. The bill also provides that a firearm industry member may not knowingly or recklessly create, maintain, or contribute to a public nuisance, as defined in the bill, through the sale, manufacturing, importing, or marketing of a firearm-related product. The bill creates a civil cause of action for the Attorney General or a local county or city attorney to enforce the provisions of the bill or for any person who has been injured as a result of a firearm industry member's violation to seek an injunction and to recover costs and damages. == Patron: Clark Firearm locking device required for purchase of a firearm; households where minor resides; penalty. Requires any person who purchases a firearm to either (i) purchase a locking device for such firearm if such person resides in the same household as a minor or (ii) complete a certification statement on a form provided by the Department of State Police, under penalty of perjury, certifying that he does not reside in the same household as a minor, with exceptions enumerated in the bill. Accordingly, the bill provides that it is unlawful for any licensed manufacturer, licensed importer, or licensed dealer to sell, deliver, or transfer any firearm to any person, other than a licensed manufacturer, licensed importer, or licensed dealer, unless the transferee (a) purchases a locking device for such firearm if such person resides in the same household as a minor or (b) completes a certification statement on a form provided by the Department of State Police, under penalty of perjury, certifying that he does not reside in the same household as a minor. A violation of either provision is a Class 1 misdemeanor. == Patron: McClure Purchase, possession, or transportation of firearm following an assault and battery against a person in a dating relationship with the alleged offender, penalty. Provides that any person who knowingly and intentionally purchases, possesses, or transports any firearm following a misdemeanor conviction for an offense that occurred on or after July 1, 2024, for the offense of assault and battery against a person in a dating relationship, as defined in the bill, with the alleged offender or an offense substantially similar under the laws of any other state or of the United States is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor. The bill provides that a court, after a finding of guilt has been made and prior to entering a final order of conviction, shall determine by a preponderance of the evidence whether the victim of the offense was a family or household member or an intimate or dating partner for the purposes of determining the firearms prohibition. == Patron: Helmer Concealed handgun permits; reciprocity with other states. Provides that the Superintendent of State Police, in consultation with the Office of the Attorney General, shall determine whether states meet the statutory qualifications for Virginia to recognize the concealed handgun permit of a person from another state. Under current law, any out-of-state permit is recognized in the Commonwealth provided that (i) the issuing authority provides the means for instantaneous verification of the validity of all such permits or licenses issued within that state, accessible 24 hours a day; (ii) the permit or license holder carries a photo identification issued by a government agency of any state or by the U.S. Department of Defense or U.S. Department of State and displays the permit or license and such identification upon demand by a law-enforcement officer; and (iii) the permit or license holder has not previously had a Virginia concealed handgun permit revoked. The bill also provides that a Virginia resident who has not been issued a valid resident concealed handgun permit may not use a concealed handgun or concealed weapon permit or license issued by another state to carry a concealed handgun in the Commonwealth. == Patron: Mundon King Home-based firearms dealers; prohibited near schools; penalties. Provides that no home-based firearms dealer, as defined in the bill, shall be engaged in the business of selling, trading, or transferring firearms at wholesale or retail within 1.5 miles of any elementary or middle school, including buildings and grounds. The bill provides that any person who willfully violates such prohibition is guilty of a Class 2 misdemeanor for a first offense and guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor for a second or subsequent offense. == Patron: Hope Demonstrated competence for a concealed handgun permit; firearms instructors and safety programs. Requires that any course, class, or training to demonstrate competence with a handgun as required to obtain a concealed handgun permit must include a live fire shooting exercise conducted on a range, including the expenditure of a minimum of 10 rounds of ammunition, and provides that no course, class, or training that does not include such live fire shooting exercise meets the requirements to obtain a concealed handgun permit. The bill removes references to the National Rifle Association (the NRA) and the United States Concealed Carry Association from the Code that allow the organizations to certify ranges and instructors and for courses offered by them to serve as proof of demonstrated competence in firearms safety and training for the purpose of obtaining a concealed handgun permit or receiving training as a minor in the use of pneumatic guns. == Patron: Hope Purchase, possession, or transportation of firearm following an assault and battery or stalking violation; prohibition period; penalty. Prohibits a person who has been convicted of assault and battery, assault and battery of a family or household member, or stalking from purchasing, possessing, or transporting a firearm. The prohibition expires five years after the date of conviction, at which point the person's firearm rights are restored, unless he receives another disqualifying conviction. A person who violates the provisions of the bill is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor. The bill also extends from three years to five years the existing prohibition period for persons convicted of assault and battery of certain family or household members. == Patron: Hope Concealed handgun permit applications; fingerprints required by local governments. Requires an applicant for a concealed handgun permit or a renewal of such permit to submit fingerprints as part of the application. The bill has a delayed effective date of July 1, 2025. == Patron: Convirs-Fowler Firearms; workplace rules of localities. Provides that any locality that adopts an ordinance prohibiting the public carrying of firearms shall not have workplace rules that are less restrictive than such ordinance. | | == | == Patron: Austin Intercollegiate athletics; student-athletes; compensation for name, image, or likeness. Makes several changes to existing provisions of law relating to compensation of a student-athlete at a public or private institution of higher education in the Commonwealth (institution) for the use of the name, image, or likeness of such student-athlete, including (i) prohibiting any athletic association, athletic conference, or other organization with authority over intercollegiate athletics from preventing an institution, its supporting foundations, or an entity acting on its behalf from identifying, creating, negotiating, facilitating, supporting, engaging with, assisting with, or otherwise enabling a name, image, or likeness opportunity for a student-athlete; (ii) requiring each institution to develop and submit to the institution's governing board or similar governing body for approval policies or procedures that govern the compensation of a student-athlete for the use of his name, image, or likeness; and (iii) permitting any institution to provide assets, resources, or benefits as an incentive to individuals, companies, or other entities to provide money, benefits, opportunities, or services to an outside entity that supports name, image, or likeness opportunities for the institution's student-athletes. | | == | == Patron: McClure Commission on Electric Utility Regulation; evaluation of infrastructure necessary for electric vehicle charging facilities. Directs the Commission on Electric Utility Regulation (the Commission) to evaluate the design and deployment of the electrical distribution infrastructure necessary to support the installation of electric vehicle charging facilities in new developments consisting of single-family and multifamily residential units. The bill requires the Commission to engage representatives from the residential and commercial development industries, private sector utility consultants, and other stakeholders. | | == House Bills on Third Reading - Regular Calendar .. == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == | | == | == Patron: McClure Minimum wage; farm laborers or farm employees; temporary foreign workers. Eliminates the exemptions from Virginia's minimum wage requirements for (i) persons employed as farm laborers or farm employees and (ii) certain temporary foreign workers. This bill incorporates HB 866. == Patron: Willett Liquid nicotine and nicotine vapor products; certification and directory; penalties. Requires every manufacturer of liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor products that are sold for retail sale in the Commonwealth to certify to the Attorney General that (i) the manufacturer has received a marketing authorization or similar order for the liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor product from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) or (ii) (a) the liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor product was marketed in the United States as of August 8, 2016, or (b) the manufacturer submitted a premarket tobacco product application for the liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor product to the FDA on or before September 9, 2020, and such application either remains under review by the FDA or a final decision on the application has not otherwise taken effect. The bill requires a manufacturer to submit such a form for each liquid nicotine or nicotine vapor product that such manufacturer sells for retail sale in the Commonwealth. Under the bill, any manufacturer that falsely represents any of the information required by the certification requirement is guilty of a Class 3 misdemeanor for each false representation. == Patron: Askew Collective bargaining by firefighters and emergency medical services providers. Authorizes firefighters and emergency medical services providers employed by a political subdivision of the Commonwealth to engage in collective bargaining through labor organizations or other designated representatives. The bill provides for the appointment of a three-member board of arbitration regarding any dispute arising between an employer and firefighters or emergency services. Under the bill, determinations made by such board of arbitration are final on a disputed issue and are binding on the parties involved. | | == | not meeting | ACTION, ACTION, ACTION | Friends, YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home. YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time. This is YOUR opportunity to DO SOMETHING. Above I have listed the dockets for THIS MONDAY'S Senate Committee hearings. By clicking each link you can quickly look over which bills are coming up this Monday that are of interest to you. Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely? Then click on the link below to the streaming of the committee meeting and follow the directions to either view the committee in real time or comment remotely to the Senate committee members in real time to state your support or opposition to a particular bill. It's that easy to express your support or opposition to a bill coming up on this Monday's docket. | | GET REGULAR UPDATES | Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. THANK YOU. Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly. I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you. If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars? It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly. Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly? Thank you in advance for your continued support.After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed. Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency. | | == | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/e2nin-21uH53q_ptKhBL8g~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/e2nin-21uH53q_ptKhBL8g~~/AARclAA~~~) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/e2nin-21uH53q_ptKhBL8g~~/AARclAA~~~)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/e2nin-21uH53q_ptKhBL8g~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Freedom Report
---

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Update on the Let's Go Washington initiatives
body:
Given the certification of all six initiatives, we want to highlight our recent interview with Let's Go Washington founder, Brian Heywood. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62851083:WXV8h3ivN:m:1:2610672541:2F075DF6B1E267E3E42A08FEFA8E9A3D:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Despite their constitutional duty to take up all certified initiatives, Democrats have only agreed to hear three out of the six citizen-approved initiatives. Those hearings will take place this week as the 2024 legislative session staggers on. As we continue delivering the latest news coming out of Olympia, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
House Republican Deputy Leader Mike Steele of the 12th Legislative District joined us for last week's Newsmaker Interview. Rep. Steele delved into the notable achievements and disappointments of the ongoing 2024 legislative session. He highlighted the bipartisan success in crafting the supplemental capital budget, emphasizing its crucial role in driving economic development across our state. He discussed the successful opposition to concerning bills, including those related to voting rights for incarcerated felons. Rep. Steele also provided insights into his legislation (House Bill 2307) to offer additional tax credits to Main Street businesses. [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62851084:WXV8h3ivN:m:1:2610672541:2F075DF6B1E267E3E42A08FEFA8E9A3D:r).

**This week 's top story...**
Democrats in Olympia had ample time to prepare for citizen initiatives seeking legislative action. Yet they appear unprepared for a public debate on Let's Go Washington initiatives that aim to reverse their failed tax and policy priorities. Despite the initiatives being certified with millions of signatures, Todd Myers of the Washington Policy Center reveals that liberals behind the policies are intentionally misleading voters in their initial communications. Democrat State Senator Marko Liias, a leading figure in spreading misinformation, falsely claims that repealing the carbon tax will cut highway funding, despite the transportation budget expressly prohibiting such use. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62851085:WXV8h3ivN:m:1:2610672541:2F075DF6B1E267E3E42A08FEFA8E9A3D:r).

**In case you missed it ...**
Governor Jay Inslee and his administration have neglected the state's ferry fleet for years. Even editorialists at the Seattle Times are noticing and highlighting that political interference has worsened the ferry system, citing issues such as union contracts hindering crew adjustments and a halted 144-car build program in 2020. The result has been a decrease in operating vessels and available crew, despite the already diminished fleet. Experts have proposed emulating BC Ferries' governance model, advocating for the removal of politicians like Inslee from the decision-making process to address the ongoing challenges faced by Washington State Ferries. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62851086:WXV8h3ivN:m:1:2610672541:2F075DF6B1E267E3E42A08FEFA8E9A3D:r).

**Your bit of inspiration for the week ...**
Enjoy the wildlife from right here in our state, as captured by former U.S. Congressman Rod Chandler.
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62851087:WXV8h3ivN:m:1:2610672541:2F075DF6B1E267E3E42A08FEFA8E9A3D:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14436097&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWXV8h3ivN).
---

body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=687e3239750544bd8c9bd91fc3af13c1&_e=TrO5OL4C_qwhlWrh_iVYJt7QIFg8ZIpOh2RntSWQFxeQGcQVmESHsnUIRemezysE8OtdlxaW1eKQxvYEfHkJpwFeo9TdsH_7y1ZuMHnS8hBMvimZR68FeVQHHXrcAXpTSRtAroLOUv13HBtvM8qtMfzuPwmZBhUrxQkzCylEA87P1upEocnulQQveySTPbjJsu8IzqLzP5WyxC21p7CBqT4sZbkSit-lZh_1mrPdhBdfv0JDaiYyhgu25n4u1EgSeiRv0JKxadqSYn66rNeji_O1eYDmAwDbKHV65Rk_KG2epAKsg65L7RQAuHlva2btkrxG9T7zTVtjz2mOY_YYYRjui5ETemhGJSn1h6VwutRkht8Jpw-CdB4NcNf8PD_VImmFH1UZsiC0ywKfad19Xg%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=687e3239750544bd8c9bd91fc3af13c1&_e=TrO5OL4C_qwhlWrh_iVYJt7QIFg8ZIpOh2RntSWQFxeQGcQVmESHsnUIRemezysE8OtdlxaW1eKQxvYEfHkJpwFeo9TdsH_7y1ZuMHnS8hBMvimZR68FeVQHHXrcAXpTSRtAroLOUv13HBtvM8qtMfzuPwmZBhUrxQkzCylEA87P1upEocnulQQveySTPbjJsu8IzqLzP5WyxC21p7CBqT4sZbkSit-lZh_1mrPdhBd67Ue-MXRmQh5_NC1bBleKzIf7GvpBjex_jIBDx5WB3-KkMqGeLHFEjhEdEUcYXmywEcpej9b8sI4v7sjN-O-4cTg-YiVCDIQ7uzAYI-em9ghva10rAi1PemURjO-xinqBqwX1CuXpCF9HmEgzrwzK6yJsWQT-8TmPkcDEQqNFtw%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=687e3239750544bd8c9bd91fc3af13c1&_e=TrO5OL4C_qwhlWrh_iVYJt7QIFg8ZIpOh2RntSWQFxeQGcQVmESHsnUIRemezysE8OtdlxaW1eKQxvYEfHkJpwFeo9TdsH_7y1ZuMHnS8hBMvimZR68FeVQHHXrcAXpTSRtAroLOUv13HBtvM8qtMfzuPwmZBhUrxQkzCylEA87P1upEocnulQQveySTPbjJsu8IzqLzP5WyxC21p7CBqT4sZbkSit-lZh_1mrPdhBco_SQzfWr09AMDkj1SUG_MLuYziMzH3D47C7SM155GgN_DaUZ1ZLTDgG8phDjUq3Gh1li_-nBS5vPwXn_7_AMbXtzV34T0PIxM9D34lFKtvL0hrf9tdO7sk5uNPsqsqfo1T0uVShA_kyy6R8l-2PhC40LNedfqtnAEPMeBi5EP6g%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---

The top two go head-to-head in November. clean_body: I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist: | | | | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds. The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election. "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:" If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?" I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have 1) a Conservative House Majority, 2) a Conservative Senate, and 3) a Conservative in the White House. If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in? | | | "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT" This is a non-negotiable if we want to win. Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register. If we don 't do it too, we will lose. But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election. Will you do your part? I look forward to seeing your name. name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d606babd8e6c48609e3d0913d9fd46bf&_e=mC7mIuPk87y5ZEq5kMsQh7Bhzn_qrT7DbLK6Yq6z3rGboZkNUoRWJ-zmzx8gMi1cjl59Xa1eMj02RwAzERcEMbjWPJlpcFwpay4Oj8_3TJ2T-lpg_REhfKZCghWtFx6kWaoKfloh8ex7-82_IcZKWXzEL5FCNDA_PUpDCPUEY5ioPDIx_9CGCHOMq2bkctXK9do9wGm2kZQFIumvUEstDt10k1aYbzL_374Mcviqe5A35-72zQf4ySGX3p4NA4h26hwcQE_QIH12ZkKiKCmsw76-jVABJkwnS7DNfL9G2WsNd7ce78iy_dIFuYVTlvb62uRMZZoRVEo97RT0T8z6FThsGm2HUCgKuAJzWICdEibvubTREkvmju8IIm5TAi2aFdD0YWgNwhY0ZwptTlEZ1Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d606babd8e6c48609e3d0913d9fd46bf&_e=mC7mIuPk87y5ZEq5kMsQh7Bhzn_qrT7DbLK6Yq6z3rGboZkNUoRWJ-zmzx8gMi1cjl59Xa1eMj02RwAzERcEMbjWPJlpcFwpay4Oj8_3TJ2T-lpg_REhfKZCghWtFx6kWaoKfloh8ex7-82_IcZKWXzEL5FCNDA_PUpDCPUEY5ioPDIx_9CGCHOMq2bkctXK9do9wGm2kZQFIumvUEstDt10k1aYbzL_374Mcviqe5D-7XjrykV9EGOyVKZuoQT_vvH-_Q6qsAaNnh4CwDyAj1I0c5atYKoOxvRB8v3YYuiF6VRIPT39_QWnxR5wnUJKdVo3qhgBhdHWhgJHU-Qr8meAY1-uTYsMbv3rlkAEV5xOfXjOJ34g417VRfQWCKtwiNJP3zctCm32YgSBCEXoFg%3D%3D)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d606babd8e6c48609e3d0913d9fd46bf&_e=mC7mIuPk87y5ZEq5kMsQh7Bhzn_qrT7DbLK6Yq6z3rGboZkNUoRWJ-zmzx8gMi1cjl59Xa1eMj02RwAzERcEMbjWPJlpcFwpay4Oj8_3TJ2T-lpg_REhfKZCghWtFx6kWaoKfloh8ex7-82_IcZKWXzEL5FCNDA_PUpDCPUEY5ioPDIx_9CGCHOMq2bkctXK9do9wGm2kZQFIumvUEstDt10k1aYbzL_374Mcviqe5B7_q7yCRLaOld5PR0koObGZoAhdO2_awT5HAMyfp33wrGnw5XBsrS7EpGul-_g4qDMW3lxf1nboOSLi2x2U1o6l7eaSYP04XwfbvkxwS_5Vljo84uFLdsx3N-7g-fiGafstREnro35UHd-bmABY8FgEXeQuqu02xuwagRbwuBEcA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d606babd8e6c48609e3d0913d9fd46bf&_e=mC7mIuPk87y5ZEq5kMsQh7Bhzn_qrT7DbLK6Yq6z3rGboZkNUoRWJ-zmzx8gMi1cjl59Xa1eMj02RwAzERcEMbjWPJlpcFwpay4Oj8_3TJ2T-lpg_REhfKZCghWtFx6kWaoKfloh8ex7-82_IcZKWXzEL5FCNDA_PUpDCPUEY5ioPDIx_9CGCHOMq2bkctXK9do9wGm2kZQFIumvUEstDt10k1aYbzL_374Mcviqe5CqX4Qufc-2C1tYgWTp0JJZAVhtwHKYjzUoCzmra1ZtE6xyCnPpX4GB9nNqo0V8ANlNSJaiHaq9dH6vjaW8N3eNq9TjuvoO8-yK8f5GrdVql1XHrEH_7m2S7NGlzd6nvflnQlchxn8Ejy3V29P3HQ2Uo8er56dH1XD6_2k_sMMy5A%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d606babd8e6c48609e3d0913d9fd46bf&_e=mC7mIuPk87y5ZEq5kMsQh7Bhzn_qrT7DbLK6Yq6z3rGboZkNUoRWJ-zmzx8gMi1cjl59Xa1eMj02RwAzERcEMbjWPJlpcFwpay4Oj8_3TJ2T-lpg_REhfKZCghWtFx6kWaoKfloh8ex7-82_IcZKWXzEL5FCNDA_PUpDCPUEY5ioPDIx_9CGCHOMq2bkctXK9do9wGm2kZQFIumvUEstDt10k1aYbzL_374Mcviqe5DksD8jOy4j9cAoalwgKDazYrgtrvTWfLC9dEHqT0UneE_JzYOvYrKWcBdJOx-stlEVEoVmbRZ-NKU5Ue-3bESftkpVi13tUlf-AITHyPXuBdz2MFUbxucteSpEUbgs-BsxPz-igpf4qyYRQOZ681qfdEWXAG5I-03gOb8AFYjnWg%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

clean_body: Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th? | | | | | | Friend, That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f70c86c62550458eae9c647b69da2d90&_e=HIn57PnGKsi1GMhxB1rGAMQdi5FU7KH9eX_8y0LbmiJkkEfVb3D8-oti_QiJtryqSw03mrgJp6wqgHrBEGeh1kkhKCOA7OPo7kD332IVPtokEJRsDY_ScUkbYJ-_ab6Kk2oXOnsD8KLJSXA4L06m8iKzZ9HwpeHXgWRxqu8-e3vrn7vEtBkI32wJHEJLuggRRlYvohAi9x0QyGgAlvDzpNLk0QN5FhHrhosXBuiG8oFWaPZdTRMMeOEm4dRlmQB_x03uU6MtdQmh3wWizkOoUKTTP0vep2IwDph-IULTxAIbW0b7sGI1SltvVNOTJaC_63UBRMJ31pLjSbfK1DK04O1n3ZmiZfoLB0nH7lI35_y8M66FxkplHsTR9RYQ4yduR96AqoIWBP3T5XaiOFMPAxuMLD0ikVREtX-6oGNApD_AAx9T6DE3GtqEheVUj9wN)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f70c86c62550458eae9c647b69da2d90&_e=HIn57PnGKsi1GMhxB1rGAMQdi5FU7KH9eX_8y0LbmiJkkEfVb3D8-oti_QiJtryqSw03mrgJp6wqgHrBEGeh1kkhKCOA7OPo7kD332IVPtokEJRsDY_ScUkbYJ-_ab6Kk2oXOnsD8KLJSXA4L06m8iKzZ9HwpeHXgWRxqu8-e3vrn7vEtBkI32wJHEJLuggRRlYvohAi9x0QyGgAlvDzpNLk0QN5FhHrhosXBuiG8oFWaPZdTRMMeOEm4dRlmQB_x03uU6MtdQmh3wWizkOoUKTTP0vep2IwDph-IULTxALh6dURmVL4pwH10ePFnIZQFTnRTKVc0A0V3pzfLN07sobOUojzytRSCpNMgxZ_bWzeNL5fVCRSLLuWGwIOhPxSzn1UEHUZs8uEusebcg-XeKKPZoAK3uVkA2jz5jOOFnqhDImKEP0efGy_biZkk8YJ)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f70c86c62550458eae9c647b69da2d90&_e=HIn57PnGKsi1GMhxB1rGAMQdi5FU7KH9eX_8y0LbmiJkkEfVb3D8-oti_QiJtryqSw03mrgJp6wqgHrBEGeh1kkhKCOA7OPo7kD332IVPtokEJRsDY_ScUkbYJ-_ab6Kk2oXOnsD8KLJSXA4L06m8iKzZ9HwpeHXgWRxqu8-e3vrn7vEtBkI32wJHEJLuggRRlYvohAi9x0QyGgAlvDzpNLk0QN5FhHrhosXBuiG8oFWaPZdTRMMeOEm4dRlmQB_x03uU6MtdQmh3wWizkOoUKTTP0vep2IwDph-IULTxAJ3AzsgaDYR7U2bkACnEmoD7TBeWgG8gkuRoPAvmv8-A2Bv8cNIKJ1f5dIKyeMCdelcet1-NAbYmJNmVeMhUYqePOWiMhtTkOr6KqjPRlEMC2a6VCcRpfpvuWlWFdeaoU2qceQNqdheJEG2IzQknccU)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f70c86c62550458eae9c647b69da2d90&_e=HIn57PnGKsi1GMhxB1rGAMQdi5FU7KH9eX_8y0LbmiJkkEfVb3D8-oti_QiJtryqSw03mrgJp6wqgHrBEGeh1kkhKCOA7OPo7kD332IVPtokEJRsDY_ScUkbYJ-_ab6Kk2oXOnsD8KLJSXA4L06m8iKzZ9HwpeHXgWRxqu8-e3vrn7vEtBkI32wJHEJLuggRRlYvohAi9x0QyGgAlvDzpNLk0QN5FhHrhosXBuiG8oFWaPZdTRMMeOEm4dRlmQB_x03uU6MtdQmh3wWizkOoUKTTP0vep2IwDph-IULTxALj6Pcb8Y6PlkroWyO0dUGd3wkdwMyr7cM04hp6x8YPVGeJnwsItyLGSw0D9R-_qlAoDRHkco89HfIxukEDsAA_b6n7WsEN4RrH0Bh7n_7wjZ5fEEU6OcLt76JtUKiBGQQ00ktJFg75LLuu7lIHcQUu).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: my stomach just DROPPED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Look at this Politico headline:

| |

---
| | | I was worried when experts said control of the House could go either way...

I was worried when I heard House Democrats outraised us by over $30M...

I was worried when they released their target list of 17 GOP-held seats...

**_[But my stomach DROPPED when I read this headline from Politico:](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1w9_aLVDLc2A1g-q-PZ9Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvcUGP0TbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvZW9tLXN0b21hY2gtZHJvcHBlZC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1Jnh1bnY9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1VwNzcGNCCmXVySjbZQ8yW2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "But my stomach DROPPED when I read this headline from Politico:")_**

---

This is devastating.

On top of that, the Biden-Harris campaign put together an unprecedented Liberal fundraiser headlined by Joe Biden, Bill Clinton, AND Barack Obama. It's never happened before!

We are running out of time to save our plans for defending our Conservative House Majority, retaking the Senate, and sending President Trump back to the White House. That's why I'm calling in every favor I can to rally a last-ditch fundraising surge to make up the critical ground we've lost.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm respectfully asking you to pitch in a few bucks before our path to victory vanishes into thin air. We're desperate at this point. I wish that weren't the case but it is. Do you think you could step up when it matters the most?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1w9_aLVDLc2A1g-q-PZ9Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvcUGP0TbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvZW9tLXN0b21hY2gtZHJvcHBlZC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1Jnh1bnY9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1VwNzcGNCCmXVySjbZQ8yW2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "I’m respectfully asking you to pitch in a few bucks before our path to victory vanishes into thin air. We’re desperate at this point. I wish that weren't the case but it is. Do you think you could step up when it matters the most?")**_
---
**[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1w9_aLVDLc2A1g-q-PZ9Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvcUGP0TbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvZW9tLXN0b21hY2gtZHJvcHBlZC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1Jnh1bnY9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1VwNzcGNCCmXVySjbZQ8yW2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)[**YES >>**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1w9_aLVDLc2A1g-q-PZ9Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvcUGP0TbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvZW9tLXN0b21hY2gtZHJvcHBlZC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1Jnh1bnY9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1VwNzcGNCCmXVySjbZQ8yW2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_[**NO >>**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1w9_aLVDLc2A1g-q-PZ9Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvcUGP0TbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvZW9tLXN0b21hY2gtZHJvcHBlZC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1Jnh1bnY9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1VwNzcGNCCmXVySjbZQ8yW2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**
---
Look,

I completely understand it's hard to see how a few bucks can make a difference when Biden just raised that by a factor of a THOUSAND. I'll explain.

Take the 17 GOP-held seats for example. These are some of the most competitive races in the country - where even a few hundred votes can mean the difference between victory and defeat. And we are actively working to win all of them by...
✅ Setting up Battle Stations in more than a dozen purple districts
✅ Investing in early get-out-the-vote efforts in battleground states
✅ Recruiting an army of volunteers and doorknockers
✅ Contact 5,000,000 swing voters before Election Day
Those are the kinds of critical campaign operations your generous contribution will help cover.

**Every dollar helps contact more voters, turn out more Republicans, and keep our ads on the airwaves. That 's how we win. That's how we save our Conservative House Majority, win back the Senate, and earn President Donald J. Trump FOUR MORE YEARS.**

_But none of that is possible if Joe Biden and the Democrats lap us in the fundraising race. _

_**[So what do you say? Can we count on your badly needed contribution?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1w9_aLVDLc2A1g-q-PZ9Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvcUGP0TbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvZW9tLXN0b21hY2gtZHJvcHBlZC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQwMjI1X1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNDUyOTY1LTE3NTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1Jnh1bnY9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwMjI1VwNzcGNCCmXVySjbZQ8yW2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "So what do you say? name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84f427550a924366bc0f294230837420&_e=0pxot7hUFiWkn8E9jQxQqNkdI_Zb6yTXxgCKDtAJdExKz3V1K7TNKINyQtb7re8iKSCTQ9nZNsArsPJaBuo93-k-VZTcnReFdEjdsVkpkjAhX56fVu_bdkOpHTOeO0pYT-kbZ4ZDUhBDtwFiOLUtzVbU0nlJ51Vsbcxw6OXP1pYXCMIKe-jhEJ3Cw1ZRoym3eCH5Vr1ZDmxbLwdy5C0Z9KSz2dQGKzwlFK_sKywABsUGH0ZuLl3VTe57kDCElRBzgdhfsOHEkFCRXVyPPAHdhM6SldU69EwhKAKGI8ysZdzAmb9ynZOjHacEQqw8OIRIKpVsWfCfe5nls1Pe8gl0_B8ouSOzHNEyptDD5lb4jpMxauH__U2-dWDITcredhMXow910OzQPACv5B8CFxQkjkWO3Kff0eShD9-gPQkell5O-ohwrWqZy1ujgoUctcQk)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84f427550a924366bc0f294230837420&_e=0pxot7hUFiWkn8E9jQxQqNkdI_Zb6yTXxgCKDtAJdExKz3V1K7TNKINyQtb7re8iKSCTQ9nZNsArsPJaBuo93-k-VZTcnReFdEjdsVkpkjAhX56fVu_bdkOpHTOeO0pYT-kbZ4ZDUhBDtwFiOLUtzVbU0nlJ51Vsbcxw6OXP1pYXCMIKe-jhEJ3Cw1ZRoym3eCH5Vr1ZDmxbLwdy5C0Z9KSz2dQGKzwlFK_sKywABsUGH0ZuLl3VTe57kDCElRBzgdhfsOHEkFCRXVyPPAHdhM6SldU69EwhKAKGI8ysZdy3QlLP6dMgpgg1c4obtRl5Puh-ZAseGZIejL_2tiqBVF0Ao2nm1k5T-Zz8pa9ev04FrZdBVz6dHZNoYeEO9EDo1uviSc5k8_u5y0IPC9G6F1FhiuH_ZNzqeNiJDpkOxgy8wa-0OMco4reCICTSr-RA)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84f427550a924366bc0f294230837420&_e=0pxot7hUFiWkn8E9jQxQqNkdI_Zb6yTXxgCKDtAJdExKz3V1K7TNKINyQtb7re8iKSCTQ9nZNsArsPJaBuo93-k-VZTcnReFdEjdsVkpkjAhX56fVu_bdkOpHTOeO0pYT-kbZ4ZDUhBDtwFiOLUtzVbU0nlJ51Vsbcxw6OXP1pYXCMIKe-jhEJ3Cw1ZRoym3eCH5Vr1ZDmxbLwdy5C0Z9KSz2dQGKzwlFK_sKywABsUGH0ZuLl3VTe57kDCElRBzgdhfsOHEkFCRXVyPPAHdhM6SldU69EwhKAKGI8ysZdyefmE95Xdm3IGRAZOPqkSMKuC4d0SwDtR4CgYbrE23DZ_rYEMB3MEeXqmlvrtKfuz127fPQBr1kwJnJoHCRxSiMOfWKMGIA2sLgb-X04Toxsaih6V1ozciu6385lEKSVMeRBD5r__mng6LS-lp66sF)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84f427550a924366bc0f294230837420&_e=0pxot7hUFiWkn8E9jQxQqNkdI_Zb6yTXxgCKDtAJdExKz3V1K7TNKINyQtb7re8iKSCTQ9nZNsArsPJaBuo93-k-VZTcnReFdEjdsVkpkjAhX56fVu_bdkOpHTOeO0pYT-kbZ4ZDUhBDtwFiOLUtzVbU0nlJ51Vsbcxw6OXP1pYXCMIKe-jhEJ3Cw1ZRoym3eCH5Vr1ZDmxbLwdy5C0Z9KSz2dQGKzwlFK_sKywABsUGH0ZuLl3VTe57kDCElRBzgdhfsOHEkFCRXVyPPAHdhM6SldU69EwhKAKGI8ysZdyB2cYVVz5LyTmv3CHTV0JokPoehR6TLYqumH0DLFF6S5Uc2HUy_XbuTdj3KUuAx4kpuOAdGdjm23ky2Maa9zgfdXsOM6BWi4gGE1RYPzVLlQLQrlrHtTe0muh8pU9smgLauOllwYUfVLhRpC0udS41).

clean_body: His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
