name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Extremists are trying to take away our right to choose (again)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07b9f161-c763-468f-98b6-91a135299e46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Peter — I'm furious. Just last month, Florida activists secured hundreds of thousands of signatures to put codifying reproductive rights on the ballot this November. But now, far-right extremists are SUING to remove this question from the ballot. Unfortunately, this is just the latest example of out-of-touch extremists trying to silence Florida voters. From abortion rights to voting rights, whether in the state house in Tallahassee or on the Senate floor in Washington, our leaders are forcing their extreme agenda on Florida families. [Ya no mas — enough is enough. I refuse to stand for it. That’s why I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott, restore abortion rights nationwide, and give Florida the leadership that we deserve. And now, with all eyes on our state, I'm counting on you to stand with me: Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action’s before midnight tonight to help me flip Florida blue and fight for families?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c4d4c7d-374b-4ebb-aba8-1ad73a62913a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f7779d0-f4d6-468b-a792-2a29bd62ef6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| It's no secret why far-right extremists are working so hard to take this question off the ballot: They know that Florida is ready to follow states like Ohio and Kansas to reject our radical abortion ban and choose to protect our right to privacy, our right to choice, and our most basic freedoms. No matter how many lawsuits they file or lies they spread, the GOP can't change it: Abortion is going to be the driving force at the ballot box this November. And that's why Rick Scott and his campaign are absolutely spiraling. He knows his record on choice is nothing short of abysmal. That's why he's panicking, and calling me a liar to the press every chance he gets. Peter, let me make this clear: Rick Scott co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions, just like the statewide one that his radical friend Ron DeSantis signed here in Florida last year. I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom. [I know that we can defeat Rick Scott this fall, but only if people like you believe in Florida and invest in our campaign. So I'm asking one last time: Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action’s to help me defend our Senate majority, flip Florida blue, and restore abortion access across all 50 states?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b72a0cf-f344-41f0-9c0e-75f30dfaa497/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Debbie

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. But now, far-right extremists are SUING to remove this question from the ballot. Unfortunately, this is just the latest example of out-of-touch extremists trying to silence Florida voters. From abortion rights to voting rights, whether in the state house in Tallahassee or on the Senate floor in Washington, our leaders are forcing their extreme agenda on Florida families. | | | | | It's no secret why far-right extremists are working so hard to take this question off the ballot: They know that Florida is ready to follow states like Ohio and Kansas to reject our radical abortion ban and choose to protect our right to privacy, our right to choice, and our most basic freedoms. No matter how many lawsuits they file or lies they spread, the GOP can't change it: Abortion is going to be the driving force at the ballot box this November. And that's why Rick Scott and his campaign are absolutely spiraling. He knows his record on choice is nothing short of abysmal. That's why he's panicking, and calling me a liar to the press every chance he gets. Peter, let me make this clear: Rick Scott co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions, just like the statewide one that his radical friend Ron DeSantis signed here in Florida last year. I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom. | | | Thank you so much, Debbie | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

name: National Gun Owner
subject: 69 USD credit activated for dpwillis67@gmail.com
body:
Get your no cost Dash Cam, while they're still available.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3690/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/18423182d9bdaeabf25f51ede9fa64550904bda1) here at any time. February 25th, 2024 \- Breaking News - Firearms Reviews - 2nd Amendment - Ammo & More -. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | \- This email is to notify you of a **$69 credit** being activated on your account.

This is NOT a refund -- **you're receiving this credit as a _complimentary gift_** and "thank you" for being a loyal subscriber.

Your credit is being issued to cover the retail cost of _Tactical USA's_ **best selling Dash Cam.**

Normally $69... [this special link applies your credit and makes it FREE for you today.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3690/6374453/00fbe37fc4f11f474c4161870646d58eec216cbd/18423182d9bdaeabf25f51ede9fa64550904bda1)

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3690/6374453/00fbe37fc4f11f474c4161870646d58eec216cbd/18423182d9bdaeabf25f51ede9fa64550904bda1)

**_Why are you receiving this credit?_**

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ had some extras of these Dash Cams in their warehouse...

And they agreed to let us cover the cost and give them to our subscribers as Free gifts today.

[Just confirm your info here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3690/6374453/00fbe37fc4f11f474c4161870646d58eec216cbd/18423182d9bdaeabf25f51ede9fa64550904bda1) and it's yours for just the cost of stamps.

These little automatic Dashcams have a ton of uses:

* Stop fraudulent claims against your insurance
* Prove you weren't at fault in vehicular accidents
* Protect yourself from Police Misconduct

They also shoot in **full 1080p HD** , and have a crystal clear **night-vision** mode as well.

The ** _only problem_** is... if they run out of inventory...

Your credit to get one Free may expire.

Last I checked, there were 382 left.

But this email just went out to over 159,000 other subscribers.

So you might not have much time left to grab one.

[Use your credit to get your FREE Dash Cam here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3690/6374453/00fbe37fc4f11f474c4161870646d58eec216cbd/18423182d9bdaeabf25f51ede9fa64550904bda1), while they're still available.

**Thank You.**

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3ed2492933ef45a9be1adf9210c3708f&_e=kGW9KM8SEM-4kVkT2rIegvEBOO7EeR_DFAJ47Bn6gKqYLuu0RfuYjBuImD6VdPPUoI0pDwjsn0iVZ_Kr3T1RFRzIr2NsnETlvsayBdY4970br89b9uCokpWZnmDLGAsD3jKxfY6IaeNlbDY97j2s7diZO4_t9_SaKUBIZrZDztC-XCmSt7IGuEHqGDUcENGYnDT0Jk6A63el4mt84ZrBtSyme9FCUa5_qNDZZnktof_AtNXnltOgHd6PtL0kaXQc4B5izR0L8ShHQy9ai9Lp2F-Q2ljR8jUoTqjyr0AcscyyXdYOp6zFusUCRtsyqKXY4shiczSn5DFgN0DV9sAhWENJiGXbr1I5Lm-GNMvazi6HkrUuT3TccU91i0EIfBvnjtd5cZQXXovT7EeuAyvLng%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3ed2492933ef45a9be1adf9210c3708f&_e=kGW9KM8SEM-4kVkT2rIegvEBOO7EeR_DFAJ47Bn6gKqYLuu0RfuYjBuImD6VdPPUoI0pDwjsn0iVZ_Kr3T1RFRzIr2NsnETlvsayBdY4970br89b9uCokpWZnmDLGAsD3jKxfY6IaeNlbDY97j2s7diZO4_t9_SaKUBIZrZDztC-XCmSt7IGuEHqGDUcENGYnDT0Jk6A63el4mt84ZrBtSyme9FCUa5_qNDZZnktof8GIzACG584OvyPcc87i3_x9PY2lgJx4-gMM--EIV7v3ebfuklHU2JsGC0mlJdgJ0FpHCstHEJpNn_Oi3reanA2HLzfkE3T7uijKZnr4Pji_PGW07LbnpzjQ2jkI_fodSSmS8Soy3ZXWFhpRnLUX2mfsrkTL8pwTniDJb1QC-aKSQ%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3ed2492933ef45a9be1adf9210c3708f&_e=kGW9KM8SEM-4kVkT2rIegvEBOO7EeR_DFAJ47Bn6gKqYLuu0RfuYjBuImD6VdPPUoI0pDwjsn0iVZ_Kr3T1RFRzIr2NsnETlvsayBdY4970br89b9uCokpWZnmDLGAsD3jKxfY6IaeNlbDY97j2s7diZO4_t9_SaKUBIZrZDztC-XCmSt7IGuEHqGDUcENGYnDT0Jk6A63el4mt84ZrBtSyme9FCUa5_qNDZZnktof8Sg4AUMsBqsRcK6tSTJGBQ5MpZ3v5VSsTgbDiBpgj3TW7WWtX746Josed8EA2Kzi1KdrMlV_BEPTJw5I79pQBaM3vSWgy7aiA-qz3SOcXUIeFdt52JhUGVZDOZ0DJ8G-rX_7KXtZ_HAkjwe1XoYvHJbvPhY-LpP-k7PSqDH7MfaQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3ed2492933ef45a9be1adf9210c3708f&_e=kGW9KM8SEM-4kVkT2rIegvEBOO7EeR_DFAJ47Bn6gKqYLuu0RfuYjBuImD6VdPPUoI0pDwjsn0iVZ_Kr3T1RFRzIr2NsnETlvsayBdY4970br89b9uCokpWZnmDLGAsD3jKxfY6IaeNlbDY97j2s7diZO4_t9_SaKUBIZrZDztC-XCmSt7IGuEHqGDUcENGYnDT0Jk6A63el4mt84ZrBtSyme9FCUa5_qNDZZnktof9lKEsiQDkdWp-U2QZ3m8_Gg3ssFexpjqc8Vaqa6O28H9CUSrHWvuAK-B29H5pDPoj7LxOx2xO_0LhLTtF3xu6HdMaeKYortYpGmurRbO8iQ0LMA9ZNFUNkvxX5PAtXS5Rhn9e7ZSaxr6YnBAGdFUssHLZofAyvPYKdbztdkAxCIA%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c121e7e43464e02803e88ad5e7f1844&_e=-_V98nY0IwC7sw4JANsoFYQcjp7rVQZej09DaWGMDxdt9RPKTdx3ZYGITr5E66gRSoJbw21a85iUTcmeTda8YnWhcCFAFUyJsIz6D8WYZahItx41GuYDiGrkRlTOqwUMKH6LT-6i9PveLOcjgzmYTnrEa0CH8yrNA_Jhrea2K7CIGt0zVZJqDyxzW_KSGtgr_JVchNI4h2mmZ_H_J8lfLnHBmNRDzjJNuJY7iP6sj2JX4dcbRdhLAzP5r-fluYZWkeNE0ARaw-JF8-glZVb1gZCvdGQ97yqF81DzFzZC9r1vCXTYglOMWRuuTc4DROvfjz9kmYTTPaT1DDVW7yiLg_wcy-JMmN_HmGflFdtuTJ2wl6dg7lzu1ZfJTKdmlGNxjl6N0A6S-93oig8CN5t2NdKuTIM6TJP0RYo1GnXtcmV8kjhwRsNnyic2PMnUR32o)

| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c121e7e43464e02803e88ad5e7f1844&_e=-_V98nY0IwC7sw4JANsoFYQcjp7rVQZej09DaWGMDxdt9RPKTdx3ZYGITr5E66gRSoJbw21a85iUTcmeTda8YnWhcCFAFUyJsIz6D8WYZahItx41GuYDiGrkRlTOqwUMKH6LT-6i9PveLOcjgzmYTnrEa0CH8yrNA_Jhrea2K7CIGt0zVZJqDyxzW_KSGtgr_JVchNI4h2mmZ_H_J8lfLnHBmNRDzjJNuJY7iP6sj2JX4dcbRdhLAzP5r-fluYZWkeNE0ARaw-JF8-glZVb1gZCvdGQ97yqF81DzFzZC9r2gNRKI45fs55WEFbO7sc_zVSOlVImdx9lUoVQRClAf39k6fIdYYVXLJPSPHXU2e3SbJOM8dy-Vp6quOXyHWog_DL6kwVPHFFVzGQr0nzM6U2IuFJ9sXGYb8tbtlvwrPId-_h39twNvW2EET2mrHOvT)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c121e7e43464e02803e88ad5e7f1844&_e=-_V98nY0IwC7sw4JANsoFYQcjp7rVQZej09DaWGMDxdt9RPKTdx3ZYGITr5E66gRSoJbw21a85iUTcmeTda8YnWhcCFAFUyJsIz6D8WYZahItx41GuYDiGrkRlTOqwUMKH6LT-6i9PveLOcjgzmYTnrEa0CH8yrNA_Jhrea2K7CIGt0zVZJqDyxzW_KSGtgr_JVchNI4h2mmZ_H_J8lfLnHBmNRDzjJNuJY7iP6sj2JX4dcbRdhLAzP5r-fluYZWkeNE0ARaw-JF8-glZVb1gZCvdGQ97yqF81DzFzZC9r3l6jZ2spM-r64DZrekhVKoGEFgG9paRAu-JM8SNRNducHTj5YZ-K0lbg-UyyWYkD3y2w35DhHfn6AD9jbk4QQyDkFObJa7xtEXC02x-5-nMPsSMUNjKiD3Eh4JnqXWr_1V97j-IqjGsEPmN0DLdQcA)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c121e7e43464e02803e88ad5e7f1844&_e=-_V98nY0IwC7sw4JANsoFYQcjp7rVQZej09DaWGMDxdt9RPKTdx3ZYGITr5E66gRSoJbw21a85iUTcmeTda8YnWhcCFAFUyJsIz6D8WYZahItx41GuYDiGrkRlTOqwUMKH6LT-6i9PveLOcjgzmYTnrEa0CH8yrNA_Jhrea2K7CIGt0zVZJqDyxzW_KSGtgr_JVchNI4h2mmZ_H_J8lfLnHBmNRDzjJNuJY7iP6sj2JX4dcbRdhLAzP5r-fluYZWkeNE0ARaw-JF8-glZVb1gZCvdGQ97yqF81DzFzZC9r1PLVKtyEPCfuODpHZcSwq8SlrvECNB3C_C8tIFBOMvgNBIjSvHXplxezqbiohbqh6cuiw60vGITflP4Fbi-jRlcGtXWhFzFGVp3_-Zo7v3zO2qPeu3sFp0JkibWDLV6PY3wTc7C2zT47w9iabpyJEJ).

Best regards,

Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6df064490fa4ea4b801b3f19efc4074&_e=1SodL_DhhtQiwYbBElj3suCzlZUrY3QFBd8cxmmp1XB9eNs3USCwxR2ynKFXtU9F3wk-jXN2CzOlviZWu89kJsLwx1yhe-XxZ2183zBkUTJ-TdPHxoFJNS_e5WCQ79hMpdXZcOwuEGqp1LBLup35Ocd9oxrHnkO2MyUXOxzJK5mCmbP_1GtSq4Ndi_8e_RyydB-_Q_absF-R-cTBNiJ9EmWn1my8khSxn7PTzRuKBUqbYCkWOhuOH5wlUhjAauBbzXX8agRpGeGTlPHe7dkwy0lojNeFI4ExvmA--BAFeIgo1d61p6Ms9aL9zUVwTVZuIj56hHntQL_BzekJHvpBFCSjfybiektxBRlU0KAry5wcgZABPI0YdvMdCR-D2p1q0Z0FQSM-7AC3NDo4gMqanA%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6df064490fa4ea4b801b3f19efc4074&_e=1SodL_DhhtQiwYbBElj3suCzlZUrY3QFBd8cxmmp1XB9eNs3USCwxR2ynKFXtU9F3wk-jXN2CzOlviZWu89kJsLwx1yhe-XxZ2183zBkUTJ-TdPHxoFJNS_e5WCQ79hMpdXZcOwuEGqp1LBLup35Ocd9oxrHnkO2MyUXOxzJK5mCmbP_1GtSq4Ndi_8e_RyydB-_Q_absF-R-cTBNiJ9EmWn1my8khSxn7PTzRuKBUqPNiFbclXGYv63rBfwPRw0yORIyGaSaNel8Ijegj-cUq7hK0V0TIlNfVyKKEsPG16sWTnJdEfPY_ewbh5zT5KxvG3ZjNNK2ADnq-GejScx-QK15wjYUoHEtQ2PoJoDP1PHs2ZAIVUdHJoMY5_dwHDsWwbeHJ-LBfhNzcQTbiHReg%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6df064490fa4ea4b801b3f19efc4074&_e=1SodL_DhhtQiwYbBElj3suCzlZUrY3QFBd8cxmmp1XB9eNs3USCwxR2ynKFXtU9F3wk-jXN2CzOlviZWu89kJsLwx1yhe-XxZ2183zBkUTJ-TdPHxoFJNS_e5WCQ79hMpdXZcOwuEGqp1LBLup35Ocd9oxrHnkO2MyUXOxzJK5mCmbP_1GtSq4Ndi_8e_RyydB-_Q_absF-R-cTBNiJ9EmWn1my8khSxn7PTzRuKBUqCblt_LTzHfcDoJs9YI9EYaVBfYcUuHSyEd8ks8leB7NrU7tijKEGOC60zpK4cjBXYTmn9QpiiS2vJTSdYlOB5bVR0aj_AGO_s94D8cnEJAPH3s0MU7egbWyi-36jHWEstIRQLNJjejFplmYD5F35UU9DbNhHa1u4g86Lq_iENjg%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6df064490fa4ea4b801b3f19efc4074&_e=1SodL_DhhtQiwYbBElj3suCzlZUrY3QFBd8cxmmp1XB9eNs3USCwxR2ynKFXtU9F3wk-jXN2CzOlviZWu89kJsLwx1yhe-XxZ2183zBkUTJ-TdPHxoFJNS_e5WCQ79hMpdXZcOwuEGqp1LBLup35Ocd9oxrHnkO2MyUXOxzJK5mCmbP_1GtSq4Ndi_8e_RyydB-_Q_absF-R-cTBNiJ9EmWn1my8khSxn7PTzRuKBUp9iz7Poza-bDZjL9cSOZ6ICuUDZpF0lyunpCFW3qZm0r9PArsEGkOR0fZUn_f47DZoohQ68_mu6n05TCd3E6euolKhyBufj0kr0D3I0DSxw6QU01T6yuKvtSzcbJt3Jqqsdyuyu62FfGhyu-vAkKemHOqX0Tb2Yc7gcrOcuKPJjw%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6df064490fa4ea4b801b3f19efc4074&_e=1SodL_DhhtQiwYbBElj3suCzlZUrY3QFBd8cxmmp1XB9eNs3USCwxR2ynKFXtU9F3wk-jXN2CzOlviZWu89kJsLwx1yhe-XxZ2183zBkUTJ-TdPHxoFJNS_e5WCQ79hMpdXZcOwuEGqp1LBLup35Ocd9oxrHnkO2MyUXOxzJK5mCmbP_1GtSq4Ndi_8e_RyydB-_Q_absF-R-cTBNiJ9EmWn1my8khSxn7PTzRuKBUp7EOJ6htC9sipRkB2IARXAJT1Mhy9T4NOGB08YcCI3nICC7QF1eH1KErsGcV6DPkSw4jt5eE1zgSOSjJqBglfvUu7oY-oLiDAtFIHz5RDaQmegjLeIxGEOfKn0WnNLdEfn7IN4MEqMPJzYP2iFEgpyyIQdJXAsXggLQw2OdKdpgA%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: my stomach just DROPPED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Look at this Politico headline:

| |

---
| | | I was worried when experts said control of the House could go either way...

I was worried when I heard House Democrats outraised us by over $30M...

I was worried when they released their target list of 17 GOP-held seats...

**_[But my stomach DROPPED when I read this headline from Politico:](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkb_O4yAQxJ8Gd1iw_DEuXHxS5C6n0zVXIgwbh5PBFsZJ7u1PPinV16Rd7W9nZuf31V5dXGKef7iEQ0m27LY-7O7dQkNZtw2DBQaSMqCgLG_CoHvoDG9w4B0zRhspRHMfTBD6pmVvpJ-4MEIodLyfjMDAu5uXTRzOOwxAcZBK6tarybC-9zfNHEfWEckKbse0RO9ycn_WEuvfNmNtluFe67YT8UVgJDDu6I-C7TPmgqH1ayIwVnSJnrbjjgRGXBPd65qcv79znKwYy8mWmGciLrUcSEAfNVnv0ubinIm4vG3an1_015W3nAvdK1u5VNBrRXmnNAGNL1tj-Hz_v8qaK-Z6Sj9oSfSNEtCvIz--zZsyhO0ZlyXu-vzPnFxczsBN_aCrfwEAAP__HjSQaw "But my stomach DROPPED when I read this headline from Politico:")_**

---
| [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkb_O4yAQxJ8Gd1iw_DEuXHxS5C6n0zVXIgwbh5PBFsZJ7u1PPinV16Rd7W9nZuf31V5dXGKef7iEQ0m27LY-7O7dQkNZtw2DBQaSMqCgLG_CoHvoDG9w4B0zRhspRHMfTBD6pmVvpJ-4MEIodLyfjMDAu5uXTRzOOwxAcZBK6tarybC-9zfNHEfWEckKbse0RO9ycn_WEuvfNmNtluFe67YT8UVgJDDu6I-C7TPmgqH1ayIwVnSJnrbjjgRGXBPd65qcv79znKwYy8mWmGciLrUcSEAfNVnv0ubinIm4vG3an1_015W3nAvdK1u5VNBrRXmnNAGNL1tj-Hz_v8qaK-Z6Sj9oSfSNEtCvIz--zZsyhO0ZlyXu-vzPnFxczsBN_aCrfwEAAP__HjSQaw "Politico: Biden campaign touts $42M raised in January")
---

This is devastating.

On top of that, the Biden-Harris campaign put together an unprecedented Liberal fundraiser headlined by Joe Biden, Bill Clinton, AND Barack Obama. It's never happened before!

We are running out of time to save our plans for defending our Conservative House Majority, retaking the Senate, and sending President Trump back to the White House. That's why I'm calling in every favor I can to rally a last-ditch fundraising surge to make up the critical ground we've lost.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm respectfully asking you to pitch in a few bucks before our path to victory vanishes into thin air. We're desperate at this point. I wish that weren't the case but it is. Do you think you could step up when it matters the most?](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkb_O4yAQxJ8Gd1iw_DEuXHxS5C6n0zVXIgwbh5PBFsZJ7u1PPinV16Rd7W9nZuf31V5dXGKef7iEQ0m27LY-7O7dQkNZtw2DBQaSMqCgLG_CoHvoDG9w4B0zRhspRHMfTBD6pmVvpJ-4MEIodLyfjMDAu5uXTRzOOwxAcZBK6tarybC-9zfNHEfWEckKbse0RO9ycn_WEuvfNmNtluFe67YT8UVgJDDu6I-C7TPmgqH1ayIwVnSJnrbjjgRGXBPd65qcv79znKwYy8mWmGciLrUcSEAfNVnv0ubinIm4vG3an1_015W3nAvdK1u5VNBrRXmnNAGNL1tj-Hz_v8qaK-Z6Sj9oSfSNEtCvIz--zZsyhO0ZlyXu-vzPnFxczsBN_aCrfwEAAP__HjSQaw "I’m respectfully asking you to pitch in a few bucks before our path to victory vanishes into thin air. We’re desperate at this point. I wish that weren't the case but it is. Do you think you could step up when it matters the most?")**_

Look,

I completely understand it's hard to see how a few bucks can make a difference when Biden just raised that by a factor of a THOUSAND. I'll explain.

Take the 17 GOP-held seats for example. These are some of the most competitive races in the country - where even a few hundred votes can mean the difference between victory and defeat. And we are actively working to win all of them by...
✅ Setting up Battle Stations in more than a dozen purple districts
✅ Investing in early get-out-the-vote efforts in battleground states
✅ Recruiting an army of volunteers and doorknockers
✅ Contact 5,000,000 swing voters before Election Day
Those are the kinds of critical campaign operations your generous contribution will help cover.

**Every dollar helps contact more voters, turn out more Republicans, and keep our ads on the airwaves. That 's how we win. That's how we save our Conservative House Majority, win back the Senate, and earn President Donald J. Trump FOUR MORE YEARS.**

_But none of that is possible if Joe Biden and the Democrats lap us in the fundraising race. _

_**[So what do you say? name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Uphold inerrancy of scripture with TPUSA Faith
body:
A spiritual battle is raging in our culture – its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fa561ad3e744be48d6e546b3d9ca4e0&_e=Vf7v1Lp_psFuPKG81x0s-Rvr-qZ5Wa7qu0P_yPsGkdF3ye1m9b0E12J9bnY0u783tn_HeNeoy8cDwA026iCZNBGUNmEG8sEdg2fgKvho2U6kJWjTuueheelvGTg60ReW3TC1FavgjXRInS2EkTGwxsjaTcqwVnatfAw7NVnvTnJ0-yH6BO3q1wnxhK0DdqVL2UqYyC95gUpoAyM2Z1z7vsShP-cz8ZAAtIThzH4ixsAv3ExRAhIQCwZ0bMUrXnJSSB4du2MlUcDceOmU0yXRSx0nQoR8q7Y8NiXLqpizcPc%3D)
---
Friend, A spiritual battle is raging in our culture – its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us. TPUSA Faith is on the frontlines trying to make a difference in this spiritual battle. **Jeremiah 29:7 says, “But seek the welfare of the city where I have sent you ... for in its welfare you will find your welfare.”** This verse embodies our mission at TPUSA Faith, and we believe it's a _call for Christians to actively engage with America_. I founded TPUSA Faith – a branch of TPUSA – to EMPOWER believers to live out their faith boldly... CHALLENGE the secular culture... and UPHOLD the inerrancy of scripture. One way we do this is through our **Pastor Summits** , where we gather pastors from across all FIFTY states to inspire, encourage, and equip them to stand firmly for biblical truth and the Kingdom. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79675412/457192978/-1997846893?refcode=jtk1348-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q2OTNjMy1kZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iofQuj7MJ_XiRbQGpZwrrIIrAlC5Z6foxFAHM5dMpW0=)

$8.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $8 as we come up on eight weeks into 2024**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79675413/457192979/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=8&refcode=jtk1348-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q2OTNjMy1kZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iofQuj7MJ_XiRbQGpZwrrIIrAlC5Z6foxFAHM5dMpW0=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we continue on into 2024, I must keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $8 for my midnight deadline to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79675414/457192980/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=8&refcode=jtk1348-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q2OTNjMy1kZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iofQuj7MJ_XiRbQGpZwrrIIrAlC5Z6foxFAHM5dMpW0=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79675415/457192981/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=8&refcode=jtk1348-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q2OTNjMy1kZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iofQuj7MJ_XiRbQGpZwrrIIrAlC5Z6foxFAHM5dMpW0=)
---
Thank you for all of your support.

Letitia
With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

name: James Comer
subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=acda8594a6a841bf91e9f077f31d76ee&_e=PZGty2m8-Gijtgmvot0aWFAizdb4-H-BKDtZXFSB5YbhmWDJ-E4vHb4kA6cSlzhnXNtUl4FGZkHO-sWiYHKNKcdZfmiG4uKoHoqrUVeP42TndOVHsDVfB7CId3jJWn8WxxigaZ2T2geJHbjEt4NKJ0nhfa4rs_ZN_QvQvsPxL7A13Tp9FrocE-TTeu61ViTSukIv4S47iawiFG8trehPuapFKaqzkFSmcZBT1MgTKUuGoRpl0C7l3AbXFOUmxzfIvfSxyQ9qFtcvYRuOz11Sd9DG2y1oAUZ6kBAvFPMPK4711_pcEmhrHcmkT_MCm9BIHM9HduVz68UDwc7nQHS34pnfkzlA5n-skvafmaSPDod49086D-XLpB64uBOpR-MV)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=acda8594a6a841bf91e9f077f31d76ee&_e=PZGty2m8-Gijtgmvot0aWFAizdb4-H-BKDtZXFSB5YbhmWDJ-E4vHb4kA6cSlzhnXNtUl4FGZkHO-sWiYHKNKcdZfmiG4uKoHoqrUVeP42TndOVHsDVfB7CId3jJWn8WxxigaZ2T2geJHbjEt4NKJ0nhfa4rs_ZN_QvQvsPxL7A13Tp9FrocE-TTeu61ViTSukIv4S47iawiFG8trehPuapFKaqzkFSmcZBT1MgTKUvZ20EjtBHKp5DftaDa2v6e3OjuCAaoQfeAzf9iDXvA9NbNVGSY9IvGHtF5yynJZr05vKVPKt5IdkVQ6mrwZHNfYrG3yoWcKbbpn15G1JbtnPcKhihRjf2eBjOYYcGDKvXpQUYCTfoqDMvTGyEHVtTB)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=acda8594a6a841bf91e9f077f31d76ee&_e=PZGty2m8-Gijtgmvot0aWFAizdb4-H-BKDtZXFSB5YbhmWDJ-E4vHb4kA6cSlzhnXNtUl4FGZkHO-sWiYHKNKcdZfmiG4uKoHoqrUVeP42TndOVHsDVfB7CId3jJWn8WxxigaZ2T2geJHbjEt4NKJ0nhfa4rs_ZN_QvQvsPxL7A13Tp9FrocE-TTeu61ViTSukIv4S47iawiFG8trehPuapFKaqzkFSmcZBT1MgTKUtmlhPHITNyCSsxyt_D5j3UdrOZW7lXQ2ripPbFokuS1XvBbR7yKKFB0kl2Kh0YX0DQQqM4aHlucFre272y0tmDdGxBvVsSUsUtecAxeCevpw-KTQN--HgU-xu4K7pGCW28XK5GaHZKHeO1-qfb91pc)

As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **

clean_body: In the Biden Family | | Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN conspiracy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. Peter,
**URGENT ALERT**
Lawmakers in the State of Kansas are changing ballot access rules: [Legal Action May Be Required](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=urgent_kansas_2_25_un_nd3&n=3)
As it stands right now, our campaign for President is tasked with obtaining and certifying 5,000 signatures from citizens across the Sunflower State.
But, if the new bill that passed the House passes the Senate and heads to the Governor’s office for signature, our campaign will be required to collect 21,000 signatures.
_These are the kinds of dirty politics that has Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. running for office in the first place!_
If this stands, our campaign will be forced once again (like we did in Utah) to bring legal action, legal action that costs dollars and cents.

body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65beaee37a1b448a9613152a5a1ecc30&_e=iBSlYbD2D_XR4_JvdLyAqWvxVZQJCFJS9sBDoPgQwiFUoXz8viTsWc0kEaKU1yTDjWm2kO2E0EdTsOEBB2-0kACBHq2sPtsLYsvk-EwEcxdRbbG8Nl_FYfRet8MG432h6XKZwOIsr5w0FHx2wDEEmCpvXXkqSIIiNT5KNhsZmHoK_7D63xmDQ3x3VHNQJ6K1YyhDEDHE6ULnHh3jkS5w6vdlvPNk_5HPFV2KwtHBIxwv7P3NJlmrArVRd3Emlxn-nybyRznYkySIUVeNQ5WcWRAna7YojrbNOyodgzktlOnEVTpfKVgX4dI-1853bzjXoITKhQvrLYUHu325qSnRQ2eqS9z689cJnuQH8tZTc5un0q-FM93L2ftIfmT0RImDniKSJ9vNcMnqywT-WbOJ1mK9rCiWr-eqovfAH8y2R5EHybrBDo292JvhYMwRaxYBEomrNB5aKGLctBB1ygM8KA%3D%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65beaee37a1b448a9613152a5a1ecc30&_e=iBSlYbD2D_XR4_JvdLyAqWvxVZQJCFJS9sBDoPgQwiFUoXz8viTsWc0kEaKU1yTDjWm2kO2E0EdTsOEBB2-0kACBHq2sPtsLYsvk-EwEcxdRbbG8Nl_FYfRet8MG432h6XKZwOIsr5w0FHx2wDEEmCpvXXkqSIIiNT5KNhsZmHoK_7D63xmDQ3x3VHNQJ6K1YyhDEDHE6ULnHh3jkS5w6vdlvPNk_5HPFV2KwtHBIxwv7P3NJlmrArVRd3Emlxn-nybyRznYkySIUVeNQ5WcWRAna7YojrbNOyodgzktlOnEVTpfKVgX4dI-1853bzjX9ntwmQ1OfujPgAWamecwj0VJJZvOd76K0R9NCbQZF5TlMYppXkTvTFh7A7duU60GgIT7Q_IgXUa9GHRMMhqJFMaiLb7sk8KVvkLPKnux-4bhFdJEKvvUMh-cEDsmE1SK_SeshU3hNKZzzvf56O0tQw%3D%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of "Bank Your Vote"

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW_R7c3iCN

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW_R7c3iCN

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62850986:W_R7c3iCN:m:3:2627245898:66DDD858B26FABD91984A369B2393663:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: re: New poll in Michigan Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1166%2E135344%2E52c4ER)

On Friday, my team shared some breaking news: **A new, independent poll shows that the Senate race in Michigan is a statistical dead-heat.** While some may think Michigan is solidly blue, this poll shows we need to be doing everything we can right now to set us up for success on Election Day.
Today, I wanted to pull back the curtain and explain what else was in this poll, and what it means for our campaign.
[**Before I dive in, I would love it if you would consider chipping in $3 or more to help us defend this open Senate seat in Michigan. In light of this poll, we need to show grassroots strength as national Republicans size up our ability to win.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240225-1-700&t=2&akid=1166%2E135344%2E52c4ER)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240225-1-700&t=3&akid=1166%2E135344%2E52c4ER)**
There are a few important numbers in this poll that tell us a lot about how we need to continue running our campaign: Despite this race being a statistical tie, 23% of voters are undecided. Those are the people who will decide our election – and who we need to take our message to.
Another key statistic from this poll: 51% of voters say they haven’t heard of me yet. We’ve been doing everything we can to take our message directly to voters early by visiting cities and towns all over Michigan and meeting with folks to talk about the issues that matter to them. But this poll reminds us how big the state of Michigan is (11 media markets!) and makes it clear just how critical that initial introduction is.
This poll also shows that the presidential election will likely be decided in Michigan, and right now former President Trump is leading President Biden 45-41. National Republicans view Michigan as a key battleground state for both the presidential race and the Senate, which is why we’ve already seen three visits from Trump, including last weekend, and why we can expect to see even more.
[**In a race this tight, every dollar truly makes the difference, which is why I am asking: Will you donate any amount now to help build our war chest and set our campaign up for success in this race?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240225-1-700&t=4&akid=1166%2E135344%2E52c4ER)

clean_body: On Friday, my team shared some breaking news: A new, independent poll shows that the Senate race in Michigan is a statistical dead-heat. While some may think Michigan is solidly blue, this poll shows we need to be doing everything we can right now to set us up for success on Election Day. Today, I wanted to pull back the curtain and explain what else was in this poll, and what it means for our campaign. There are a few important numbers in this poll that tell us a lot about how we need to continue running our campaign: Despite this race being a statistical tie, 23% of voters are undecided. Those are the people who will decide our election – and who we need to take our message to. Another key statistic from this poll: 51% of voters say they haven’t heard of me yet. We’ve been doing everything we can to take our message directly to voters early by visiting cities and towns all over Michigan and meeting with folks to talk about the issues that matter to them. But this poll reminds us how big the state of Michigan is (11 media markets!) and makes it clear just how critical that initial introduction is. body:

Derek — We are just a few days away from our last end-of-month deadline before the California Senate primary.
**[Can you chip in before midnight to Adam’s campaign to reach undecided voters before they hit the polls?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240225_AM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5637%2E5257348%2E1qrJPW)**
This deadline is a chance to show the momentum behind Adam’s campaign. **We need to post BIG numbers to show everyone that we are fired up.**
We are already deploying all available resources to reach voters through mail, TV ads, and volunteer conversations across the states.
But a donation _now_ could help us reach an extra few voters before this election. Or help us respond to the latest attacks from Steve Garvey.

Hundreds of law enforcement officers were injured on January 6th. People died that day. Many law enforcement officers took their own lives in the aftermath. Those injuries, those deaths — they’re not a joke.

If you needed any more evidence that January 6th was just a game to the MAGA-right, look at this:

The assault on our democracy was not a game.
Hundreds of law enforcement officers were injured on January 6th. Five Capitol Police officers died in the wake of the Capitol riot. Those injuries, those deaths — they’re not a joke.
And the people that glorify the actions of the insurrectionists, the people who are still egging them on and carrying their lies and conspiracies — people like Kari Lake — have absolutely no place leading our country.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Hidden Deaths at Delco Prison? | Future of Lifeline Scholars Uncertain + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty's Weekly Reads.

**What We’re Hearing** : “Repairing the foundation of our state’s economy should be the priority, laying the groundwork for a stable business-friendly environment in Pennsylvania that fosters growth and prosperity for all citizens..” - Rep. Josh Kail (R-Beaver/Washington)

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=afaecc2a46&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
### **1.[Delco prison uses technicality to keep its death count low](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=587cc5918a&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Todd Shepherd_
"In Delaware County, when a prisoner’s life is threatened by a medical emergency such as a drug overdose or suicide attempt, the prison moves aggressively to have the person’s bail revoked or to have charges dropped, at which point the person is no longer technically in custody. If the person later dies — even just hours after having been inside the facility — the death can’t be counted on the prison’s annual statistics because of the custody technicality.” **Why It Matters**. “A clear picture of that understanding fully emerged from the most recent meeting of the county’s Jail Oversight Board (JOB), in which Warden Laura Williams told board members there had been a ‘critical illness’ in the facility on January 13, but neglected to tell them the inmate eventually died from that incident. All of this comes against a two-year backdrop in which state and federal officials as well as journalists have been digging further into the idea of ‘hidden deaths’ at jails and prisons. A [webpage](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b957debe1b&e=b7b3eddce2) for the prison says its values are, ‘Integrity, Courage, Ethics, Honor, Respect, Service, Duty, Professionalism, Innovation, Transparency, Accountability, Sustainability, Equity, and Correctional Excellence.’” **Quotable.** “William Rodriguez Rivera did not pass away while in custody of the County,” county spokesperson Adrienne Marofsky told Broad + Liberty. “The County has no further comment.”

[C](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=40271f6364&e=b7b3eddce2)[ontinue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=20251a1069&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Children of a lesser god](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=51e091a940&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_

“On a positive note, during his annual budget address, Governor Shapiro called on the Republican Senate and the Democratic House to work together to pass Lifeline scholarships. They would allow low-income parents whose children attend the worst public schools in Pennsylvania to use scholarships to transfer to a better school. (In 2023, the problem was the House, run by Democrats: the Senate passed Lifeline.)
On a less positive note, the governor’s budget contains no money to pay for Lifeline.
The governor giveth; the governor taketh away.”

**Why It Matters**. “The debate over school choice has become a national battle and, unfortunately, a partisan battle at times. Worse, some politicians and the teachers’ union pit parent against parent, student against student. As if some parents shouldn’t be allowed to have a choice, as if some kids should be forced to go to bad schools — just to prove a point. As if some kids are lesser.

Lifeline is a small, targeted program to help the poorest families, whose children are forced to attend the worst schools.”

**Quotable**. “It’s time for him to step up and fight for all Pennsylvania children. Bring the parties together. Tell the teachers’ union to stand down — as many of them send their own children to charter, cyber, religious and private schools.”

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=35a1197676&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Andy Bloom: Nikki’s Haley Mary?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7e35b938fb&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Steve Ulrich: My first trip to the Trump show](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eb8b3373b1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[David Reel: Is John Fetterman really Arlen Specter 2.0?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3a7534023f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[A third of fatal drug-related car crashes in Philadelphia are linked to fentanyl](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0f65d04f6b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Rep. Josh Kail: The governor has no clothes](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=24f75c4bc7&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
| _**What We’re Reading...**_
---
| Last week, we were reading an article that said John Fetterman’s moderate policy pronouncements were a way for Democrats to step back from the progressive extremes. This week, Michael Torres writes for _The Dispatch_ that [the senator’s centrism is all talk](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c1c364cc5c&e=b7b3eddce2) – he’s the same old progressive he’s recently denied being. “Contrary to claims that Fetterman has suddenly moderated, he is correct in his recent proclamation that he hasn’t ‘changed a lick.’”************

name: Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
subject: Fair maps are here. Wisconsin’s gerrymandering nightmare is over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Republicans rigged the state. But democracy is back.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5995f5d-5887-44c6-afa5-7fd16022d96d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. The long, dark night of ultra-partisan gerrymandering is over, and a new day for democracy now dawns in the Badger State. On Monday morning, a new set of state legislative maps were signed into law for Wisconsin. These maps are graded “A” for fairness by the head of the nonpartisan Princeton Gerrymandering Project. The current maps scored an F. With the stroke of a pen, Wisconsin went from a “democracy desert” to, well, a democracy. This was all possible because of you. [I’m going to ask you to split a $10 donation between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10f7501f-59e8-4f26-aea4-27cd9f8dc3ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), but I want to tell you how we got here: Wisconsin’s gerrymandering crisis began in 2011, when Republican lawmakers drew legislative lines that guaranteed even landslide election losses wouldn’t cost them their majorities. The result was one of the most egregious, extreme partisan gerrymanders in American political history. In 2012 and 2018, Wisconsin voters overwhelmingly voted for Democratic majorities in the legislature but Republicans won huge majorities of the seats. In 2020 and 2022, Democrats won major statewide victories, but Republicans won near-supermajorities. All the while, Republican politicians in Wisconsin have used their power to restrict access to the ballot, remove authorities that voters had entrusted to statewide elected officials like the Governor and Attorney General, and smash the freedoms of workers to organize and advocate for themselves. For thirteen years, the democracy-proof legislature has been laying siege to democracy itself. But those statewide victories added up. In 2018, 2020, and 2023, voters built a new progressive majority on the State Supreme Court. By electing Governor Evers and preventing GOP supermajorities, they stopped hard-right maps from being signed into law. And last year, a civic uprising prevented Republicans from impeaching Janet Protasiewicz. In December, the Supreme Court ruled that Wisconsin’s legislative maps were unconstitutional. This wasn’t easy. This team had to knock on doors, call phones, chip in, share our views with friends and online—year after year, election after election, never giving up even when it felt like all was lost. But we did it. Today, the work doesn’t end. The candidate recruitment process now goes into overdrive. And at the same time, we remain vigilant in case Republican politicians in Madison and their allies once again, through the courts or any other strategy, attempt to thwart majority rule. Today, we commit to doing the work, ending the malign speakership of Robin Vos, breaking the GOP supermajority in the State Senate, and paving the way towards a Democratic state Senate majority in 2026. I’d be remiss if I didn’t ask. The number of competitive legislative seats will triple so we’ll need triple the support, Peter. [Can you chip in a $10 split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action to help us organize voters in every corner of Wisconsin where Democrats have the chance to win?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf6edc92-f30c-41c6-8e5a-ac18eb37c3b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9d0f423-e8c0-48a3-82e9-8a332a31e1db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | This is a story with millions of heroes. Supporters like you and Blue Amp Action are some of them. From all of us at the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, please know you have our boundless gratitude. In solidarity, Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T189e41ab-5dbc-49f4-8666-a760a4842355/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

| Hi Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself: I’m Sarah Carlson, and I am Laura Gillen’s campaign manager.

My job is to coordinate all the moving pieces of our campaign so that Laura can focus on reaching out to every voter in the district and advocating for the issues that matter most to Long Islanders, like prioritizing the safety of our children, lowering costs for our families, and protecting our individual freedoms, and our democracy.

I know we have what it takes to defeat the **most vulnerable** Republican, Anthony D’Esposito. [_**That’s why I’m hoping you can invest $10 in our campaign and ensure we have the resources to retake the Democratic House majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79683329/457205789/106679703?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-02-25_Z&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTcwYjE4YS1lOGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VG8KMGCqK5O6_jOq3WRx14riRGHuXKYAjYTqmyRwp8k=)

I’m excited to be working for someone as committed to her constituents as Laura. In my short time on Team Gillen, I have already seen how passionate Laura is about fighting for the families and workers of Long Island and the entire nation. Laura understands the urgency of the moment, and what happens on Long Island _will determine whether Democrats can take back the House majority._

[_**Will you contribute $10 or more today to help us win and defeat extremist Anthony D’Esposito?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79683335/457205795/106679703?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-02-25_Z&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTcwYjE4YS1lOGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VG8KMGCqK5O6_jOq3WRx14riRGHuXKYAjYTqmyRwp8k=)

body:

If you want to defend the Senate, this race should be at the very top of your priorities list – and Jacky Rosen needs our immediate help to fight back against her opponent’s new multimillion-dollar war chest.

clean_body: Did you see what Joe Biden just posted?| | | Peter, things aren’t looking good. Right now, Republicans are being outraised by MILLIONS. Joe Biden has over $100 MILLION in the bank... $50 million MORE than President Trump. We need to catch up - or conservatives will LOSE. President Trump and the entire conservative movement are counting on us! | | | | | | The consequences of another four years of Joe Biden would be devastating, Peter. This is an investment worth making. If we sit back and hope for the best, liberals will BUY these elections. America can’t afford this, Peter. | | | | | | Thank you,Josh Hawley | | | Josh Hawley Featured Merchandise *Made in the USA ** | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

body:
It’s the weekend, but my eyes are still on ActBlue.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79694288/457229464/823540626?refcode=ea.57d616e7-f0d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.57d616e7-f0d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Q2MTZlNy1mMGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnwQ--nMIhmo2fx0Qhku5EZ5WggtE8eGBm25fETJvpY=&emci=3849342f-8ad2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=57d616e7-f0d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, Even though it’s the weekend, my eyes are still glued to ActBlue. That’s because it’s the end of the month, and we have to count up every last dollar to make sure we stay on track. As Roy’s finance director, it’s my job to hit our fundraising goals each month. February’s target is $40,000, and when I checked the numbers this morning, we were still about $8,000 short. **[Before I take this update to Roy tomorrow: Could you pitch in any amount that’s right for you to get us a little closer to our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79694289/457229465/-1724542601?refcode=ea.57d616e7-f0d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.57d616e7-f0d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Q2MTZlNy1mMGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnwQ--nMIhmo2fx0Qhku5EZ5WggtE8eGBm25fETJvpY=)** | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79694290/457229466/-1724542601?refcode=ea.57d616e7-f0d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.57d616e7-f0d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Q2MTZlNy1mMGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnwQ--nMIhmo2fx0Qhku5EZ5WggtE8eGBm25fETJvpY=)

Peter, since we keep asking you to donate, you deserve to know just where your dollar is going. We’re devoting significant resources right now to supporting Democratic candidates in competitive legislative elections. As we all know, Republicans hold a supermajority in Raleigh and are willing to use it to advance their radical agenda.
Breaking the supermajority will require investment in Democrats in every district — not just districts we’re confident we’ll win. We need to compete everywhere.
North Carolina is a deep purple, competitive state. We can win here if we work together.
**[So please, lend me and Roy a hand by pitching in to support our work before our end-of-month deadline on Thursday. Anything you can give would go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79694291/457229467/-1724542601?refcode=ea.57d616e7-f0d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.57d616e7-f0d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Q2MTZlNy1mMGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnwQ--nMIhmo2fx0Qhku5EZ5WggtE8eGBm25fETJvpY=)**

clean_body: It’s the weekend, but my eyes are still on ActBlue. | Hi Peter, Even though it’s the weekend, my eyes are still glued to ActBlue. That’s because it’s the end of the month, and we have to count up every last dollar to make sure we stay on track. As Roy’s finance director, it’s my job to hit our fundraising goals each month. February’s target is $40,000, and when I checked the numbers this morning, we were still about $8,000 short. = | = Peter, since we keep asking you to donate, you deserve to know just where your dollar is going. We’re devoting significant resources right now to supporting Democratic candidates in competitive legislative elections. As we all know, Republicans hold a supermajority in Raleigh and are willing to use it to advance their radical agenda. Breaking the supermajority will require investment in Democrats in every district — not just districts we’re confident we’ll win. We need to compete everywhere. North Carolina is a deep purple, competitive state. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Democrats should blacklist AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Remember a few years ago when the DCCC (House Democrats’ fundraising arm)
blacklisted anyone working to support progressive candidates challenging
moderate, anti-choice incumbents in the Democratic primaries?

When everyday working-class people were challenging corporate-backed
incumbents, the DCCC made an entire blacklist to prevent our party from
looking more like the people that elect them.

Now, as AIPAC threatens to spend $100 million against progressive
Democratic incumbents with Republican megadonor support, the DCCC is
silent.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240225.gV2O8j&refcode=em20240225-33499&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=33499%2E1203867%2E-kxxDp ]We’re pulling out all the stops to go up against this GOP-funded
outside group and re-elect every Squad member in 2024: chip in now to fuel
our fight.

AIPAC is building a war chest worth tens of millions of dollars largely
funded by millionaires, billionaires, and right-wing extremists who also
contribute to the likes of Donald Trump, Nikki Haley, and other GOP
candidates.

The right-wing backed, anti-Palestinian lobby group has “publicly declared
war on progressive congressmembers” and is planning to spend big money to
unseat them in this year’s primary elections.

Just look at New York’s 16th district, where AIPAC is the single-largest
donor to Jamaal Bowman’s moderate challenger, George Latimer. He received
$600,000 from AIPAC after they hand-picked him to run against Jamaal.
Latimer is also using anti-union consultant Global Strategy Group (GSG)
for polling support.

As The American Prospect noted, “GSG taking on Latimer as a client shows
that the Democratic Party’s top corporate consultants are willing to help
unseat Democratic incumbents—a strategy that progressives were excoriated
for just a few years ago by the very same people when the dynamic was
reversed.

Apparently, it’s okay to challenge Democratic incumbents when they’re
pro-peace progressives, just not when they’re corporate-backed
establishment Democrats.

It goes to show that we can’t sit back and rely on the Democratic
establishment to protect Squad incumbents like Jamaal, Cori, Ilhan, and
Rashida. That’s where you come in.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240225.gV2O8j&refcode=em20240225-33499&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=33499%2E1203867%2E-kxxDp ]If you can afford to, please pitch in $3 or more to
directly support Justice Democrats’ work to re-elect the Squad and stop
AIPAC’s right-wing infiltration of our Democratic primaries in 2024 →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240225.gV2O8j&refcode=em20240225-33499&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=33499%2E1203867%2E-kxxDp ]Contribute $3

If the Democratic Party truly cares about protecting incumbents who fight
for our shared values and democracy, they would create an AIPAC blacklist
and demand candidates stop taking their right-wing megadonor money.

We won’t hold our breath. Instead, we’re going to keep building the
resources necessary to fight back and protect our young, diverse,
working-class bloc of leaders committed to creating progressive change for
the people.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=33499%2E1203867%2E-kxxDp ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=33499%2E1203867%2E-kxxDp ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240225-33499-footer&t=1024&refcode2=33499_1203867_-kxxDp&akid=33499%2E1203867%2E-kxxDp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=33499%2E1203867%2E-kxxDp

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
