name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I have an opponent:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
The MAGA Republican machine couldn't find a single Republican in Massachusetts to run against me — so they brought in someone from Rhode Island.
| | | It’s official: John Deaton, a well-funded Republican, has launched a campaign to run against me for Senate in Massachusetts.

Apparently, the MAGA Republican machine couldn’t find a single Republican in Massachusetts to run against me — so they brought in someone from Rhode Island who will have the backing of the GOP and special interest groups.

This much is clear: We’re up against national Republicans who are desperate to take back the Senate and pass Trump’s agenda. We’re up against their rich buddies who are trying to stop us from making our government work for working people.

**[It’s going to take a strong grassroots movement to compete and win. Can you please split a donation of $5 or anything you can to support my re-election campaign and the DSCC’s work? We need to respond to my opponent’s campaign launch with the strongest amount of grassroots donations and protect our Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=13663%2E9716520%2EQfA252)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and be split between Warren for Senate and the DSCC.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=13663%2E9716520%2EQfA252)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=5&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=13663%2E9716520%2EQfA252)
---
| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=6&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=13663%2E9716520%2EQfA252)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=13663%2E9716520%2EQfA252)
---

I’m proud of the progress we’ve accomplished for Massachusetts families so far — like lowering the cost of hearing aids, passing a new tax on massive corporations that were paying $0 in taxes, getting student loan debt canceled, securing billions in funding for projects like an electric bus fleet and infrastructure repairs, and so much more.

But there’s plenty more to do for working people in Massachusetts and across the country. We’ve got to bring down the cost of housing. Put child care within reach for all working parents. Protect our planet from the climate crisis. Take power away from far-right megadonors and put it in the hands of working people — which means we need to root corruption out of Washington. And I’ve got the most sweeping set of anti-corruption plans since Watergate.

**This election is about who our government works for — and it’s about defending our democracy and our basic freedoms. I’m fighting to keep our Senate majority because if Republicans win any more power, they’ll restrict abortion access _everywhere_ , even in blue states that have passed abortion protections — like Massachusetts. They’ll threaten voting rights, LGBTQIA+ rights, Social Security, Medicare, and the Affordable Care Act — they’ll reward the rich and powerful, and embolden an extremist base across the country.**

So I’m staying in this fight to stop MAGA extremism, continue standing up to powerful special interests, and make real change for working people. Are you with me?

**[Please respond to my opponent’s announcement now with a donation of $5 or anything you can to support this campaign and the DSCC. Grassroots supporters like you have helped defeat the GOP and special interests in the past, and I need your support again as we take on this new fight to defend our Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=13663%2E9716520%2EQfA252)**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240225-ElizabethWarren-WarrenNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=13663%2E9716520%2EQfA252)
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=13663%2E9716520%2EQfA252)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=13663%2E9716520%2EQfA252)** to unsubscribe.

name: Joe Biden
subject: Every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Peter, Donald Trump just won the South Carolina GOP primary and is clearly positioned to become his party’s nominee. | | |
---
**Peter, Donald Trump won the South Carolina GOP primary last night and is clearly positioned to become his party’s nominee. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain what that means for the stakes of this race and, if you’re able,[consider making a contribution to my campaign.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZCmRjvHgikzZ_Ok_dYKuJpUIh2BEiW1VirfP4vpAhfiIr-zSAfuaNcyZxTTiRj33GhFMz1yyslzObTgiixrZkJWmGqQie4Dtbc7Om-ZOICuf4IetQNVheznopJBwXNT5xt5W8NmOqrCCsKYiHqi1hWC1oG-dFOFj5_sBwFmjhFG4RkQpdIMp8y46T8zvRxcwfPJuaNLZSIGUNIOYAj9TKDil0GQacnj2nCE8ymZAw5MVWiVEo_0-FQ_jQULju754UcxbK7X5JcY2NsoPkaRjg-PaESTzhDFVYySaNvdcrLK4wEQf42YMfRXJZdd5z0vKK2b2I2WOX11KW3-nj-BJ6yb3WwXMCjI4Jaw6rEadD8HpAg93M4JGUhrpNoOFaoG5iif8a71NWKIaOqH1ImbXEDmgQP9-kgCbHoQKTloN1bVWYX44N_A381hgTjuCIlNcp/445/dQwyBjHnR4iU26i_P1e7WA/h0/TCDOJLUMLsmpQ2ycpAcwt3Ee7wm4VUeiWT08qQapsqM)** When I launched my campaign for reelection, I said that I believed every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. And that this was ours. _That couldn’t be more true today._ We know who Donald Trump is, and we know what he does. Heck, we know that he is willing to sacrifice _our democracy_ to put himself in power. So, the question before us now is whether we’ll have more freedoms or fewer in the years ahead. More rights, or fewer. I know what I want the answer to be, and I think you do too. **I am asking you to pitch in to this campaign for the first time today. If you’ve been waiting on a moment to get involved in this campaign, Peter, this is it. The stakes of this election could not be higher.** [**So, will you pitch in your first $25 donation to my reelection campaign now? clean_body: Peter, Donald Trump just won the South Carolina GOP primary and is clearly positioned to become his party’s nominee. | | | Peter, Donald Trump won the South Carolina GOP primary last night and is clearly positioned to become his party’s nominee. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain what that means for the stakes of this race and, if you’re able, When I launched my campaign for reelection, I said that I believed every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. And that this was ours. That couldn’t be more true today. We know who Donald Trump is, and we know what he does. Heck, we know that he is willing to sacrifice our democracy to put himself in power. So, the question before us now is whether we’ll have more freedoms or fewer in the years ahead. More rights, or fewer. I know what I want the answer to be, and I think you do too. I am asking you to pitch in to this campaign for the first time today. If you’ve been waiting on a moment to get involved in this campaign, Peter, this is it. name: Colin Allred
subject: We can make history together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em240225-1-tt&refcode2=5222.196590.fOYCNM&t=1&akid=5222%2E196590%2EfOYCNM)
---
I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz and become the first ever Black Senator from Texas. If you’re already with me, [**will you split a donation donation between The Long Run and my campaign to help power my grassroots movement? →**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em240225-1-tt&t=2&akid=5222%2E196590%2EfOYCNM)
[DONATE →](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em240225-1-tt&t=3&akid=5222%2E196590%2EfOYCNM)
All the way back in 1870, Hiram Rhodes Revels, a pastor and State Senator from Mississippi, was elected as the first Black US Senator. Since then, we've come a long way as a country. **But representation – like our democracy – is a work in progress, and I believe we can do better.**
Black Americans have long faced far too many obstacles like: discrimination, lower pay, higher job instability – not to mention the racist voter suppression laws that Texas Republicans like Ted Cruz have championed, which make it harder for certain folks to vote.
**The bottom line is this: It's essential that our government reflects the people it represents.**
I'm ready to defeat Ted Cruz this November and fight to build a more perfect union for my boys and every kid in Texas. But unlike Ted Cruz, I don't have corporate special interests footing the bill for my campaign.
**To win, I need a massive movement of grassroots supporters to step up and join me in this fight.[Please, will you split $5 to between my campaign and The Long Run to defeat Ted Cruz, become the first Black Senator from Texas, and be the leader Texans deserve? → **](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em240225-1-tt&t=4&akid=5222%2E196590%2EfOYCNM)

name: Bob Casey
subject: A simple question
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I have a simple question.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2104%2E552475%2EJTR6kk)
$5, Peter.
That’s what I’m asking you to contribute to my re-election campaign to defend Pennsylvania’s critical seat and stop the GOP from taking the Senate.
$5 might not seem like much, but when everyone chips in, we can build a winning campaign in a critical Senate battleground.
$5 today is what we need to go up against our mega-millionaire Republican opponent and a dark money GOP PAC supporting him that has already amassed a record-breaking amount — over $18 million — to spend against us.
[**We need a lot of supporters chipping in to fight back. Please, Peter, will you donate $5 right now? I need your help to build the strongest possible defense to keep Pennsylvania blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240225-1&refcode2=2104_552475_JTR6kk&akid=2104%2E552475%2EJTR6kk)
Pennsylvania is going to be key in Democrats’ fight to defend our razor-thin Senate majority and the White House in 2024. We need all the support we can get to make that happen.
November will be here before we know it. The $5 donations that we raise now will determine what happens to Pennsylvania — and our Nation — then.
[**Will you give $5 now? We will put your donation to work right away in our fight to keep our Commonwealth blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240225-1&refcode2=2104_552475_JTR6kk&akid=2104%2E552475%2EJTR6kk)

subject: Hi, Fellow American!

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: No one is looking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
When no one is looking
I've always appreciated the quote, "Character is how you treat people who can't do anything for you in return. Integrity is how you act when you think nobody is looking."
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Bob Lorinser has been traveling for three years across the largest Congressional district east of the Mississippi, listening, learning, and, in certain ways already fulfilling some of roles of a Congressman.
Your support is crucial in funding his efforts [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] to reach every corner of this vast rural district. Donate now through ActBlue Express for instant processing:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
True representation is not just about making promises and securing votes. It's about being present, engaged, and genuinely interested in the needs of the people they seek to serve.
Often, people tell me they feel neglected by Rep. Jack Bergman due to his lack of attention to the 'behind the scenes' work.
In public, he takes credit for projects he's voted against , avoids town halls, and dodges probing interviews. The quiet work: I know I can do better, and it's one of the reasons why I am running for Congress.
Every day, distressed constituents come to me seeking solutions and federal assistance. As a candidate, I can only do so much, but imagine the possibilities if we had a Congressional leader who truly understands the meaning of public service.
A good representative would understand that they are accountable not to their donors, party, or those who share their views - but to everybody, even when no one is watching.
You would not have seen me attend last night's two-hour meeting about safe water in northeast Michigan in Alpena.
Or the meeting about nonemergent medical transportation needs in our district's southeastern counties.
You can't hear phone calls from frustrated disabled Veterans in the Eastern UP seeking resources.
You don't see my attendance at a fundraiser for the Beacon House, a "home away from home" for patients and families in a medical crisis.
Or my brainstorming session with mental health specialists to increase access to care.
Or my discussions with childcare workers.
Or my meeting with the Office of Rural Prosperity.
Or me listening to constituents express mining and job concerns in the Western UP.
Practicing being a good representative is sometimes more valuable than a campaign photo op. Over the past three years, Rep. Jack Bergman's neglect has given me a lot of practice time.
I am ready.
I hope you agree there is no one more ready. Rep. Jack Bergman has never faced a second-time challenger , and the last repeat Democratic candidate in MI01 came within half a percentage point of unseating an incumbent. We can absolutely do this.
Your contributions [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] are helping me connect with voters, fill gaps left by a neglectful Congressman, and become a better public servant.
Thank you.
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan | Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

subject: 4 quick facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by We Stand With Dave Reichert (R)
body:
read now

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=84760ed325714c79bef6e278b898fa0e&_e=08IOqJhhyTr6d25YQgsO6tnGCXkqSM-RLGfQCQIwXirXzqagkBn01iGv6nBJyKGU2sHRyLRPHEjbidPdZN2sUwpjDkx2EDMSNvEbBVonlsn76i3BD270S5NCc1rtDj0jRjYtxycse4OOQybBHp0c48llIgk4xvFGroMHa8rF0pmZxVZ7oqVr_cXHT5KGPLoVDIH7cUEI89XDA36XNFCDJEpmFYDTheyBWijYhBxzICBuvcHhi7M9e_FMXrrsWGxKAmhFjowZKpXpkjwVdiZyx2cANILQ4EI6oIZwbkZa9xM3uFg9bck-q297J_e9_0VLwZfa7juKFPxE4fcN5DQVFchciRQfS7bZvKGKPNbeNG_pIjRScJaLQezc6rhMz-E6aonEjsvVm68AjwEHEY-KRsaykeWWsqqMDAdPf371TRE%3D)
---
_**IT’S OFFICIALLY 2O24, AND WE NEED TO MAKE SURE YOU’RE AWARE OF 4 KEY FACTS:**_
****FACT:** Democrat Jay Inslee is stepping down after three long terms as Governor.

**FACT:** Dave Reichert, former King County Sheriff and U.S. Congressman, is the most prominent and accomplished Republican to run for Governor in YEARS

**FACT:** The last time a Republican was elected governor in Washington was in 1980.

**FACT:** Washingtonians NEED a common sense, experienced leader to guide and serve the state in these trying times. Inflation is rising, crime is rampant, and the people of Washington simply deserve better.**

Dave Reichert needs YOUR help to make it through the election this year. We are on a roll. **Last week, I was endorsed by EMILYs List — my biggest endorsement yet!** I could not be more thrilled to be backed by such a champion for women, because when I talk to Pennsylvanians at their doors and on the street, reproductive freedom is something that comes up constantly. With MAGA Republicans like Scott Perry pushing an anti-choice agenda and a national abortion ban, there’s a lot on the line. We already know where Scott Perry stands on abortion— he votes for anti-choice legislation time and time again. We simply cannot afford another two years of Perry representing us in Congress. [Can you spare just $10 or $25 to help send me to Congress to protect a woman’s right to make her own healthcare decisions?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79699186/457243613/174699550?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_022524_EOM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUyYjQ3YTktZjdkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CT_OKYORMepd3wjQVR2Suhj77hOnRHZTPvFthbi3A8M=) | | [Protect abortion access →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79699188/457243616/174699550?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_022524_EOM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUyYjQ3YTktZjdkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CT_OKYORMepd3wjQVR2Suhj77hOnRHZTPvFthbi3A8M=)

Your donation will go toward door-knocking literature, yard signs, and all of the critical things we need to reach voters. clean_body: Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | We are on a roll. Last week, I was endorsed by EMILYs List — my biggest endorsement yet! I could not be more thrilled to be backed by such a champion for women, because when I talk to Pennsylvanians at their doors and on the street, reproductive freedom is something that comes up constantly. With MAGA Republicans like Scott Perry pushing an anti-choice agenda and a national abortion ban, there’s a lot on the line. We already know where Scott Perry stands on abortion— he votes for anti-choice legislation time and time again. We simply cannot afford another two years of Perry representing us in Congress. = | | = Your donation counts now more than ever. Let me explain. I’m facing my second to last end-of-month fundraising deadline before the primary election in April. And I am the only candidate in this race who has a shot at beating Scott Perry. It’s imperative that I have your support before Thursday at midnight to help make that happen. Your donation will go toward door-knocking literature, yard signs, and all of the critical things we need to reach voters. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fire Congressman Perry once and for all, and save reproductive freedom. Are you in? —Janelle | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for more than three decades as an Emmy-award-winning journalist. Now, Janelle is taking on Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — good-paying jobs to support our families, abortion rights, the highest quality healthcare and education, and someone we know we can trust. Janelle needs your support to unseat MAGA extremist Scott Perry and flip Pennsylvania's 10th District blue.** | = = Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. | Friend -

Last time the Democrats were in power, they fast-tracked an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use _your_ tax dollars to fund _their_ campaigns, make it harder for Republicans to win competitive races, and gut voter ID laws.

And if the Democrats win the next election, we know they will try it again.

We're racing against the clock to protect the integrity of the most important election of our lifetimes. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Jamaal Bowman is facing an anti-ceasefire primary challenger, recruited by the right-wing group AIPAC.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I need Jamaal Bowman by my side in Congress. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvL0Uk8xUpnNGUNkWVhilWf-uI6ivtJBhqiGkIb7Qry0en5qtuO4v94XVSOUenZbD_F62fIm4xykIMIY-a1izEZWWFyEpJ2FqTSsEiD11KnG9Kq4U3qa4HSPFH02n06MCe5UH-m7Yot7eyFYexkMEr2MkGOX6R9HB8aU8JDhWYUndKfh34m0SpH3sr2HBZLO_J1rLZDeiAamXSHvUSAdtyXVlGIXV7Bv2wbFQnUvZqdwDDgpsmW25OFHYtSNVcwvKAYuFd2XKCKZs09Wbu_PFSUVTTEjHQ2PSGn9HYZwIMQ6d6HZ-UCUIXjBEy-v5MJcz-2InFYVJX2eY_xOIHHqZIRg/445/3Agr9rCGQeG77oYKQF7I_g/h0/hWmZdk2mawMRcYu-2cxZF-QcL57EojuD8JBkvc5WN8o)
---
Friend, I’m proud to serve alongside Rep. Jamaal Bowman in Congress. Jamaal is pushing back against right-wing attempts to censor discussions of racism in schools, and he’s been a crucial ally in the movement for a ceasefire and for Palestinians’ human rights. He recognizes the worth and dignity of all human beings, and he knows how urgently we need transformative changes to our unjust status quo. **Because of Jamaal’s moral leadership, the right-wing group AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire candidate to run against him in New York’s Democratic primary.** The election’s in June, but campaigning is in full swing, and the Republican Trump supporters behind AIPAC are planning to spend millions of dollars over the next few months to defeat Jamaal. [**Please split a donation today between my and Jamaal Bowman’s campaigns so we can stay in Congress demanding human rights for all people. clean_body: I need Jamaal Bowman by my side in Congress. | | | Friend, I’m proud to serve alongside Rep. Jamaal Bowman in Congress. Jamaal is pushing back against right-wing attempts to censor discussions of racism in schools, and he’s been a crucial ally in the movement for a ceasefire and for Palestinians’ human rights. He recognizes the worth and dignity of all human beings, and he knows how urgently we need transformative changes to our unjust status quo. Because of Jamaal’s moral leadership, the right-wing group AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire candidate to run against him in New York’s Democratic primary. The election’s in June, but campaigning is in full swing, and the Republican Trump supporters behind AIPAC are planning to spend millions of dollars over the next few months to defeat Jamaal. | A lifelong educator, Jamaal is pushing to invest in education and other essential needs of our communities, not bombs and incarceration. He’s a leader in the push for a multi-racial democracy where all marginalized people can thrive. When visiting my grandmother in the West Bank, he saw first-hand how Palestinians live in fear under constant military presence. And he connected that to his own experience as a Black man in the U.S. who’s been targeted by police violence. Jamaal and I know that the struggles for justice and equality are interconnected, from the U.S. to Palestine and beyond. We are dedicated to equity and justice for all people, and we recognize the value of every single life. That’s why we continue to take politically courageous stands, despite attempts to silence and intimidate us. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Jamaal Bowman and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | Thank you for continuing to advocate for a better world where all of us can thrive. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: There's a reason we haven't heard anything from Josh Hawley about the Alabama IVF ruling

He pioneered the whole idea behind it.

[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43974?refcode=em20240225-4907&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4907%2E614464%2EPUCk-s)

Peter — there’s a reason we haven’t heard anything from Josh Hawley about the devastating ruling made by the Alabama Supreme Court that’s limiting access to IVF for families. **New reporting shows Hawley pioneered the idea.**
Josh Hawley wants to control us in the bedroom, in the doctor's office, even in our workplaces. He's telling us the only way to be a man is to be just like him — and he even wrote a book about it called “Manhood”. It's weird. It's creepy. And frankly, I can’t understand it.
Our U.S. Senator's job is to represent us — not to control us. Missourians deserve better. That’s why I’ve built a worker-led and people-powered movement to defeat him in November. **And it’s why I need your help.**
**This election is our only opportunity to hold Hawley accountable and send a real warrior for working families to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate.[Will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford right now so we can keep exposing Hawley’s extreme record to Missouri voters?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43974?refcode=em20240225-4907&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4907%2E614464%2EPUCk-s)**

Hawley’s obsession with controlling people’s lives has already made him one of the least popular U.S. Senators running this year — **_Morning Consult_ recently found Hawley had lower approval than any other Senate Republican up in 2024, and the _St. Louis Post-Dispatch_ has reported on multiple polls showing us already in a tight race!**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43974?refcode=em20240225-4907&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4907%2E614464%2EPUCk-s)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Our course on the American Founding—Now on DVD
body:
Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=5d9ca94b9b86466694416df1c68b5923&_t=TiRbP_h6Z5q6xgk_irsqQHc5UnDFGYGGgEc1vfT9JAsTok_gflmpiiVB5tcUy11nd5gQ070EQ5v9I1QPo0xvQypL9eAQeJnQzv9pFX00MIo%3D)_

| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5d9ca94b9b86466694416df1c68b5923&_e=2ZzeOzxaNW2VxSmpR8lVbCWexUgosbd3jsCSE_dJjcUf1i77BO2PttEOZFQDcIL_Tl92RWiblC8bI_Pf-rL6Wl32mnND50Nj2oS_YSGM61mkoK4k2ae1EC4vpw9hiyj4jBKyqwXO8JCLiY2DzeSbdfsHea8prdF0hlxnzDDSd4f0RrrY0xiz5TL4L4HfpvclnV0ImmO6zWa8yWpLDsR5slUPJto0n_mRgVgrun2jLY3cD86MVvQENYaUJm4A8lswFJAhlwq00qWyk0JSZhDceGQCaZl5NsT1Z68itKuG0CYx0hWLzvz3x1FGUP82-AxV3eLE-AS0_APXX7FbrNk9Hig4dnznluQN-oQSb0ChUYCOD2HXOsJEFGzjv9Zp9KTgGDCN_fzL45b-lpO7BInfoXj8siD4GJ4ltuINkNhMVyIHRSD1SCVe408TIN13KnovmKGjQNcUTbreVf_5-xu_bg%3D%3D)
---
| |
Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5d9ca94b9b86466694416df1c68b5923&_e=2ZzeOzxaNW2VxSmpR8lVbCWexUgosbd3jsCSE_dJjcUf1i77BO2PttEOZFQDcIL_Tl92RWiblC8bI_Pf-rL6Wl32mnND50Nj2oS_YSGM61mkoK4k2ae1EC4vpw9hiyj4jBKyqwXO8JCLiY2DzeSbdfsHea8prdF0hlxnzDDSd4f0RrrY0xiz5TL4L4HfpvclnV0ImmO6zWa8yWpLDsR5slUPJto0n_mRgVgrun2jLY3cD86MVvQENYaUJm4A8lswFJAhlwq00qWyk0JSZhDceGQCaZl5NsT1Z68itKuG0CYx0hWLzvz3x1FGUP82-AxV2wB98QUjlVI2zZpL4w9sAoxRg98rY_19VV_adAKXmE1xazk7yWU42U_29JtXE-8OdQa_3KXTNFxQRmOcOMHGgtvy2Y-Y767x62_nQPM3COv6_1YhVUA2NvxPI-m4-MgCR99pG4V_ubd21X91gw2Amg%3D%3D)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
---
| |

name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: Do you want the good news or the bad news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
This is where you come in:
| | |
---
**I'll give you the good news first, friend:** With the latest polls showing me neck and neck with my GOP opponents, we just launched a brand-new TV ad to spread our pro-worker message to Ohio voters and pull ahead!
**Here's the bad news:** My Trump-backed opponent is fighting back with TV ads of his own – and if we don't raise $100,000 by midnight tonight, we may not have the resources we need to keep up.
**This is where you come in:** With Senate control on the line, the GOP will be pulling out all the stops to defeat me. Unlike my self-funding opponents, I don't have a personal fortune to pour into this race. **I'm running a true grassroots campaign, which means I'm counting on folks like you to power our reelection campaign to victory.**
**That's why I'm asking directly:** [**_Will you please split $5 or more between me and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell – as much as you can spare by midnight – so we can keep our new ad live, fight back against GOP attacks, and keep this Senate seat blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79707817/457261255/1800132588?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk841-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDcxZTZhNjItMDFkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MWWZWi1zBsl2b7nvdcva8-I-2O4sgjBWB33y_DSyM5Y=)
Thanks for coming through at important moments like this.

body:

| | |

Analysts at _CNN_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – in a race that experts say could decide Senate control. **But right now, we're on track to fall short of my upcoming $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal.**
I need your help to close the gap, so I'm humbly asking for $5. Believe me when I tell you that it'll have a huge, _immediate_ impact on this race and on Democrats' chances of defending our Senate majority.

clean_body: Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hello Peter. Did you see the email Jirair sent yesterday about our LAST deadline before the California primary? It's so urgent that we attached it to the bottom of this email. There are only 9 days until Election Day, and we are kicking our efforts into overdrive to get to the finish line. Our first step: Meet our final goal so we can communicate with the most number of voters. = | = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Jirair Ratevosian Date: Sat, Feb 24, 2024 Subject: Our LAST major deadline To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> = Hey Peter, it's Jirair. We are about to enter the FINAL week of February, and that means 2 things: 1. The California primary is in JUST 10 days. 2. We are facing our last and most important deadline ever! = = We're in the last leg of this race, but there's still a TON to do. My team and I still have doors to knock on, calls to make, meet and greets to attend — I'm doing everything possible to connect with every single voter. We're leaving no stone unturned in this final push to the primary — and all of this takes money. These final days are critical. With such a crowded primary, we need to ramp up our efforts even more to get my message to the voters. I want to let every voter know that I will use my personal and professional experiences to fight for their individual rights and our country’s democracy the second I step foot in Washington. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Peter. Let's finish this race strong! —Jirair * | = Meet Jirair An experienced federal policy leader, public health doctor and progressive voice for change, Jirair has dedicated his life to helping others and spent his career bringing diverse communities together to solve big challenges. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: As I was having breakfast this morning...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I couldn’t help but think of all of you and the movement for gun safety we’ve built over the past eleven years
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240225-1-30&t=1&akid=7681%2E3935704%2Eq4hR7T)
---
Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords.
As Mark and I were enjoying our breakfast this morning, I couldn’t help but find my thoughts drifting to all of you and the movement that we’ve built together to fight for a future free from gun violence. I feel so much hope when I think about the progress we have made over the past eleven years, and I hope you do too.
Hundreds of thousands of people have stepped up and contributed to GIFFORDS since our founding. And each contribution, no matter how big or small, has made a huge impact on our movement.
But we still face stiff headwinds. Gun violence is currently the number one cause of death for children in our country. Just days ago, we watched in horror as yet another mass shooting altered the community of Kansas City forever.
It doesn’t have to be this way. We must keep moving forward in our work to keep our communities safe.
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. This coming Thursday marks the end of February, which means we don’t have much time left to reach our February fundraising goals. My team has been keeping me updated on the status of our fundraising this month, and I’m worried that we might not get to where we need to be for the month.
Our fundraising goals are not arbitrary. They are real goals we set so that we have what it takes to elect gun safety champions, pass legislation at all levels of government, and take on the gun lobby.
[**So please, will you chip in $3 or any amount that makes sense for you to GIFFORDS PAC? I need you with me in our movement to save lives from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240225-1-30&t=2&akid=7681%2E3935704%2Eq4hR7T)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-feb24.xFye0V&amount=3&t=21&akid=7681%2E3935704%2Eq4hR7T)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-feb24.ECBkZg&refcode=em240225-1-30&t=22&akid=7681%2E3935704%2Eq4hR7T)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-feb24.1YUSOD&refcode=em240225-1-30&t=23&akid=7681%2E3935704%2Eq4hR7T)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-feb24.peL0cH&refcode=em240225-1-30&t=24&akid=7681%2E3935704%2Eq4hR7T)**
---
****

Gabby Giffords

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7681%2E3935704%2Eq4hR7T) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Mike Soboleski
subject: Busy Week Solving Problems
body:
Wrapping Up the Week
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G394tUq5IUkGv1zY5z4n9g8-d13hyX8HHuwEa5T65piCwY1gEV5zFPECIi7Y6q7Kc8JLzonB9p7CPGtveduvSG0BGtCRiXehPcCBSCsawrkzbwp3cfAgYBPhGqappmyrOiJUoo_lLWItQv5zyjXCnw==&c=-InP9GFp8-_AKizB7A1y9UGqt1h3tWH4o6vvjoIVOTceJdv-yXvBpw==&ch=zKkz23tjJQzp9-9GnESljH62uwY4FG4mRfBZIO6r8wjBkd9M44bpcQ==)
---
---
|
# ONE OF US- FIGHTING FOR US!
---
---
| Fellow Patriots,

---
|
---
| My friends,
It's been absolutely wonderful getting out there and hearing about the issues Mainers are concerned about. I've listened to what our people have been saying, and I've taken action to fix some of these problems on a state level.
On Tuesday, I offered testimony on LD 2204 which is a bill I'm cosponsoring to take action on the illegal marijuana grows by foreign actors from adversarial nations. This bill will give our prosecutors the tools they need to eradicate this problem from our state. Once I get to Washington, DC, I will do everything I can to close the border to stop this problem from plaguing our small towns.
On Thursday, after working behind the scenes I was able to get bipartisan support from the Legislative Leadership to advance my bill to fix the proposed EV mandate. My bill will take the vote for this away from the Board of Enivronmental Protection and give it to the Maine House to decide. The People will get a chance to vote on this through their elected representatives! This is great news for Maine.
After our work was done over three legislative session days, we kept our motor running and hit the campaign trail. Team Soboleski attended events in Orland, Fryeburg, Millinocket and Androscoggin County.
It was a great week of work and camaraderie all over Maine. I wish you and yours the absolute best this week and beyond. We'll be back to work for the people of Maine bright and early tomorrow!
P.S. Thanks for the sandwiches, Millinocket!

Stay safe,
Mike
---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
the values of hard work, determination, and persistence |
#
Hi there – This is Senator Jacky Rosen. I'm running for reelection in Nevada, and right now, I need your help. But first, let me share a little bit about myself. I'm the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. Growing up, my family always taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence. It's these values that have guided me on every step of my journey – from becoming the first in my family to graduate from college to defying the odds and unseating a Republican Senate incumbent in 2018. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79711115/457266594/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240225_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTUxZjg5My0wNWQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zVnECtv-08Vr4EAYVZe36e3AVyGKRGlBiVGNKNYkW9o=) My path to Congress has been anything but traditional, and I wouldn't trade it for the world. I'm all in to keep delivering real progress to working families in Nevada and across the country – but there's a problem: **With experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, the GOP is doing everything it can to defeat me. clean_body: the values of hard work, determination, and persistence | Hi there – This is Senator Jacky Rosen. I'm running for reelection in Nevada, and right now, I need your help. But first, let me share a little bit about myself. I'm the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. Growing up, my family always taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence. It's these values that have guided me on every step of my journey – from becoming the first in my family to graduate from college to defying the odds and unseating a Republican Senate incumbent in 2018. = My path to Congress has been anything but traditional, and I wouldn't trade it for the world. I'm all in to keep delivering real progress to working families in Nevada and across the country – but there's a problem: With experts at FiveThirtyEight saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, the GOP is doing everything it can to defeat me. I need to raise $100,000 before the end of the month to fight back and win – but unfortunately, I'm falling short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jacky Rosen and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for reading my story – and for standing with me. Jacky Rosen Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

subject: Say goodbye to Social Security under Eric Hovde

body:
| Hovde is out of touch with Wisconsinites on the issues that matter most.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2091%2E35263%2Ey_9swZ)
Peter, we’re going to get right to the point: Eric Hovde is too extreme and out of touch to represent Wisconsin in the U.S. Senate. Don’t believe us? Just take Hovde’s own words. He “absolutely” wants to: 1️⃣ Cut Social Security benefits 2️⃣ Raise the retirement age 3️⃣ Fully repeal the _Affordable Care Act_ _But we’re not all that surprised... What do you expect from a right-wing megamillionaire bank owner with a $7 million ocean view mansion in California?_ Hovde is out of touch with Wisconsinites on the issues that matter most. We absolutely cannot let him flip this seat and advance Republicans’ extreme agenda. But he’s promised to self fund his campaign to the tune of $20 million, so defeating him won’t be easy. **[Will you make a donation to Tammy’s campaign to defeat Eric Hovde and keep Wisconsin blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240225_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2091%2E35263%2Ey_9swZ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-feb24.LnIHXA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240225_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2091%2E35263%2Ey_9swZ)

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: A court should not decide whether or not you can start a family
body:
I’m sure by now you’ve seen the ruling that came out of the Alabama Supreme Court that embryos are now considered children under state law.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79711863/457267662/444630146?refcode=2-25-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0ZTAxZGIyLTA2ZDQtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PaklwNIX82kZSfJ5w23LHUV92igsyDUuj5MeND-NK4E=)
---
| | Friend, I’m sure by now you’ve seen the ruling that came out of the Alabama Supreme Court that embryos are now considered children under state law. After three Alabama couples undergoing IVF lost their frozen embryos in an accident at the storage facility, the Court said that these couples can sue the clinic and hospital for wrongful death of a minor child. Since then, many IVF clinics in Alabama have stopped their IVF services and patients who have long wanted to become parents are left in the dark about their family’s future. Experts warned that conservatives would attack fertility services in the aftermath of the Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_ in 2022, and that is exactly what is happening in Alabama right now. **This IVF ruling is heartbreaking for families in Alabama, and we can expect the fallout from it to have nationwide effects. The far right has been chipping away at reproductive rights for decades, and now they’re taking away people’s ability to have children.** **[This is yet another example of how a Supreme Court captured by extremist conservatives has paved the way for the erosion of our fundamental rights and freedoms. It’s up to all of us to keep fighting for a Supreme Court that represents the will of the people and not just conservative billionaires. Stand with us in this fight and chip in $10 right now to help us bring sanity back to the Court.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79711864/457267663/444630146?refcode=2-25-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0ZTAxZGIyLTA2ZDQtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PaklwNIX82kZSfJ5w23LHUV92igsyDUuj5MeND-NK4E=)** Listen, we’ve heard countless experts say that the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ could lead to catastrophic effects, not just for abortion rights, but for fertility care as well. They were right, and what’s happening in Alabama right now is a prime example of that. Without action IVF will be effectively outlawed in the state, and potentially throughout the rest of the country as well. Our hearts go out to the countless Americans now left wondering whether extremist politicians and judges will be able to determine whether or not they will be able to start a family. It’s simply not right. **[This is unacceptable behavior from our judicial system that is supposed to be above partisan politics. As conservatives continue to have significant sway over the court system’s decisions, it’s more important than ever to protect reproductive and fertility care throughout the country. Please contribute $10 now and we can work together to fight for an unbiased, independent judiciary.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79711865/457267664/444630146?refcode=2-25-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0ZTAxZGIyLTA2ZDQtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PaklwNIX82kZSfJ5w23LHUV92igsyDUuj5MeND-NK4E=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: Sam Eppler
subject: I’ll get straight to the point!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress
body:
Our campaign has been gaining momentum recently, earning endorsements from the Dallas Morning News, Progress Texas, and more!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79711937/457267875/-1392637619?refcode=BLU_EM_SEC_2024-02-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljYzU2MWQtMDdkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jp9ieyCF3_PJloM36D5xQfQW25rKOh1NJ4d53OTaIug=)
---

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

body:
If we can flip this seat, we can save the Senate.
| Folks, we can’t make this any clearer:
**The actions we take _right now_ could _make-or-break_ our ability to hold onto the Senate in November!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62877?t=6&akid=13135%2E878179%2E8w4r49) [MAGA Republicans are throwing every dark money dollar and attack ad in the book at Democrats like Colin Allred — _but we simply can’t fight back without your help._ We’re counting on 150 supporters like you to rush $7 before our midnight deadline! Chip in now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62877?t=7&akid=13135%2E878179%2E8w4r49) | [**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: CHIP IN $7 TO BOOST DEMOCRATS LIKE COLIN ALLRED TO VICTORY & SAVE OUR SENATE MAJORITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62877?t=8&akid=13135%2E878179%2E8w4r49)
---
* * *
**Republicans know:** If they lose in Texas, it'll be nearly impossible for them to take control of the Senate... _so they’re pouring MILLIONS into defeating Colin Allred!_

**But we know:** [If just 150 Democrats step up before our deadline, we’ll have the resources we need to push back against the MAGA machine and retire far-right Republicans like Ted Cruz. Please friend, chip in $7 right now! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62877?t=9&akid=13135%2E878179%2E8w4r49)
**GOAL: 150 DONATIONS || EMERGENCY DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

subject: Do this before ear ringing wipes out your entire memory 😱
body:
Untitled Document

Top Articles of
the Week

Do this before ear ringing wipes
out your entire memory 😱

Jill Biden blindsided Joe with a
devastating secret

Supreme Court ruling hands Joe
Biden and the Left a devastating loss

Senate Republicans release
incriminating video of a top Democrat Senator

Donald Trump ended Nikki Haley's
campaign with this one sentence

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

If you're suffering from ringing, buzzing,
whooshing, or hissing sounds in the ears…

It's time to take action-fast!

A recent eye-opening Harvard study uncovered
the harsh reality: those persistent, debilitating sounds you hear
mean your brain is under constant attack.

Did you know? Each passing month living with
tinnitus, it's like saying goodbye to 3% of your brain cells.

And here's the scary part…

It's only a matter of time before ear ringing
leads to permanent deafness or worse, a sudden wipe-out of your
cherished memories.

But there's hope…

Because scientists revealed a 5-second
military "mute button method" to silence the whooshing, hissing,
or ringing sounds, all while revitalizing your brain naturally
and quickly.

-> STOP ear ringing and save your precious
memories before it's too late

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79714396/457272399/-401216107?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWE4ZjUwZjQtMDhkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oZBRXECWm9ZIFeHZ6nip-88IfYm6yFUd-19JtQbNm4Q=)
This is infuriating.

Last week, the Alabama Supreme Court made a shock ruling that frozen embryos created through in vitro fertilization are considered children under state law. It led some fertility facilities to pause IVF treatments outright.

My opponent David Schweikert weighed in saying he will “oppose efforts to restrict it.”

**Please. Give me a break. Here’s the truth: Schweikert co-sponsored the Life at Conception Act -- a bill that would strip away women’s reproductive rights including through in vitro.** It’s the same framework that led to the Alabama Supreme Court’s decision to begin with.

Listen, when Schweikert shows you who he is the first time, believe him. It's pure hypocrisy, and it's on display so shamelessly.

This is just the next step in the anti-choice playbook. Schweikert has also voted for a national abortion ban and to limit access to contraception.

clean_body: | | | = | | I love campaigning, friends. These past few months have been an absolute joy. I wanted to share some more pictures with you today: = I love getting to know voters and talking at events like these, hearing directly from you, friends. = = | | I’m also proud to have the endorsements of over 40 public officials and tons of non profit organizations. Just this month I was endorsed by 314 Action, a non-profit organization committed to electing candidates with a science background to Congress. As an engineer, I know how important it is to elect candidates who believe in actual facts instead of Donald Trump’s “alternative facts.” = We need to continue our momentum forward and onwards. = = I really appreciate all your help and support. Meeting some of you in person has been amazing. Here’s me with a local democratic club in Brea: = Friends, I’ve taken an ALL-in grassroots approach to fundraising. That means our effort is funded by folks like you giving what you can to emails like this one. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, I appreciate your help! – Allyson Paid for by Allyson for Congress Allyson for Congress PO Box 1813 Tustin, CA 92781-9998 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | [**_I’m sorry to drop into your inbox on a Sunday, but I had to tell you: As of 12pm, I’m falling $5,103 short of my End of Month Fundraising goal. So, I’m coming to you personally. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Trapping young women in anti-abortion states
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
We just launched an ad campaign in Tennessee to make sure people are aware of this extreme piece of legislation.

Republicans are not stopping at overturning Roe v. Wade.
**Multiple states are considering legislation that would trap desperate young girls in states without access to abortion care -- including rape victims -- and scare off with the threat of imprisonment anyone who would seek to help them.**
These proposed travel ban bills deny women the opportunity to go to a freedom state like California, taking away the right to travel that’s guaranteed by the 4th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution.
They also come on the heels of a report showing that nearly 65,000 rapes have resulted in pregnancy in the 14 states with total abortion bans since Dobbs.
65,000.
Make absolutely no mistake, this new legislation is about Republican efforts to create a backdoor nationwide abortion ban. It is incredibly unpopular, and they are hoping no one will notice.
We're not going to let them get away with that.
**We just launched an ad campaign in one of the states – Tennessee – to make sure people are aware of this extreme piece of legislation.**
[**We hope you'll watch the ad and, if you are so moved, contribute directly to the Tennessee Democratic Party to help them stop this bill before it becomes law.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-tn?refcode=em240225&noskip=true&refcode2=1855_4767699__JvIaa&akid=1855%2E4767699%2E_JvIaa)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-tn?refcode=em240225&noskip=true&refcode2=1855_4767699__JvIaa&akid=1855%2E4767699%2E_JvIaa)
[WATCH AND DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-tn?express_lane=fale&refcode=em240225&noskip=true&refcode2=1855_4767699__JvIaa&akid=1855%2E4767699%2E_JvIaa)
Thank you,
Gavin Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1855%2E4767699%2E_JvIaa).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Sam Brown
subject: They blew up my body, but they’ll never destroy my spirit...
body:
You can never take away the heart of a soldier

| |
---
| | | Friend,

**[This was God's message for me.](http://links.conservativetribune.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ca190c30c48341ff9179d8168e43453a&_e=Mw2Q3EHBOeqMg-7PMYp5FWMugKP-IEOVEdh865XPDPnuuHfXPr3ZqYqHZO9JaqNt06nAbx_xO6yh6ashcwUhbgVDYoHF2TnZQRtcM496aBwRK2XwEFw0hUKG-RucFLlQdvbnIB4mzKahbStjey7O4FBiX6e8KsvzweyEi4Sm6uz88fXkKw2hGej7wkEfn2mAVJCpD2WcJObF7u51ttLKiMyVWteRfsOzdPx-PHKBAw1TJzz7R81Mof2X5ct7n_L3htLqFVUN8x0j6ZSUQVkFzy_WC4fOhlYKxcVdafXuWkgvpxbA_OJXqs5kyCbVepDnULIjl_uSmZ7Oa5t1X9hk9Q%3D%3D "This was God’s message for me. ")**

I didn't know if I was going to survive -- but I knew if I did, my life would belong to Him forever.

In 2008, a roadside bomb in Afghanistan left me with burns over half my body. This was my vehicle after the explosion.

---
| [](http://links.conservativetribune.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ca190c30c48341ff9179d8168e43453a&_e=Mw2Q3EHBOeqMg-7PMYp5FWMugKP-IEOVEdh865XPDPnuuHfXPr3ZqYqHZO9JaqNt06nAbx_xO6yh6ashcwUhbgVDYoHF2TnZQRtcM496aBwRK2XwEFw0hUKG-RucFLlQdvbnIB4mzKahbStjey7O4FBiX6e8KsvzweyEi4Sm6uz88fXkKw2hGej7wkEfn2mAskBZUq-b9kIglgRM_AiYaWUIQs64SiMXbGBlgmEBVdz6-S0_K2AFDimYXDCEX525FgGIRti7BTA_JwvWpYoA5LdcK3vwZ0egVh6-Qmylv6Sy7Mbtc4LmExrspBGH3Y8qNP595JC7axF2Ol3mkpBRhw%3D%3D)
---

My path to recovery wasn't easy -- I spent months wondering if my life could ever be the same, asking myself why God spared me that day.

**But that was God 's way of speaking to me, THIS was His message to me...His plan for me.**

Friend, I realized that my life would NEVER be the same, but that was okay. I was alive for one reason:

_**My new life belonged not to me, but to Him.

That's why I've lived every day since with three things in mind: My country, my family, and God Himself. **_

God used the tragedy that resulted in my injuries to tell me something.

Through 3 years of recovery and over 30 surgeries- I was never alone. Not for one second.

God stayed with me through it all and he made it clear to me that I was NOT called to wish for my old life.

**Instead, I was called to live my new life to the fullest in service to Him.**

That's why I spent the last 15 years starting my family, serving fellow veterans through the business I started, and most recently, **[I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.](http://links.conservativetribune.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ca190c30c48341ff9179d8168e43453a&_e=Mw2Q3EHBOeqMg-7PMYp5FWMugKP-IEOVEdh865XPDPnuuHfXPr3ZqYqHZO9JaqNt06nAbx_xO6yh6ashcwUhbgVDYoHF2TnZQRtcM496aBwRK2XwEFw0hUKG-RucFLlQdvbnIB4mzKahbStjey7O4FBiX6e8KsvzweyEi4Sm6uz88fXkKw2hGej7wkEfn2mAwl6Sz70DZTZlJGUXwjI87ki6FFlU-uZIqefmxGXTwfE2AEEaWUB5I6rwRR7TIE0yxHKwGFgoBteebQmoJd_YDdTn_gliBG5uJ0vHXRcpt-ZKXwM_OiG3xQYNx-2L-LltrXFzjBf5_L70KAEiuRuh3g%3D%3D "I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.")**

America is at a tipping point.

Corrupt leaders are leading us into total madness.

Our border is collapsing.

Parents are being cut-off from their children in schools.

We're spending away our future and the future of our children's children.

I'm running for U.S. Senate to bring a new generation of Conservative leadership to Washington D.C.

But to do that, Friend, I'll need your help.

So I'm hoping that you can help me with 1 or 2 things.
1. Would you please keep me and my family in your prayers as we take on some of the most powerful elites in the world?
2. **[Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?](http://links.conservativetribune.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ca190c30c48341ff9179d8168e43453a&_e=Mw2Q3EHBOeqMg-7PMYp5FWMugKP-IEOVEdh865XPDPnuuHfXPr3ZqYqHZO9JaqNt06nAbx_xO6yh6ashcwUhbgVDYoHF2TnZQRtcM496aBwRK2XwEFw0hUKG-RucFLlQdvbnIB4mzKahbStjey7O4FBiX6e8KsvzweyEi4Sm6uz88fXkKw2hGej7wkEfn2mAV7n7jG-1xgmPYuRsw-qRMcFzbTbnN6ruFf-YJldEx-2Nt1nOcLKuwAJ73_ZV5bKhsqF3ZorZRt8tt5L2F36O1LxUd8ZtWlNVhBnitCABMCwUlD9dZ5il363eyN0mGQ1sV2AUFLt25LpwruraxH7hZA%3D%3D "Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?")** I don't come from money and I'm no millionaire- that means that support from people like you will have a real impact on this election.

Asking for help isn't something that comes easy for me. I'm a combat veteran and a man of faith. But God has humbled me enough to know that I can't do this with HIM and without people like YOU.

Duty First,
---
| [](http://links.conservativetribune.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ca190c30c48341ff9179d8168e43453a&_e=Mw2Q3EHBOeqMg-7PMYp5FWMugKP-IEOVEdh865XPDPnuuHfXPr3ZqYqHZO9JaqNt06nAbx_xO6yh6ashcwUhbgVDYoHF2TnZQRtcM496aBwRK2XwEFw0hUKG-RucFLlQdvbnIB4mzKahbStjey7O4FBiX6e8KsvzweyEi4Sm6uz88fXkKw2hGej7wkEfn2mAGGXars-mLalmuliG8YW5NUA3utmOSvkc5jtddnGDXxg_o3gFk6oqx3HK1Htwbr1GcArbXzj-J0GaiDGK10K-WOJ7SWoguIOzGWbuhyk2Sr-RFmFgjEOOZ32H_un9wyNnqGYQPGvlvsgdKH02Q2046w%3D%3D)
---

Sam Brown

name: Team Bennet
subject: Trump’s abortion plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_022524_Abortion_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_022524_Abortion_act]
Friend,
Since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , Michael has been working nonstop to protect reproductive rights nationwide.
The Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade was the result of a decades-long effort to ban abortion. But Republicans won’t stop there.
If Democrats lose control of Congress and the White House, a nationwide abortion ban won’t just be a possibility — it will be a reality. The New York Times just reported that Donald Trump supports a 16-week ban:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_022524_Abortion_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_022524_Abortion_act]
Protecting reproductive rights has been one of Michael’s top priorities.
He has fought hard to ensure that service members and veterans can access reproductive care and that women's privacy remains protected.
He’s traveling across Colorado to help pro-choice Democrats win their elections.

name: VoteVets

body:
You might see a lot of people talking about how Russian influence has infiltrated our politics, but you won’t see many identifying why Russian expansion is such a threat to our own National Security.
#
Derek, there are a lot of strong organizations out there.
Good organizations with incredible expertise and important goals and objectives.
This one is a bit different than most.
VoteVets is a voice for Veterans, for Military Families, for people who worked in National Security roles in government.
You might see a lot of people talking about how Russian influence has infiltrated our politics, but you won’t see many identifying why Russian expansion is such a threat to our own National Security.
You’ll see even less making it the center of the argument they’re making.
But that’s what we’re doing here.
Trump isn’t just weird, objectionable, insulting, or rude. He’s dangerous. He’s a puppet for Putin, and he’s encouraged Putin to invade sovereign nations.
That is as sure a path to global war as there ever has been.
Some people still think Trump and the GOP are “pro-military”. There’s nothing “pro-military” about tearing our Constitution to shreds and letting authoritarians and dictators conquer the world.
Someone has to make that argument.
We will.
If that sounds good to you, and if you’re willing to help us make sure every American knows what a threat Trump is to our own National Security, please:
**[Make a donation to VoteVets today.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb24.ZR8EG7&refcode=em240225-1-30&t=1&akid=24924%2E3013755%2EGMLHwF)

clean_body: Will you sponsor a yard sign? | = Hi there team, I just launched my merch store last week (you should absolutely check it out if you haven't already 🤗) and I've already run into a bit of a problem. It's a good problem to have, but here's the deal: yard signs are in super high demand, but they're also super expensive to make. Yard signs are one of the best ways to get your name out there and with a primary this crowded, I need to paint the town Harry! So I'm wondering if you can chip in $16 (the amount it takes to make a yard sign) so I can make sure Maryland's 3rd district is covered corner to corner with Dunn for Congress! = | = | = ---|--- Like I said, this primary is really crowded – there's 22 candidates in the running! And as silly as it may sound, a yard sign could encourage a voter to look me up. They'd find out that I'm a Maryland native, a girl dad, and a former Capitol police officer who defended the Capitol and everyone in it with my bare hands on January 6. They'd find out I support abortion rights, voting rights and defending our country from far-right extremism. And maybe, (hopefully), they'd vote for me, or chip in to my campaign. Maybe they'd even buy a yard sign to support me! = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = -Harry 💙 = = | = = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79718568/457278963/1033648996?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTc5NzlmMTEtMTBkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YRvcLWkS4_JIo0OtGPs9mO66bfeWFqR_kcAbV4WUl-A=)
Peter,

At the end of this email, **[I am going to ask you to chip in $3 toward our grassroots movement to keep CA-47 blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79718570/457278964/1033648996?refcode=em-2.25.24-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTc5NzlmMTEtMTBkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YRvcLWkS4_JIo0OtGPs9mO66bfeWFqR_kcAbV4WUl-A=)** But first, I need to share some important news from the campaign trail:

Results from a recent poll show us with a lead over our likely Republican opponent, Scott Baugh. This poll shows we are ahead of Baugh by a one-point margin of 43%-42%.

**But it gets better: When voters hear about my background, our lead surges to a 14-point margin!** This shows that when CA-47 voters learn about my plans to safeguard reproductive rights, protect our environment, and stand up to GOP attacks on Medicare and Social Security, we can win this race.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79718571/457278967/1033648996?refcode=em-2.25.24-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTc5NzlmMTEtMTBkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YRvcLWkS4_JIo0OtGPs9mO66bfeWFqR_kcAbV4WUl-A=)
This poll proves we have what it takes to clinch this ultra-competitive seat for Democrats, and voters are fired up about our movement. But with 9 days until our primary election, we need the resources to ramp up our on-the-ground operations to spread the word.

**[It is absolutely critical that this seat remains blue. Can I count on you to chip in your first donation of $3 toward our end-of-month fundraising goal to stand with me and get it done?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79718572/457278968/1033648996?refcode=em-2.25.24-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTc5NzlmMTEtMTBkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YRvcLWkS4_JIo0OtGPs9mO66bfeWFqR_kcAbV4WUl-A=)**

clean_body: Before time runs out! | We have good news and bad news, folks... GOOD NEWS: 👉 Marsha Blackburn is among the least popular U.S. Senators — Tennesseans know she’s abandoned them to her greed & radicalism. 👉 Meanwhile, Gloria Johnson is growing a NATIONWIDE movement unlike anything TN has seen before. Folks are fired up to elect her to fight for us! BAD NEWS: 👉 Unfortunately, Marsha has over $7 million in her campaign bank account to defeat us. That’s what happens when you pledge allegiance to corporate PACs & special interests. 👉 And Gloria’s grassroots fundraising has slowed in recent days. Y’all, we HAVE to turn things around and capitalize on this chance to defeat Marsha Blackburn. Gloria needs a SURGE of support before her end-of-month deadline on Thursday to stay competitive — because, unlike Marsha, Gloria doesn’t take a CENT from corporate PACs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. body:
|
#

Team — We have a lot to be proud of since Fight Like Hell PAC was created: The progress that Governor Gretchen Whitmer has made in Michigan. Our support for progressive and pro-choice candidates nationwide. This strong grassroots team that has supported us every step of the way. But one of the things we’re most proud of is this — **$23.68.** That’s how much, on average, someone chips into our movement from an email like this. We can’t express how much it means to us that so many of you take time out of your day to read our emails and donate to our movement. Your contributions show Republican extremists that we’re not going to sit back and let them rip away our fundamental rights. That we’ll _always_ stand up to protect working people and their families. clean_body: | Team — We have a lot to be proud of since Fight Like Hell PAC was created: The progress that Governor Gretchen Whitmer has made in Michigan. Our support for progressive and pro-choice candidates nationwide. This strong grassroots team that has supported us every step of the way. But one of the things we’re most proud of is this — $23.68. That’s how much, on average, someone chips into our movement from an email like this. We can’t express how much it means to us that so many of you take time out of your day to read our emails and donate to our movement. Your contributions show Republican extremists that we’re not going to sit back and let them rip away our fundamental rights. That we’ll always stand up to protect working people and their families. And that you all are committed to fighting like hell to build a country where everyone has the opportunity to thrive. We’re proud of the fact that people like you are the reason we built this movement and are also the reason that we’re able to keep it going.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This grassroots team continues to amaze us every single day. body:
It’s go big or go home!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79719129/457280027/1328794144?refcode=ea.de979f11-10d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.de979f11-10d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlOTc5ZjExLTEwZDQtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=scJ_6sz1UZmb2K5aHJE7nueQi2HRqGrYIQjcqGcRRjo=&emci=8964a3b8-87d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=de979f11-10d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=4823105)
---
Our climate champions are making a difference. Period. Just look at Chicago’s mayor Brandon Johnson. Mayor Johnson’s administration is taking bold action to hold the titans of the oil and gas industry accountable. **Chicago is suing five major oil and gas companies for intentionally misleading the public about the harm their products do to our planet and our communities — and demanding these companies reimburse the city for climate-related damages.** This is a testament to why local elections matter. Even when Congress is gridlocked, Jane PAC’s endorsed climate champions like Mayor Johnson are taking decisive action to combat the climate crisis. Now, Chicago is joining dozens of other cities and states to hold Big Oil accountable in court. This collective action underscores the power and importance of local leadership in our battle against climate change. For too long, companies like BP, Chevron, and Exxon Mobil have peddled their deadly products to a trusting public, and equally deadly lies at every step. While they reap massive profits to line their pockets and fill campaign coffers to protect their agenda, we, the people, are stuck with the true costs. And we’re paying for it with our health, our livelihoods, and the chance of a livable future. From the smog that blankets our cities to fires that turn our skies red to floods that destroy our homes, the impacts are sometimes hard to fathom. **Mayor Brandon Johnson is here to say _enough is enough._** **[Add your name below to support Mayor Johnson and demand justice for our planet, our communities, and future generations. Click here to add your name if you want more elected officials to follow Mayor Johnson’s lead!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79719130/457280028/-1951674580?refcode=ea.de979f11-10d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.de979f11-10d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlOTc5ZjExLTEwZDQtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=scJ_6sz1UZmb2K5aHJE7nueQi2HRqGrYIQjcqGcRRjo=&emci=8964a3b8-87d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=de979f11-10d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=4823105)** | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79719131/457280030/-1951674580?refcode=ea.de979f11-10d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.de979f11-10d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlOTc5ZjExLTEwZDQtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=scJ_6sz1UZmb2K5aHJE7nueQi2HRqGrYIQjcqGcRRjo=&emci=8964a3b8-87d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=de979f11-10d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=4823105)

The Jane Fonda Climate PAC Team

name: Team Eugene
subject: Eugene is the Democratic frontrunner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
