name: Matt Cartwright
subject: GOP leadership has shown its true colors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
I ran for Congress to serve the people of our district and fight for the issues that matter most.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79719807/457282142/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWRmYzEzMC0xMWQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N2IzDJcb8N4o9NBDRc0rEnjYQLuJGSxJ0fm7vo0t464=&emci=27915696-8ad2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=cedfc130-11d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

**The GOP leadership has made it abundantly clear that they are more interested in scoring political points than serving the American people.** From obstructing crucial legislation to playing games with our democracy, they’ve shown their true colors.

We didn’t elect our leaders to play political games, we elected them to be our voice, to fight for us, and to make our lives better. It’s time to hold them accountable and ensure that Congress returns to its core tenet of serving the people. **That’s why I ran for Congress in the first place – to serve the people of our district and fight for the issues that matter most.**

The path to taking back the House starts right here in PA-08. **With national Republicans spending millions of dollars to hold onto their slim majority, we need to ensure that we have the resources to hold onto this “toss-up” seat.**

[**Can I count on you to chip in today to help us reach our end-of-month goal, keep PA-08 blue, and take back the House for the clean_body: I ran for Congress to serve the people of our district and fight for the issues that matter most. | Peter, The GOP leadership has made it abundantly clear that they are more interested in scoring political points than serving the American people. From obstructing crucial legislation to playing games with our democracy, they’ve shown their true colors. We didn’t elect our leaders to play political games, we elected them to be our voice, to fight for us, and to make our lives better. It’s time to hold them accountable and ensure that Congress returns to its core tenet of serving the people. That’s why I ran for Congress in the first place – to serve the people of our district and fight for the issues that matter most. The path to taking back the House starts right here in PA-08. With national Republicans spending millions of dollars to hold onto their slim majority, we need to ensure that we have the resources to hold onto this “toss-up” seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Matt In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | = | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

name: Mike Johnson ---- Speaker of the House
subject: This is the single most important email I’ve ever written:
body:
Can you spare JUST 2 minutes of your time?

| |
---
| | | Hi, Mike Johnson here.

I was recently named the 56th Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

**And from the start, I made it very clear:[I work for you, the American People.](http://links.lean-rightpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=039083b4a3f24af69bd7726adac31da5&_e=L-EezH_J1BkOKbq2JqBHc0awD2reG75mwu9jJsWDPzr9LhI7kzJ-YqQY6idwSkhsSsBu4S3kwLT0-KtHY32FR3N8brdmNX3OnRocCfDDw-cYggHxLBUWPLrZWJfTvkoNJorzcIcxLKWdGgky4HxVYMFxjtcQuXnbWGwpV2uehceXK1_HlftWOk7wGr59T1jGybn5-u0z-ID2V1SUn5W8DX0WzAjCxT6ARUO_zeQQ-gJ5YAtc1d2-210WkptW_d15JOWXx-cIClXowUEAGWnM4rkcHbvaB4RHOjeNK3_xE9ANORxoAwb_HxHdbqWs0JoGY_gUe9sDs4aStVlWsd-ti9-IV0xpLwa19sRGNAAxgRjVgUhoU2lK_1KtYbrw9Ud55Xvz_aRkOOld1lqN1Xl3zbGCTM3gxe9aGIDFwhHMBrs%3D "I work for you, the American People.")**

That is why I launched my first initiative as Speaker: A nationwide survey to collect feedback from our most informed, most reliable supporters.

_I 'm pleased to say you made the cut._

As part of this select group, I'm personally asking you to fill out my **[NEW SPEAKER SURVEY](http://links.lean-rightpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=039083b4a3f24af69bd7726adac31da5&_e=L-EezH_J1BkOKbq2JqBHc0awD2reG75mwu9jJsWDPzr9LhI7kzJ-YqQY6idwSkhsSsBu4S3kwLT0-KtHY32FR3N8brdmNX3OnRocCfDDw-cYggHxLBUWPLrZWJfTvkoNJorzcIcxLKWdGgky4HxVYMFxjtcQuXnbWGwpV2uehceXK1_HlftWOk7wGr59T1jGybn5-u0z-ID2V1SUn5W8DX0WzAjCxT6ARUO_zeQQ-gJ5YAtc1d2-210WkptW_d15iXs9_qw7JJsaQLVmLjFw4pNpirBEcz81vI2ejFFklq1LZqG01PDUl8VuDXaI-wcYp35f21nv1mpoC36cQGolvoWeGHwCW9ZLu475NtJItVla0m4C9vLLjmkORzc9pxacfHJ6Pz2eySrkUm2YHKTHjKIPrJlKZqdJv6Fv6TZzhmU%3D "NEW SPEAKER SURVEY")** before closing out of this email. I timed it myself and it shouldn't take more than five minutes to complete.

---
| | [TAKE MY NEW SPEAKER SURVEY ](http://links.lean-rightpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=039083b4a3f24af69bd7726adac31da5&_e=L-EezH_J1BkOKbq2JqBHc0awD2reG75mwu9jJsWDPzr9LhI7kzJ-YqQY6idwSkhsSsBu4S3kwLT0-KtHY32FR3N8brdmNX3OnRocCfDDw-cYggHxLBUWPLrZWJfTvkoNJorzcIcxLKWdGgky4HxVYMFxjtcQuXnbWGwpV2uehceXK1_HlftWOk7wGr59T1jGybn5-u0z-ID2V1SUn5W8DX0WzAjCxT6ARUO_zeQQ-gJ5YAtc1d2-210WkptW_d15jyq9pH1URAzqz-xIrprbz7mUjVCIx7HVs3L62Y0qwUnx3Zzc7WFyMaZ99DAzP0RubG-l7mBD2qc_7xaCIM0Deg7scjnsKkq-idnjJrBorcNA-Ytd93DDYwAT9gDcKjdIs3a1wa6x5dM2WTDImofXjuVSTXIaKm36145D0Rc09fE%3D "TAKE MY NEW SPEAKER SURVEY ")
---

I want to make myself perfectly clear:

I really value your feedback. As your Speaker, I want to know what concerns you most and how we can better serve you.

Once you fill out my survey, it'll immediately transmit your responses to me and my team.

_**I 'll be eagerly awaiting your feedback to come through. **_

Thanks for everything you do.

For America,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Roger Stone, Tucker Carlson, Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Friend,
Never did I imagine that I would become the right-wing’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. Never.
But if investigating Donald Trump and holding him accountable for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it.
If Roger Stone wants to call me a congenital liar and despicable huckster, so be it (a pretty rich insult coming from him if I do say so myself).
And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me, as he did in all caps on his social media, “SLIMEBALL ADAM ‘SHIFTY’ SCHIFF, ONE OF THE TRUE LOWLIFES IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS IN AMERICA” for holding him to account over and over and over again, so be it.
They are going after me because they know I am effective. Those that don’t concern them — they ignore. The last place Roger Stone or Donald Trump want me to be is in the United States Senate — because they know I will continue to hold their feet to the fire.
Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate by splitting $15 or any amount you can spare between Seth Moulton and my campaign ahead of our primary election. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
I won’t let any of these guys interfere with my work to defend our democracy.
I wear their enmity as a badge of honor, friend, and I appreciate your help in my work.

clean_body: [] Friend, Never did I imagine that I would become the right-wing’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. Never. But if investigating Donald Trump and holding him accountable for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it. If Roger Stone wants to call me a congenital liar and despicable huckster, so be it (a pretty rich insult coming from him if I do say so myself). And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me, as he did in all caps on his social media, “SLIMEBALL ADAM ‘SHIFTY’ SCHIFF, ONE OF THE TRUE LOWLIFES IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS IN AMERICA” for holding him to account over and over and over again, so be it. They are going after me because they know I am effective. Those that don’t concern them — they ignore. The last place Roger Stone or Donald Trump want me to be is in the United States Senate — because they know I will continue to hold their feet to the fire. Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate by splitting $15 or any amount you can spare between Seth Moulton and my campaign ahead of our primary election. [] I won’t let any of these guys interfere with my work to defend our democracy. I wear their enmity as a badge of honor, friend, and I appreciate your help in my work. Hi there,
It’s Patrick, Robert’s finance director. With only 9 days remaining until the California Primary, I wanted to reach out today with a quick — but important — note and share what’s been on my mind.
In just 9 days, Robert’s name will be on the ballot next to a few other folks — including his repeat MAGA competitor John Briscoe.
Over the past year, we have seen how far MAGA extremists are willing to go to get their way. Extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, and Mike Johnson have held the government hostage time and time again, forcing sham impeachments and political games to the House floor. Instead of serving their constituents, they continue to use their power to further the agenda of Donald Trump.
We risk having the same outcome for this seat and the people of Long Beach and Southeast LA if Briscoe unseats Robert. We cannot let another MAGA extremist enter the House.
So these next 9 days are going to be crucial to the success of this campaign. And truthfully, these 9 days are going to be difficult without your support.
**[So today, I am asking you to contribute whatever you can afford to Robert’s reelection campaign. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8Qmeg9neuVZb9oi747cWAhboXCLDHpRiSEVoBzMmgGQYcw7g9BHo2r6kkQEnJ0mkvW1zqPKoPMj6LGa-VMXMkj8UkGXGQd9PUJDrJ_43ElmDXamYAJKZOMdmpBld5wtipy8vX0zsDdTN1yjqYp6YUSSuIK7U80EJz8qFTJfFPJt92KKU51MKU9jcsbA3vVJyMDaQWszzRMb433ABykGXhljlYcGM984NmD-K0ymE5Fo0aT1J80lD02VkUhlf9ScVqnvBDpLv3sDieBHh7D9GCtG4vFOw1T1dSqxHMkB2XlXaIgMB2H-oLEusDqOaaF_NNMWIxLKoSYlEEACYYVP3Yu28_x03P0LSAy9iOO2tEZg2/445/ysJFW11qQe2KYreqVHYC7w/h0/8kv0139xIw8MeOM7cW5geOH1-hQnwi-INE9B3OiKUpw) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJKRB-czn2GC2HDE6ruHwxo4o3MEOFHqQauDkwBg44tFVe5jVbOu0bRNsR_FpIAcibg9x9GncJLuXf60A6sC6uITcxCjmAa-H9lOiMpvYEq7b4WhAwB6Gmy_DN1UfWcp21IA9RUERARxtqTKv1iiq-OoRsRRi1agI9CKQE6UhAxIiZM3e5uTPhrpofFmdz-ePvZiQpLnr9L62eOzV4K67l1vOa7XOhD4p9-Wd9EGkiog49Rkp0yvlW-wmcjCOlVns42VSM353HajEc1tYKGXWsTonrYDdrw9TzKCHMtEbipjMrgj5hgfcznrbvIrPEHe4DgZRPpbrd4vYTg1m6Xj-bHEu4mkWNzwvLHaTUT6ZNbOzhg9xoheWbYmtBax7ZVSPbEbU6iYKbJF8XxMaTOcOuBw/445/ysJFW11qQe2KYreqVHYC7w/h1/aCcdlxhmmuUBjq3SNqJrfXbzaiRepx7do-sh5V9yDPM)
Peter, former Republican Governor Larry Hogan jumping into Maryland’s open Senate race this late in the game throws a huge wrench into our plans to defend our razor-thin Senate majority.

This has the potential to turn the 2024 election cycle entirely upside down, because the stakes couldn’t possibly be any higher.

Everything we care about — _abortion access, affordable health care, climate justice, everything_ — hinges on our ability to maintain our narrow Senate majority.

**That’s why we need to stick to our campaign plan, Peter: Reach Maryland voters where they’re at and talk to them about a better future for our state.**

[Will you please consider splitting a donation between my Senate campaign and The Collective PAC to help us do that? **We need to counter our opponents’ HUGE spending advantages (to the tune of $30M+ on ads alone) by getting our Maryland-first message in front of voters by reaching them at their doors, on the phones, and in their communities.**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, former Republican Governor Larry Hogan jumping into Maryland’s open Senate race this late in the game throws a huge wrench into our plans to defend our razor-thin Senate majority. This has the potential to turn the 2024 election cycle entirely upside down, because the stakes couldn’t possibly be any higher. Everything we care about — abortion access, affordable health care, climate justice, everything — hinges on our ability to maintain our narrow Senate majority. That’s why we need to stick to our campaign plan, Peter: Reach Maryland voters where they’re at and talk to them about a better future for our state. | | Hogan’s involvement complicates things, but we had a plan in place before he announced, and it’s still the plan now: We need to counter our opponents’ HUGE spending advantages (to the tune of $30M+ on ads alone) by getting our Maryland-first message in front of voters by reaching them at their doors, on the phones, and in their communities. If we stick to that plan, Peter, and leave it all on the field to reach as many voters as possible, I’m confident that we can handle this and any other hurdle we come across. But that means ramping up our field operations sooner than expected, which is why I need your help TODAY: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Together, Angela Alsobrooks The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: MAGA retribution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79724972/457289024/38783913?refcode=em-2.25.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVhZjE3NS0xOGQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YSPz2M-VfElq7yi0Ukf1DUyPO_2lZPGm_ZBWyQq7KI=) Hi there - Wisconsin Secretary of State Sarah Godlewski here. After the results of the 2020 election were tallied and it was clear President Biden won, ten Republicans in Wisconsin chose to ignore the will of the people. Instead, they posed as fake electors for President Trump. The former head of the WI Republican Party, Andrew Hitt, was one of those electors. **Not only did Hitt just admit that Donald Trump lost the state of Wisconsin, but that he faked being an elector out of fear of MAGA retribution.** _A real profile in courage!_ The fake electors plot may have been foiled, but the danger from anti-democracy extremists still lurks: election officials are facing record levels of harassment and violence. And with election season ramping up, we can expect these attacks to ramp up too. My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are gearing up for the long fight ahead, but they need the support from grassroots Democrats like you: [That’s why I’m asking you to make a small $3 donation to the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State so they can elect democracy defenders across the nation. Will you chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79724973/457289025/38783913?refcode=em-2.25.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVhZjE3NS0xOGQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YSPz2M-VfElq7yi0Ukf1DUyPO_2lZPGm_ZBWyQq7KI=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79724974/457289026/38783913?refcode=em-2.25.24-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVhZjE3NS0xOGQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YSPz2M-VfElq7yi0Ukf1DUyPO_2lZPGm_ZBWyQq7KI=)**

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: 3 things you can do to save democracy
body:
Hi Friend,

The most common question I've gotten this year as I travel around the state trying to build our network of Democracy Defenders is some variation of "OK, I get it, our democracy is at risk. What am I supposed to do about it? How is that MY job?"

It's a great question. I go back to what my parents - who were both special education teachers - taught me. Everyone needs to have a seat at the table and equal access to opportunity in our country if our educational system and our economy are going to function and flourish. And they taught me that we all have a responsibility and a role to play in making that a reality.
Democracy is a decision. It's a choice we all have to make. And yes, with the threats our democracy faces, everyone has to step up and work together to defend it.
What about the "What can I do" part? I wanted to share an article I published today in my friend Maria Shriver's Sunday Paper [https://www.mariashriversundaypaper.com/jocelyn-benson-op-ed/] . I encourage you to read the whole article, but I'll share the three things you can do directly to ensure democracy prevails in 2024 :

1) Know the rules for voting in your state—and help others know them, too.
Elections are run at the state level. That means each state determines its own rules, from how and when you can register to vote to when and where you can cast your ballot. Become familiar now with the rules in your home state ( vote.org [https://www.vote.org/?ref=mariashriversundaypaper.com] is a great resource). And remember, your local election officials are your go-to source for all election needs. Find yours here [https://www.usvotefoundation.org/election-offices?ref=mariashriversundaypaper.com] and get in touch with them directly if you have questions.
Want to serve, literally, on the front lines of our democracy? Sign up to work at a voting location in your community! Being a poll worker gives you a unique chance to help your neighbors vote and ensure safe access to the ballot box for everyone. Visit Power to the Polls [http://www.powerthepolls.org/?ref=mariashriversundaypaper.com] to find out how to sign up to help in your area.

2) Call out lies about our elections when you see them and help us rise above the noise.
There are adversaries to democracy out there who want to divide and deceive all of us with lies and disinformation about our voting rules, election security, and the valid results of our elections. We can’t let them win. No matter where we live or who we plan to vote for, it’s on all of us to rise above the noise and speak the truth to our friends and neighbors. Look skeptically at any images, videos and other things that could be generated with artificial intelligence. This includes robocalls, which are increasingly used as a tool to spread false election information, like the call New Hampshire voters received just before their primary election purporting to be President Biden telling citizens not to vote.
Rely on trusted sources, like official local government and election officials’ websites, for your election information and seek out multiple sources for news—including voices who will challenge your beliefs rather than reinforce them. There are multiple websites that effectively debunk false and misleading statements, images, and videos from across the political spectrum. One of the most respected is Factcheck.org [https://www.factcheck.org/?ref=mariashriversundaypaper.com] from The Annenberg Public Policy Center. Other reliable sites include PolitiFact [https://www.politifact.com/?ref=mariashriversundaypaper.com] and RumorGuard [https://www.rumorguard.org/?ref=mariashriversundaypaper.com] . And when you find misinformation, don’t share it—expose it. Platforms like YouTube, Facebook and X have systems for reporting false information or go to reportdisinfo.org [http://reportdisinfo.org/?ref=mariashriversundaypaper.com] , to report misleading information.

3) This election will define who we are as a country for decades to come. Make your vote a reflection of that.
This will undoubtedly be a defining year for all of us. Our votes, as individuals and as a nation, reflect who we are and who we want to be in the years ahead. So, it’s on each and every one of us as Americans to ask ourselves in this moment: Who do we want to be moving forward? Do we want to feed the noise or rise above it? Do we want to elevate politicians who use divisive rhetoric, or support those who recognize we are all in this together and inspire us to celebrate our common humanity?
My hope is that we can unite collectively as an electorate and take a stand together, supporting candidates and amplifying voices on both sides of the aisle who speak the truth and demand the same of their fellow politicians. Our elected officials need to be able to disagree without being disagreeable, devote themselves to service above self-promotion, and commit themselves to bringing our country together instead of deploying rhetoric and other tactics that can tear us apart. It’s up to us, and the votes we cast, to send that message and demand that they do.

Let’s all decide to do our part. Because it will take all of us working together to make sure our democracy can work for everyone.
That's our mission, and if you'd like to sign up to volunteer and join our growing network of Democracy Defenders around the country, please click here and join me! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/XKcSYNkVzEe7gEpPDR9zew2]

Thank you for all that you do to defend our democracy.
-Jocelyn

Read and share now >> [https://www.mariashriversundaypaper.com/jocelyn-benson-op-ed/]
PAID FOR WITH REGULATED FUNDS BY MICHIGAN LEGACY PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE.
PO Box 21910, Detroit MI 48221.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Stuart=20Whitlow=20|=20Whitlow=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Honored to be endorsed by my friend, Commissioner Terry Cook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whitlow for Congress](https://whitlowforcongress
body:
Find out why top TX Democratic leaders are rallying for Stuart Whitlow for Congress ➡️ | | | | |
#### [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/02ac36fc8eb5/test-3bj3a7oq6q-388?e=b9b3f70fc1)
---
[](https://whitlowforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cf1793176d2a08f7e745bb54&id=653be39d32&e=b9b3f70fc1)
[](https://whitlowforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cf1793176d2a08f7e745bb54&id=979c85376d&e=b9b3f70fc1)
Hi Friend,
I’m proud to have earned the endorsement of my friend, Williamson County Commissioner Terry Cook.
I wanted to share what Terry said about why she endorsed my campaign:
“In these turbulent times, I am so proud to be able to endorse the candidacy of Round Rock native Stuart Whitlow for Congressional District 31, a candidate rising high above the fray.
Seldom do we benefit from someone with a lifetime of service to residents of Central Texas which illuminates his true character, focus and high energy level which is so needed for our Congressional District and for the Congress.
From his long and wholistic focus on supporting 2- and 4-yr educational opportunities, as well as technical skills development for low-income residents, including daycare assistance if needed, through his development of the non-profit Capital Idea programs to his dedication in providing legal assistance to low-income clients through the Texas Legal Service Center and to the training of young lawyers to be effectively responsive in that work.
This is a man of action, not just words, and fully one of demonstrated dedication to serving others. He will make a positive addition to congress and should rise swiftly to positions of leadership (directly and indirectly) filing thoughtful bills and mentoring others.
We will take pride in calling him our congressman.”
— Terry Cook
_Williamson County Commissioner_
I'm running for Congress to stand for ALL Texans. There's so much to get done for the families of this country, and it’s time to get Congress back on track.
[**If you agree with my friend, Commissioner Cook, that TX-31 needs leaders we can all be proud of, please chip in now to support my campaign for Congress.**](https://whitlowforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cf1793176d2a08f7e745bb54&id=166a313e5a&e=b9b3f70fc1)
| | | | | | | | | | [DONATE $10](https://whitlowforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cf1793176d2a08f7e745bb54&id=fcbd20ee7f&e=b9b3f70fc1)

I’ve spent a lifetime delivering real results for everyday folks here in District 31. And with your support, I’m ready to deliver for ALL Texans in Congress.
Thanks for being with me,
Stuart WhitlowDemocrat for U.S. Congress, TX-31
|

[](https://whitlowforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cf1793176d2a08f7e745bb54&id=743ced02b4&e=b9b3f70fc1)
Stuart Whitlow is a lifelong Democrat and a fifth-generation resident of TX-31 running to unseat Trump’s ally in Congress, MAGA Republican John Carter.
As a lawyer, Stuart has more than 35 years experience representing folks like us and taking on those in power. Now, he’s running for Congress to stand up for ALL Texans against the extremism of the MAGA movement.
Stuart’s opponent has put Trump’s interests ahead of America’s interests, and it’s wrecked havoc on Capitol Hill and here at home. Stuart knows that TX-31 needs a Congress that works for all us, not just for Donald Trump.
“We take care of each other here in Texas, and we deserve leaders in Congress who can be trusted to do the same. That's why I'm ready to fight for our values in Congress and stand up for ALL Texans. I'm asking for your support in the Democratic Primary on March 5th — so together, we can make sure our Texas values live on.”
— Stuart Whitlow
_Democrat for U.S. Congress, TX-31_

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: the slimmest margin
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, we didn’t start this cycle in the best position.
We needed to win every single competitive Senate race to hold control of the chamber.
Then, Joe Manchin pulled out — said he wouldn’t run for re-election.
That made our math even tougher.
With our margin as slim as it has ever been, there’s a lot riding on Arizona’s Senate campaign.
Ruben Gallego is taking on Kari Lake, one of the most dangerous politicians in the country. Kyrsten Sinema might still get in the race, which could change it in a big way.
One thing is constant in all scenarios: Ruben has to win in Arizona if we are going to hold control in the Senate.
[**So if holding the Senate and stopping the advance of the MAGA Queen, Kari Lake, is worth a donation of $3 to you, please: Chip it in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240225-2-120&t=1&akid=1993%2E734936%2E33sCvK)

If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=1993_734936_33sCvK&akid=1993%2E734936%2E33sCvK)
clean_body: Peter, we didn’t start this cycle in the best position. We needed to win every single competitive Senate race to hold control of the chamber. Then, Joe Manchin pulled out — said he wouldn’t run for re-election. That made our math even tougher. With our margin as slim as it has ever been, there’s a lot riding on Arizona’s Senate campaign. Ruben Gallego is taking on Kari Lake, one of the most dangerous politicians in the country. Kyrsten Sinema might still get in the race, which could change it in a big way. One thing is constant in all scenarios: Ruben has to win in Arizona if we are going to hold control in the Senate. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | ** Thank you, Team Gallego Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| | This week we got devastating news out of Alabama, where the state Supreme Court handed down a ruling effectively putting an end to in vitro fertilization, otherwise known as IVF, indefinitely. Countless Americans rely each year on the IVF process to have a baby, but this ruling will mean that countless couples in Alabama will be left unable to bring a child into their lives. When _Roe_ was overturned, I and many others warned that it was just the tip of the iceberg with how far Republicans nationwide would go to overturn Americans' rights to make health care decisions without government interference. Unfortunately, this latest news out of Alabama is further proof that we were right. This ruling was the direct result of _Roe_ being overturned. But Republicans aren't going to stop at abortion – they're gleefully going after every facet of freedom in our personal lives. They won't rest until there's a politician in every exam room and bedroom in the country. The decision to start a family is a deeply personal one, and one that brings joy to so many mothers and fathers around the country each and every day. Now, extremist Republicans have denied that right to start a family – denied that joy – to countless couples across Alabama. Make no mistake: they won't stop here. Republican lawmakers have made it clear they've set their sights on everything from a national abortion ban, to contraception, the right to marry who you love, and many other deeply personal freedoms. If Republicans are allowed to regain control of the Senate and White House, and maintain control in the House this November, they will go after our fundamental rights. We can be certain of that. Our country is at a crossroads, and our fundamental constitutional rights hang in the balance. It's never been more urgent that we reject Republican extremism in every corner of our nation and elect unapologetically pro-choice, progressive leaders to Congress. name: Sharice Davids
subject: This is a longer email, but I hope you’ll take a moment to read it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m running proudly on my record of getting things done despite the odds.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79726729/457294595/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc0MTU1MS0yMWQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPNTh71HzBqrnBwTH_fZkvV1i7ABsbiZ5mrDf2ANd1Q=) I know that when it comes to what makes headlines, chaos and dysfunction will always get more airtime than quiet, steady leadership. (And don’t get me wrong — there’s been a LOT of chaos and dysfunction recently.) But I’m not running for re-election just on opposing the House majority’s extremist agenda. I’m running proudly on my record of getting things done despite the odds. [_**If you already know you’re with me, I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in a few dollars to support my work, because we have a major fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days. But if you’d like to know more about my record and the progress I’ve helped deliver for Kansas families, please keep reading!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79726730/457294596/837329752?refcode=email_022524_My-record&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc0MTU1MS0yMWQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPNTh71HzBqrnBwTH_fZkvV1i7ABsbiZ5mrDf2ANd1Q=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79726731/457294597/837329752?refcode=email_022524_My-record&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc0MTU1MS0yMWQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPNTh71HzBqrnBwTH_fZkvV1i7ABsbiZ5mrDf2ANd1Q=)
---
Just since the start of this month, I voted for a **bipartisan set of tax cuts for middle-class families** — including a major expansion of the Child Tax Credit, which will benefit nearly 150,000 children in Kansas — and I also helped deliver grants to two local airports in our district that will **improve safety and create good-paying jobs.**
Those grants are just another example of all the progress for Kansas that was made possible by the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law I was proud to help pass. **In fact, that law has enabled Kansas to kick-start construction on 311 vital projects across our state.**
This is why it’s so important to have leaders who are grown-up enough to put partisanship aside and get things done.**Here are just a few of the other tangible results we’ve been able to achieve by working together:**
* Kansans on Medicare are **saving $620 a year on their insulin.**
* Kansas City was named a regional technology and innovation hub to **boost domestic manufacturing.**
* At least **20,000 clean energy jobs** were created here in the 3rd District (the most in the country).
* 5 million veterans have been **screened for toxic exposures** nationally.
* We’ve **brought in millions of dollars for rural communities here in Kansas** to expand broadband access, plug hazardous abandoned oil wells, fix aging roads and bridges, eliminate dangerous unmarked rail crossings, and bring clean water to every Kansas home.

Let’s be clear: there’s still so much work left to be done. We all agree we need action to lower the cost of housing and everyday expenses like groceries. We need to ensure that every farmer, rancher, and producer here in Kansas has the tools to succeed. And we need to stand firm in our fight to protect our democracy and defend the right to choose.
**That’s why I will always choose the path of getting things done and making a difference in people’s lives — because the issues we’re facing are too important to get sidetracked by extremism, division, or empty promises.**
[_**If that’s the kind of leadership you’d like to see more of in Congress, then I hope you will consider supporting my campaign today. There’s a lot more we need to get done for Kansas and for our nation, and winning this extremely competitive race — and continuing to make progress — is going to take every single one of us.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79726732/457294598/837329752?refcode=email_022524_My-record&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc0MTU1MS0yMWQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPNTh71HzBqrnBwTH_fZkvV1i7ABsbiZ5mrDf2ANd1Q=)

body:
Hi friend, I’m Andrea Salinas’ dog Cooper and it’s not far-fetched to say that this race will be one of the closest in the country this year. It could even come down to just a paw-ful of votes.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79727258/457296595/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.25_b1_adc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGY3MzI2MC0yMmQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBAaV2AcqbD8qsy_URHv5y98tBr-tDfhDx0faEzmE74=)
---
Hi friend, I’m Andrea Salinas’ dog Cooper and it’s not _far-fetched_ to say that this race will be one of the closest in the country this year. It could even come down to just a _paw-ful_ of votes. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79727259/457296596/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.25_b1_adc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGY3MzI2MC0yMmQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBAaV2AcqbD8qsy_URHv5y98tBr-tDfhDx0faEzmE74=) This election could _paw-sibly_ determine control of Congress – and with reproductive rights, tackling the climate crisis, health care, education and so much more on the line – it would be pretty _ruff_ if we fell short. subject: Please help me strike out this liberal lineup
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=a17af93c89ff4147ba5171b2c79b313e&_e=qilbuVYzLJmj8bd1HtkTL7cAv012phOI2PcPlVSgCH72ssvH_RhehSqbj2DeTnpGtbPh-mFsSFFRHyNyNCqufmDUKVyjnrecbdPe7B0lbtiTOcqaVBNk15q6wwtilvFxz2oYVrNzgkloVePfrLJfebePKIZkyVO78tviY7tJstuVnQNxtAzVyIeWcvIFdZ64FThayxG6ecIB7bw97GLsFXC_kDL6zrHpeqdT8zEGRrhnDuSEwv5yr6quPn8zdZRbw4lAttkL8VskyfIQMCFWcGNa7aKt-lbKHA3dD2sWqd0srombWNpuS9NPivIcSkThMub7TNiEpkKVW54hypoJApqHdo2j_emRBRObC2296fTKVv6ZHCcFlEGdibl1U8Zs0LEzsVyh0EnooJxF8Xqj8Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=a17af93c89ff4147ba5171b2c79b313e&_e=qilbuVYzLJmj8bd1HtkTL7cAv012phOI2PcPlVSgCH72ssvH_RhehSqbj2DeTnpGtbPh-mFsSFFRHyNyNCqufmDUKVyjnrecbdPe7B0lbtiTOcqaVBNk15q6wwtilvFxz2oYVrNzgkloVePfrLJfebePKIZkyVO78tviY7tJstuVnQNxtAzVyIeWcvIFdZ64FThayxG6ecIB7bw97GLsFXC_kDL6zrHpeqdT8zEGRrhcPZhXTDJmC36OGFAZSx5NijndxXReCK3Y1SE4cH3g3qsRiAIYwrGa0AzeJM9g7xjd04uUgt1kLaJKoC15IFik5W4C9D-Vg9D0udFCYIqhERz7bWxJfYaJiqcpr0xsXNW3DokHCdSd2mVFXu-6_-a0bP4UX8MI_Wi9gqQ4EdRWyw%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=a17af93c89ff4147ba5171b2c79b313e&_e=qilbuVYzLJmj8bd1HtkTL7cAv012phOI2PcPlVSgCH72ssvH_RhehSqbj2DeTnpGtbPh-mFsSFFRHyNyNCqufmDUKVyjnrecbdPe7B0lbtiTOcqaVBNk15q6wwtilvFxz2oYVrNzgkloVePfrLJfebePKIZkyVO78tviY7tJstuVnQNxtAzVyIeWcvIFdZ64FThayxG6ecIB7bw97GLsFXC_kDL6zrHpeqdT8zEGRrjpDQhCsjNfHcQDz2S2rznVNCt3PaPUpoBIsowOn_p7nLrXx6TdJdoiIr1BM8izMMN0H2Ep4nZY1Yw63e6NOETLAGdJICCK5ILROAddSJkbI58MMFmCtWSRe5rKapcd_Sn9xOqiFLIih_xan0zii1V6NECqDtxQmw1ZHmnEOw5P-Q%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=a17af93c89ff4147ba5171b2c79b313e&_e=qilbuVYzLJmj8bd1HtkTL7cAv012phOI2PcPlVSgCH72ssvH_RhehSqbj2DeTnpGtbPh-mFsSFFRHyNyNCqufmDUKVyjnrecbdPe7B0lbtiTOcqaVBNk15q6wwtilvFxz2oYVrNzgkloVePfrLJfebePKIZkyVO78tviY7tJstuVnQNxtAzVyIeWcvIFdZ64FThayxG6ecIB7bw97GLsFXC_kDL6zrHpeqdT8zEGRrg8L3-kSV0g9Bz6J_jc9iWY-rmTjl3foOqAZEqjgTBXXgT3KLCcPgxtSMu9w5AUbdsXWB9FbzVG9b0pMGswHRLJl-VINSFvuGVGG7HGs2wGERXd_DkECcMhjhNaqpCPILjQ32g6HQx4Kf4sGU2c--s-HrUd16FzGI6nDsRJW67e4g%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=a17af93c89ff4147ba5171b2c79b313e&_e=qilbuVYzLJmj8bd1HtkTL7cAv012phOI2PcPlVSgCH72ssvH_RhehSqbj2DeTnpGtbPh-mFsSFFRHyNyNCqufmDUKVyjnrecbdPe7B0lbtiTOcqaVBNk15q6wwtilvFxz2oYVrNzgkloVePfrLJfebePKIZkyVO78tviY7tJstuVnQNxtAzVyIeWcvIFdZ64FThayxG6ecIB7bw97GLsFXC_kDL6zrHpeqdT8zEGRrgyG_OCo289IbeDZ694WPHZsDKiqAUldp0C7p8V7fwKxncMt6Knt8-u7dDSTTWTUZIvSIF4x_18y3Dt8TSiJyNm60k6Ef0PYR6EUsxgEGxNoFLH3sLv1VsPasFHTEWg_8G2UTZdc0zGAEna8gNw3FhedePIcm0sT-afxtSYF4eJ-w%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails **** |

name: David Hogg
subject: Gen Z will outlive the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I co-founded Leaders We Deserve because Gen Z’s answer to the NRA is electing more and more young people to public office to counter their agenda.

| Mark my words, Peter: **Gen Z will outlive the NRA.**

_The Daily Beast_ recently analyzed the NRA’s tax returns. They aren’t pretty.

In fact, the pro-gun group’s revenue has been on the decline for years now, especially since Parkland. _Last year, their fundraising was at its lowest point since 2008. And since 2018 they have lost over 1 million members._

I firmly believe that the NRA’s days are numbered—and as their power and influence fade into the dustbin of history, we will replace their corrupt, purchased politicians with a new generation of bold, courageous leaders who aren’t afraid to take urgent, necessary action to stop the scourge of gun violence in America.

**I co-founded Leaders We Deserve because Gen Z’s answer to the NRA is electing more and more young people to public office to counter their agenda.**

_**[With so much riding on the upcoming elections, we’re preparing now so we can elect the leaders we deserve in November. Will you split a $5 contribution to support Leaders We Deserve and Fight For Progress today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79727546/457297308/150752135?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-02-25_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjZmNjNzFjLTIzZDQtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yFFSnUZQ7_gkhPdC34gYdz5yijrJrmgFO9_tRTm9bNE=)**_

We founded Leaders We Deserve last year to elect the next generation of leadership—and folks across the country are already helping us shatter expectations.

Not only have tens of thousands of people just like you joined our movement and helped spread the word about our mission, we’ve already elected our very first candidate.

In the days leading up to the November election, we hit the streets in Virginia to knock on doors and get out the vote for Nadarius Clark. Thanks to our supporters’ donations, we were proud to invest more than $100,000 to support Nadarius’s campaign.

**When all the ballots were counted, Nadarius won by less than 2,000 votes.**

Leaders We Deserve is already playing an integral role in electing the next generation of leaders, and we’re counting on your continued support so we can keep winning these fights in 2024. There is too much on the line for us to lose.

[_**Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress can only be successful in November with your continued support, so can you split a $5 contribution or whatever makes sense for you today? Anything you can give will make a difference.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79727547/457297309/150752135?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-02-25_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjZmNjNzFjLTIzZDQtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yFFSnUZQ7_gkhPdC34gYdz5yijrJrmgFO9_tRTm9bNE=)

Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Colorado's 3rd congressional district.

clean_body: In 2022, the race between Lauren Boebert and me went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short. Hello, Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Colorado's 3rd congressional district. In 2022, the race between Lauren Boebert and me went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short. It was the closest race in the entire country. We've now scared off Boebert, and I know we can win this seat in November – but this race just got a lot harder, so I am counting on your continued support to be able to build a campaign strong enough to take on the Super PACs and win. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for having my back from the start. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Friend,
I'm meeting with the team later today to review our campaign strategy for next month and wanted to make sure I had some pointers from grassroots supporters like you going into it. If you've got a spare moment, **[can you let me know which issues matter most to you in this brief survey?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79727765/457298010/-1523870778?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk804-su-nd&refcode=jtk804-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTQzZGZlMDItMjVkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-GFAiHt66_eFehNXucpvnfa3b7PgeDzP_x9YqE4DQF0=&emci=c681c4cc-b6d1-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=a43dfe02-25d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**
Of course, I wish I could chat with you face-to-face to find out what's on your mind — the issues you and your family discuss around the kitchen table and the ones that keep you up at night.
But sadly, I can't be in two (_or 200_) places at once, so this survey is the next best way for me to get your feedback.
**This shouldn't take more than a few minutes from your busy day, and your insight will make a huge difference as we chart this campaign's course into the spring —[so please, can I count on you to add your thoughts to my survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79727766/457298011/-1523870778?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk804-su-nd&refcode=jtk804-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTQzZGZlMDItMjVkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-GFAiHt66_eFehNXucpvnfa3b7PgeDzP_x9YqE4DQF0=&emci=c681c4cc-b6d1-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=a43dfe02-25d4-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

clean_body: If you've got a spare moment, would you please share your top-priority issues with me in this brief survey? | | | Friend, I'm meeting with the team later today to review our campaign strategy for next month and wanted to make sure I had some pointers from grassroots supporters like you going into it. If you've got a spare moment, Of course, I wish I could chat with you face-to-face to find out what's on your mind — the issues you and your family discuss around the kitchen table and the ones that keep you up at night. But sadly, I can't be in two (or 200) places at once, so this survey is the next best way for me to get your feedback. This shouldn't take more than a few minutes from your busy day, and your insight will make a huge difference as we chart this campaign's course into the spring — | | Thank you for all your help, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: did you know, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12182?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1104%2E52803%2Eglcm6I ]van hollen and angela

Peter, it’s Senator Chris Van Hollen.

You might already know that I am enthusiastically supporting Angela
Alsobrooks because she will be a strong progressive partner in fighting
for the issues that all Marylanders care about in the U.S. Senate.

But did you know that Angela is facing a critical End-of-Month deadline on
Thursday?

And that if she doesn’t reach her $60,000 goal by Thursday at midnight,
she’ll run the risk of getting drowned out by her self-funded,
multi-millionaire opponent in this ultra-competitive race?

Trust me, I know firsthand how important small-dollar, grassroots
donations are to running a people-powered campaign in a race as
competitive as this one. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12182?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1104%2E52803%2Eglcm6I ]So please, will you rush a $25 donation right
away to support Angela for Senate and help Maryland elect a leader we can
ALL be proud of?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12182?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1104%2E52803%2Eglcm6I ]Donate

Peter, Angela knows how to deliver real results for Maryland’s
working families.

She has spent her career in public service fighting for the issues that
matter most—and I would be honored for Angela to join me in the Senate so
that, together, we can stand up to deep-pocketed, powerful, special
interests and even the playing field for all Marylanders. Angela never
backs down in the fight for what’s right. She’s the partner I need to meet
the urgency of this moment in defending our democracy and protecting
abortion access.

But before we get there, Angela needs your continued support before
Thursday’s all-important End-of-Month fundraising deadline.

So please, I’m personally asking: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12182?t=1012&amount=25&akid=1104%2E52803%2Eglcm6I ]Will you pitch in $25 before Thursday

subject: Clarion Call for Michigan Republicans to Get Out to Vote.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/migop.org/clarion-call-for-michigan-republicans-to-get-out-to-vote?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Republicans,

The start of our nation’s most important Presidential election in history has begun. **It’s critical that you get out to vote this coming Tuesday, February 27, for the Michigan Presidential Primary.**

The future of our Constitutional Republic is at stake because "despicable Democrats" will spend millions of dollars to manipulate the 2024 Presidential election this November. Why? Because they want to abolish your God-given rights and reshape America into a socialist state.

It is time for us Michiganders to step up and show up for the Michigan Presidential Primary on** Tuesday, February 27**. Our path to victory in 2024 is simple – “Get Engaged and Get Out To Vote!”

In Liberty,

J. Jordan
Communications Director
**Michigan Republican Party**

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Republicans, The start of our nation’s most important Presidential election in history has begun. It’s critical that you get out to vote this coming Tuesday, February 27, for the Michigan Presidential Primary. The future of our Constitutional Republic is at stake because "despicable Democrats" will spend millions of dollars to manipulate the 2024 Presidential election this November. Why? Because they want to abolish your God-given rights and reshape America into a socialist state. It is time for us Michiganders to step up and show up for the Michigan Presidential Primary on Tuesday, February 27. Our path to victory in 2024 is simple – “Get Engaged and Get Out To Vote!” In Liberty, J. Jordan Communications Director Michigan Republican Party Click here to donate to the Michigan Republican Party: | | | | | | | | | | | | Our mailing address is: 3450 Alpine Ave. NW Box 206 Grand Rapids, MI 49544 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | Contributions can be made digitally or by mail. Paid for with regulated funds by the Michigan Republican Party www.migop.org

More importantly, the role of the next Attorney General in defending reproductive rights has become even more clear. While abortion is currently legal, it is not protected by the constitution of Pennsylvania, meaning _**the future of abortion rights could lie in the hands of our next AG.**_

[**I’m determined to make sure that each and every Pennsylvanian has the autonomy to make their own bodily decisions, but I can’t do it alone. Will you donate $10 right now to help me continue to fight in the face of cruel attacks on our reproductive rights?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79727861/457298363/-746082277?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20240224_FR_Trump_0_6MO_KeirBradford-Grey_NA_NA_AbortionBan&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk0NzA5OGMtMjZkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BCJqXlaos-Is6LvHujJDncIuUIGJ2-fwE_XrgHmyK0g=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79727864/457298366/-746082277?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20240224_FR_Trump_0_6MO_KeirBradford-Grey_NA_NA_AbortionBan&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk0NzA5OGMtMjZkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BCJqXlaos-Is6LvHujJDncIuUIGJ2-fwE_XrgHmyK0g=)

Abortion rights are deeply personal to me, Peter. As a woman, I believe they are absolutely fundamental to our autonomy and our ability to make decisions about our own bodies. It’s offensive and unfathomable that politicians would try to control our decisions or force us to seek permission to access care.

**We cannot afford to be complacent in this fight because our lives and our right to bodily autonomy depend on it.**

So much lies in the hands of our next Attorney General — that’s why it is critical that we have a leader in the Attorney General’s office who understands how important this fight is to Pennsylvanians. [**Chip in here today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79727868/457298370/-746082277?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20240224_FR_Trump_0_6MO_KeirBradford-Grey_NA_NA_AbortionBan&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk0NzA5OGMtMjZkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BCJqXlaos-Is6LvHujJDncIuUIGJ2-fwE_XrgHmyK0g=) | [DONATE→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79727872/457298374/-746082277?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20240224_FR_Trump_0_6MO_KeirBradford-Grey_NA_NA_AbortionBan&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk0NzA5OGMtMjZkNC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BCJqXlaos-Is6LvHujJDncIuUIGJ2-fwE_XrgHmyK0g=)

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa)
Listen to this important message from Michael Keaton:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-2?refcode=em20240225-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2090_552475_tl_gqa&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa) | “I’m asking everyone to put Bob Casey back in the Senate. By defending the Senate, we’re defending democracy — and that’s not an exaggeration. **[So if you can spare $5, $10, $20, it’s important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-2?refcode=em20240225-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2090_552475_tl_gqa&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa)** Pennsylvania has a chance to be the hero, the buzzer beater, the walk-off. **Let’s not pass up this opportunity.** ”
---|---
Peter — Pennsylvania’s Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive in the Nation this year, and Bob Casey has zero room for error if we want to hold the majority.
Don’t just take it from us. Michael Keaton (a western PA native!) is asking folks to join this team because the stakes couldn’t be higher.
**[Make a contribution now to make Pennsylvania the hero — and defend our Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-2?refcode=em20240225-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2090_552475_tl_gqa&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240225-2-el&refcode2=2090_552475_tl_gqa&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240225-2-el&refcode2=2090_552475_tl_gqa&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240225-2-el&refcode2=2090_552475_tl_gqa&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240225-2-el&refcode2=2090_552475_tl_gqa&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240225-2-el&refcode2=2090_552475_tl_gqa&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240225-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240225-2&refcode2=2090_552475_tl_gqa&akid=2090%2E552475%2Etl_gqa)

subject: Week 7: Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3861a32cc4&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

This week most of our committees were canceled to the enormous amount of our time dedicated to being on the Senate floor to pass legislation to be transmitted over to the House. On President’s Day, I spent a lot of time reading through legislation, listening to the debate on bills and working on potential amendments for some of my bills that still need to be passed out of the Senate. I also stood with Speaker Ben Toma and several of my Republican colleagues in the House at a press conference as the speaker announced [House Concurrent Resolution 2060](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2869c062e8&e=a7ab36849c) that would be referred to the ballot to stop illegal immigration in Arizona.

For most of Tuesday, the Republican caucus met to discuss 18 pages of bills which equaled nearly 200 bills we would be voting on over the next week. Later that evening, I viewed the documentary “Bearing Witness” uncovering the atrocities of October 7th Massacre sponsored by Bring Them Home Now! These videos were taken from cell phones and body cameras from the Hamas’ of their genocidal assault on southern Israel. People have asked me why I would stomach these detailed video accounts. They are not for the faint of heart, and I must tell you I had to close my eyes quite a bit. I don’t know who wants to view these excruciating videos, but I have been wearing a pro America/Israel flag pin that was blessed by a local Rabbi since Israel’s own 9-11 took place because I want people to know I stand with Israel. Sadly, I don’t believe our country has the right leadership at the top. As our Border remains wide open, American could be on the bring of another 9-11 itself. Sadly, Biden stands for nothing unless it benefits his own family. I try to stay focused on domestic policy, but I thought Steve Hayward’s [piece](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=76963ab755&e=a7ab36849c) was spot on this week. Fun tidbit: I worked at The Heritage Foundation in the 1990s in the Educational Affairs department and helped Steve with a computer issue whose office was nearby. I always remind him when I see him at a policy conference. *grin*

We were on the floor of the Senate most of Wednesday and Thursday to debate and vote. On Wednesday, we had 10 Active calendars for Committee of the Whole. This past week quite a few more of my bills were debated, voted, and passed out of the Senate, including [Senate Bill 1365](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=dc27532f45&e=a7ab36849c), [Senate Bill 1369](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1ba55a2e2a&e=a7ab36849c), [Senate Bill 1371](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d7c40867f0&e=a7ab36849c), and [Senate Concurrent Resolution 1042](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=04629eb9d5&e=a7ab36849c). They were all transmitted to the House at the end of the week.

On Friday morning I toured East Valley Institute of Technology (EVIT) with Superintendent Chad Wilson. He has taken an amazing program and has made it fantastic. I had a chance to get a glimpse of some of their career technical programs, including fire science, nursing, welding, auto repair, and more. It is always great to see how some of the legislation we have passed over the years has helped increase their student population, while offering more Career Technical Education (CTE) courses. I also had a chance to walk through the future home for foster students for [HopeTech](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=388997346a&e=a7ab36849c).

On Saturday morning I spoke at the Convention of States gathering at the Capitol on state’s rights issues and of course, the U.S. and Arizona Constitutions. We should all be reminded of a quote by President Calvin Coolidge when he stated, "To live under the American Constitution is the greatest political privilege that was ever accorded to the human race."

This coming week, the Senate will keep debating and passing out its bills to send over to the House. To best complete this task, the Senate Committee on Finance and Commerce was canceled on Monday afternoon. Also, a few of my bills have already been scheduled for a hearing in the House. For instance, there was a bill former Senator Kaiser sponsored while he was in the House in 2021 dealing with the regulatory sandbox. On Tuesday afternoon, [Senate Bill 1366](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d8641505c0&e=a7ab36849c) will be heard in the House Committee on Commerce. This bill expands the definition of innovation by including blockchain technology.

On Wednesday, the House Committee on Ways and Means will hear [Senate Bill 1370](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=966800e248&e=a7ab36849c) to allow kids under 18 years of age to have a non-regulated lemonade stand. I hear Aiden, the star of the bill in the Senate, is inviting other youth under 18 years of age to come out and testify in favor of the bill. Also, up on Wednesday pf this week is [Senate Bill 1436](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a8dd63b679&e=a7ab36849c) that adds stalking, voyeurism and aggravated assault by way of strangulation or domestic violence to the list of offenses that qualify for lifetime injunctions under Kayleigh’s Law.

On Thursday morning, I got a shout out from J. Christian Adams who heads up Public Interest Legal Foundation on [James T. Harris’ conservative circus](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8bf2b5f55d&e=a7ab36849c). PILF just released a [report](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=741906e803&e=a7ab36849c) last week discussing how illegals are registered to vote in Arizona elections and to vote the federal only ballot. We need to get the federal form to be proof of citizenship and sue all the way up to the US Supreme Court. Obviously, people who register to vote via this voter registration form under penalty of perjury aren’t using the honor system. Read the [report](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bbc68a3ba7&e=a7ab36849c) yourself. I look forward to working with you to further protect and secure our elections so only legal citizens are casting a ballot in our state’s elections. I believe there is a Senate-sponsored bill this session to ban some of these voter registration drives run by non-profits.

Last week early voting for the Presidential Preference Election (PPE) began. The PPE will be held on March 19th. If you are a registered Republican (or Democrat) on the Active Early Voting List, you should have received a mail-in ballot this week. If you vote in person in Maricopa County, please visit [BeBallotReady.Vote](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a9b263b39c&e=a7ab36849c) to check your voter registration status. If you live in another county, you can visit your county recorder’s website to see [where](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=148c50e6f3&e=a7ab36849c) you can cast your ballot.

Now, let’s get out there to _protect_ our Republic **together.**

Take care,
Shawnna
---
| **P.S.**

In order to compete, we need to raise a lot of funds to propel our campaign. Can you help chip in today to ensure we maintain a Republican Majority come November 2024?
---
| [Help a Republican Win in 2024](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=252df627da&e=a7ab36849c "Help a Republican Win in 2024")
---
| **P.S.S.**

The GOP primary was moved up a week and so was the deadline to submit our signatures. If you live in Legislative District 2, please sign my online nomination petition today.
---
| [Sign a Proven Leader's Nomination Petition ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=87f9b1b62b&e=a7ab36849c "Sign a Proven Leader's Nomination Petition ")
---
| **P.S.S.S.**

No one works harder to protect our slim majority, **but** _I can't do it alone_. Can you help us write post cards, host an event, drop off campaign literature, or help us raise money for our campaign?
---
| [Volunteer with the Bolick Brigade](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d856e314a9&e=a7ab36849c "Volunteer with the Bolick Brigade")
---

---

He has taken an amazing program and has made it fantastic. I had a chance to get a glimpse of some of their career technical programs, including fire science, nursing, welding, auto repair, and more. It is always great to see how some of the legislation we have passed over the years has helped increase their student population, while offering more Career Technical Education (CTE) courses. I also had a chance to walk through the future home for foster students for . On Saturday morning I spoke at the Convention of States gathering at the Capitol on state’s rights issues and of course, the U.S. and Arizona Constitutions. We should all be reminded of a quote by President Calvin Coolidge when he stated, "To live under the American Constitution is the greatest political privilege that was ever accorded to the human race." This coming week, the Senate will keep debating and passing out its bills to send over to the House. To best complete this task, the Senate Committee on Finance and Commerce was canceled on Monday afternoon. Also, a few of my bills have already been scheduled for a hearing in the House. For instance, there was a bill former Senator Kaiser sponsored while he was in the House in 2021 dealing with the regulatory sandbox. On Tuesday afternoon, will be heard in the House Committee on Commerce. This bill expands the definition of innovation by including blockchain technology. On Wednesday, the House Committee on Ways and Means will hear to allow kids under 18 years of age to have a non-regulated lemonade stand. I hear Aiden, the star of the bill in the Senate, is inviting other youth under 18 years of age to come out and testify in favor of the bill. Also, up on Wednesday pf this week is that adds stalking, voyeurism and aggravated assault by way of strangulation or domestic violence to the list of offenses that qualify for lifetime injunctions under Kayleigh’s Law. On Thursday morning, I got a shout out from J. Christian Adams who heads up Public Interest Legal Foundation on . PILF just released a last week discussing how illegals are registered to vote in Arizona elections and to vote the federal only ballot. We need to get the federal form to be proof of citizenship and sue all the way up to the US Supreme Court. Obviously, people who register to vote via this voter registration form under penalty of perjury aren’t using the honor system. Read the yourself. I look forward to working with you to further protect and secure our elections so only legal citizens are casting a ballot in our state’s elections. I believe there is a Senate-sponsored bill this session to ban some of these voter registration drives run by non-profits. Last week early voting for the Presidential Preference Election (PPE) began. The PPE will be held on March 19th. If you are a registered Republican (or Democrat) on the Active Early Voting List, you should have received a mail-in ballot this week. If you vote in person in Maricopa County, please visit to check your voter registration status. If you live in another county, you can visit your county recorder’s website to see you can cast your ballot. Now, let’s get out there to protect our Republic together. Take care, Shawnna | P.S. In order to compete, we need to raise a lot of funds to propel our campaign. Can you help chip in today to ensure we maintain a Republican Majority come November 2024? | "Help a Republican Win in 2024" | P.S.S. The GOP primary was moved up a week and so was the deadline to submit our signatures. If you live in Legislative District 2, please sign my online nomination petition today. | "Sign a Proven Leader's Nomination Petition " | P.S.S.S. No one works harder to protect our slim majority, but I can't do it alone. Can you help us write post cards, host an event, drop off campaign literature, or help us raise money for our campaign? | "Volunteer with the Bolick Brigade" | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK. AUTHORIZED BY SHAWNNA BOLICK. | | Copyright © 2024 Vote Bolick, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Vote Bolick 610 E. Bell Road 2-142 Phoenix, AZ 85022 | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Vote Bolick c/o Shawnna Bolick 610 E. Bell Rd. #2-142 Phoenix, AZ 85022 USA

One year ago, January 6 Peaceful Protester Kevin Seefried was sentenced to three years in federal prison.

Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No.

Did he break windows? No.

**Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because he carried a Confederate flag through the U.S. Capitol building on Jan. 6, 2021.**

The NBC News headline says it all:

“Man who carried a Confederate Flag in the Capitol on Jan. 6 is sentenced to 3 years.”

**You’ll notice there isn’t one word there about the crimes he allegedly committed ... just the flag.**

U.S. District Judge Trevor McFadden, incredibly a Trump appointee, blasted Ken’s carrying of the flag as "shocking" and "outrageous." Just goes to show that all of the establishment judges on the DC Federal Court are compromised, if not corrupt!

**Kevin carried the flag only as a symbol of protest, not to support racism or slavery. And the Confederate Flag is not such a symbol in any event, but instead Southern pride!**

But that didn’t save him ... neither did his forced public apology.

What’s worse, the federal prosecutor wanted Kevin to serve 70 months – 5 years and 10 months – in prison for his “crimes!”

**Meanwhile, Black Lives Matter and Antifa thugs who’ve rioted, burned down businesses, beaten, and terrorized everyday Americans haven’t even been ARRESTED!**

This is outrageous!

**To be frank, I feel a growing sense of urgency about January 6 patriots. They need a legal breakthrough SOON.**

And you’re the key to making these pivotal fights as effective as possible.

Larry Klayman
