**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

clean_body: I am reaching out to you from Team Dolan to inform you that we are within striking distance. | WE’RE TIED FOR THE LEAD AGAINST SHERROD BROWN Peter, I’m reaching out to you from Team Dolan to inform you that Recent polling has shown that we are statistically TIED for the LEAD against Brown. With the primary only 23 DAYS AWAY, | We can’t let this advantage slip out of our hands. Matt Dolan is the ONLY candidate who can send Sherrod Brown home this November. The Democrats are scared of Matt Dolan because they know he’s got the experience to back up his promises. This tie puts not only Ohio one step closer to another Republican Senator but also the Senate one seat closer to winning back the majority. Your support shows how the Buckeye State is ready for change and to get back to the American Values. Thank you for your continued support, Team Dolan PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

body:
First: Lauren Boebert nearly lost what was considered to be a safe Republican seat in 2022. Then: She abandoned her constituents by leaving her district because her race in 2024 was going to be too difficult.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e16b4aa0cab2487daa4ac5bcf699b0bd&_e=HPc32adfMPG7f-M7mNNk9wloDUYXky-2G2zUaa_BLR5hbUwH-zCU_3qNPfoB3X__2KEZW3njVkOvW67XAcdg9K4xb1V6BFRK4GlVzkZGFa3xn09e4B8VNKv0ZkMLwfkK04e7A888ahiM0clLnQqOc6X92wireYsCIxzF36bPme7YpVVyf8heVLu7npxyS_8b5yfubGrkHTZtrtY3olU53iExnYBa23Rbj1NPTlUBktbUSKXjf05CnPXzEYNellK1LflbN74K8Thuz87AWKia509-fkEF30nWmm9pWx9fIXVI6yoMqgcK_8kh92r29LWNXR6McjUGwGytsHpLrbd47kYf-xZOLEThUX3Cl__CBmwzLSufd2UAFynjHozf-tXGdKKaShY9Guwrhy_DS1iKbjYsODMYEmMMM1sfS8u74Ow%3D) **First:** Lauren Boebert nearly lost what was considered to be a safe Republican seat in 2022. **Then:** She abandoned her constituents by leaving her district because her race in 2024 was going to be too difficult. **Now:** She’s trying to carpetbag into CD-04 to represent people she doesn’t care about. Peter,

Never did I imagine that I would become the right-wing’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. Never.

But if investigating Donald Trump and holding him accountable for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**

If Roger Stone wants to call me a congenital liar and despicable huckster, **so be it** (a pretty rich insult coming from him if I do say so myself).

And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me, as he did in all caps on his social media, “SLIMEBALL ADAM ‘SHIFTY’ SCHIFF, ONE OF THE TRUE LOWLIFES IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS IN AMERICA” for holding him to account over and over and over again,**so be it.**

They are going after me because they know I am effective. Those that don’t concern them — they ignore. The _last place_ Roger Stone or Donald Trump want me to be is in the United States Senate — because they know I will continue to hold their feet to the fire.

[Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate by splitting $15 or any amount you can spare between Defeat Republicans and my campaign ahead of our primary election. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79729016/457301425/1889252675?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240225_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhOWQ4NTY5LTJkZDQtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ilsybcrj0F0PiVgQTq6fKW17BpVVfgEVvMXRxiCSS00=)

MAGA won’t like the ending |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79729220/457301906/768541956?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTliNGQzNS0yZmQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGB_W2vNYZnxt0lu0lOBZ3QJLlOo5j1WU3CFcBfRSTE=)
Friend **—** MAGA has gotten so predictable, we’re literally writing their legacy for them. Let’s go through it together, shall we! FIRST: Over four years ago Speaker Mike Johnson was caught on a mic saying “our founding fathers warned against single-party impeachments.” NEXT: Just last week, what did MAGA Mike orchestrate? A single-party impeachment of Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas. THEN: NY-03, the seat occupied by disgraced George Santos, was flipped by Democrat Tom Suozzi — narrowing the MAGA majority in the House. | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79729221/457301907/-1644219323?&refcode=E7090-20240225-MAGALegacy-SB-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTliNGQzNS0yZmQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGB_W2vNYZnxt0lu0lOBZ3QJLlOo5j1WU3CFcBfRSTE=)
---

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: President Trump Just Sent Me A VERY Encouraging Message
body:
Today, President Donald Trump sent me an encouraging message after church. I believe this simple message speaks to his character. In the midst of run
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2404.1.7fcf9d2e59a4ecb7816fa793c98141bf) |
---
Today, **President Donald Trump** sent me an encouraging message after church. I believe this simple message speaks to his character. In the midst of running for President of the United States, he found the time to send an encouraging message to me when he is fighting everyday against the forces of evil. Not only that but this message should encourage everyone who supported #LahmeyerForSensate against James Lankford in 2022. I believe that Lankford's political career is coming to a close. The media has been pushing a lie about President Trump endorsing James Lankford. Just to clarify: There is a LIE going around on social media and news outlets saying that **President Donald Trump** endorsed [James Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2405.1.d681e849a5a4d0d6bea485a757c115e9). During the **Lahmeyer vs Lankford** matchup for the US Senate, there was NO endorsement to myself or Lankford. This lack of endorsement enraged Lankford and now Lankford is getting back at Trump through this terrible open borders bill. It is true however that after the Primary battle that Trump sent an endorsement to Lankford in September 2022 to make sure he did not lose to the Democrat challenger. If you want to know why Trump did not endorse me you can watch it here: [https://youtu.be/T9RkHsF71i8?si=bKHkjgWlVj-os4mX](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2406.1.49c79693ab0f98c00cc61c8a2c8c0341)
---
---
## Lankford MUST RESIGN
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2407.1.959a692c88d391af12441445ae80e9dc)
---
Last night, _Pseudo-Republican_ [James Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2408.1.b7fddf306458e2b558d0d0ec1c2ca139) released the contents of the highly anticipated "**Border Bill**." **It is worse than what many thought it would be.** Currently, [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2409.1.8c84ca8f589d9c64c5a1af6beba90ce8) is trending on X (aka Twitter) for all the wrong reasons... being dismantled by **Speaker Mike Johnson** , **Matt Gaetz** , **Donald Trump Jr** and so many others. This "Bill" is nothing more than an **open borders bill** which **increases green cards by 50,000/year** , **gives immediate work permits to every illegal released from custody** and also **sends another $60,000,000,000.00 to Ukraine**... It does not surprise me that [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2410.1.0395e8c086a55a8bedaf4ad529f0563e) is carrying the water for the Democratic Party. In 2022, I tried to sound the alarm in Oklahoma about the [www.realJamesLankford.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2411.1.ac0270ce197299ec632b081ee0abd5d8) with the help of **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** and **nearly 100,000 Oklahoma Republicans**. Our effort was _unsuccessful_ at the time. However, people are seeing the [www.realJamesLakford.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2412.1.d61519ca4dac2ee405cb7c133b035072) right now. Today, President Trump BLASTED the Border Bill and Lankford.
---
|
---
It is clear that [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2413.1.8ed5f6ec19e3177d94d83fdd45cf6cc5) is doing his very best to try and keep **Donald Trump** from winning in 2024.
[Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6738285.2414.1.c87b978160dea7900997fb86a58e7520) has been and is a NEVER-TRUMPER.

name: Al Franken
subject: look at this gift
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| They say a picture’s worth a thousand words, but how about a gif? That’s like a hundred pictures in one... and this one really says it all. [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62915?t=6&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH) [**Seriously. If you do one thing today, can it be splitting a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley’s campaign for Congress in NY-19?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62915?t=7&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH) | [**GIVE TO JOSH. THANK YOU! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62915?t=8&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH)
---
Josh’s race is one of the most competitive in the entire country, and national Democrats just named it one of the top flip opportunities we need to win to take back the House. **It’s also a great opportunity to beat up on a truly insufferable Republican, which you know is almost as important.**

A few months ago Marc Molinaro (Josh’s opponent) told a bunch of reporters how stupid he thinks everyone he represents is. He said they wouldn’t know what was going on in Washington if “he backed over them with a pickup truck.”

Give me a break. I’d rather get backed over by a pickup truck myself than see that jerk go back to Congress. (Figuratively, I mean. Please don’t take this as an invitation...)

[**The point is, Molinaro really sucks, and Josh is really, really great. So will you scroll up and check out my gif one more time, and then chip in whatever you can to the Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62915?t=9&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62916?t=10&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62917?t=11&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62918?t=12&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62919?t=13&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62915?t=14&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH)
P.S. I always put a PS at the end of these emails. You know what that stands for? **_P_** lease **_S_** end Josh money. Thanks!

Al
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=13141%2E878179%2EC6xmSH)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Upcoming Events, Best Sellers, and a Special Message from RFK Jr.!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We've got exciting news about upcoming events, best selling merch, and a special message from RFK Jr. you won't want to miss.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_25_24_a1&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: An Exclusive Invitation to a Memorable Experience!
Don't miss out on an opportunity to embark on an extraordinary journey with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and connect with our future President. [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_25_24_a1&n=2)
|
* * *
---
[Denver, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/denver-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_25_24_a1&n=3) \- Saturday, March 2nd at 6:00 PM
Show your support for uniting the country and advancing innovation by attending this up close and personal event. Get a selfie with Mr. Kennedy and a complimentary ticket to ETHDenver.
[Las Vegas, Nevada](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-las-vegas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_25_24_a1&n=4) \- Friday, March 8th at 6:00 PM
Please join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austin-private-dinner?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_25_24_a1&n=5) \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM
Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/american-wellness-summit?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_25_24_a1&n=6) \- Saturday, March 16th at 9:00 AM
Experience a day of wellness, inspiration, live musical performances, biohacking, and exclusive time with Mr. Kennedy while supporting his candidacy for President of the United States.
[Palos Verdes, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/palos-verdes?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_25_24_a1&n=7) \- Thursday, April 18th at 6:00 PM
This private reception is an opportunity to see and hear RFK, Jr. up close and personal. It includes remarks by the candidate, an intimate Q&A, and photo opportunity for all.
|
* * *
---
RFK Jr.: How Malcolm X Had A Change Of Heart
Malcolm X’s house in Queens, NY, which I’m standing in front of in this video, was firebombed a week before his assassination on February 21, 1965. His death was tragic for many reasons, but especially because it came soon after he’d embraced the vision of uniting across racial lines to challenge segregation and injustice in America.
I want to invoke his example today, at a time of renewed hatred and polarization. We are going to put aside our divisions and solve the real problems that afflict Americans of all skin colors.
If you want a president with compassion for the history of Black America and who sees the future through the lens of mutual interest, **please support my campaign with a donation today.** [Our filing deadline is February 29th, so your contribution means more than ever.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_25_24_a1&n=8)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/malcolm-x-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_25_24_a1&n=9)
|
* * *
---

Delve into the unique appeal of limited edition items that reflect the essence of this historic campaign. Immerse yourself in the spirit of change and progress, and join a movement that holds the power to shape the future.

Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity. \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers. \- Saturday, March 16th at 9:00 AM Experience a day of wellness, inspiration, live musical performances, biohacking, and exclusive time with Mr. Kennedy while supporting his candidacy for President of the United States. \- Thursday, April 18th at 6:00 PM This private reception is an opportunity to see and hear RFK, Jr. up close and personal. It includes remarks by the candidate, an intimate Q&A, and photo opportunity for all. | RFK Jr.: How Malcolm X Had A Change Of Heart Malcolm X’s house in Queens, NY, which I’m standing in front of in this video, was firebombed a week before his assassination on February 21, 1965. His death was tragic for many reasons, but especially because it came soon after he’d embraced the vision of uniting across racial lines to challenge segregation and injustice in America. I want to invoke his example today, at a time of renewed hatred and polarization. We are going to put aside our divisions and solve the real problems that afflict Americans of all skin colors. If you want a president with compassion for the history of Black America and who sees the future through the lens of mutual interest, please support my campaign with a donation today. | | Discover our latest , suitable for any occasion. Delve into the unique appeal of limited edition items that reflect the essence of this historic campaign. Immerse yourself in the spirit of change and progress, and join a movement that holds the power to shape the future. Thank you for your continued support. Every dollar you give moves us one step closer to the White House. | * | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: JD Vance
subject: Loser Liz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
These establishment clowns on the Left still manage to surprise me every day. That’s right - Trump derangement syndrome is back, even for loser Liz Cheney.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c1005e7e86264ecab5a850e70d11ede1&_e=YwyiqbLC0cU73V4-Lw31ebPey2nXSxzSDYIFTZ8Nb1LyWeYASjXPZXrXXCnjE2rRsru4T4iMiAwsD78m70SWOEZfpkV1xxt82pj53inH4m4UXjJvJ6zZc9qE8LNDn0fbxa3TwPYV2lSu4PVCvNa33ZZEn7Fj4zkqQfF0kUNPEoGO_Kd8rt6NkWKAqBwDVuzH5gGIQBK4iapS8JJlI8H4JCUHI1YVG4okC69USgT9N3vbc2VUM_CELaVB9agC8VSrfJmDKCdnGR3T6OI7wsCFXakLC-fKeIdSXKS-ASz8V7yWb0b66iomFxerdbpehrYZW1C267g1oeaiPRfezEmiCui9KhZicD9aEN3MtcPnPG5xEEImtfBWjCBLMUobVhLDO0qxxK-k9CZxEybFWWyid5aEPsj0smlFlUFCFl6ZV9A%3D)
---
Fellow American,

**These establishment clowns on the Left still manage to surprise me every day.**

This week, Loser Liz Cheney came out from wherever she’s been hiding since losing her primary and **claimed I wouldn’t accept the Mainstream Media’s narrative about the sham investigations into President Trump.**

**That’s right - Trump derangement syndrome is back, even for loser Liz Cheney.**

As a reminder - she lost her last primary in April 2022 when HER voters saw the truth - that **SHE** was unfit to serve! If Loser Liz had been doing anything worthwhile, her voters would have sent her back to Washington. Instead, she’s sitting on her couch at home.

name: John James
subject: Will you be my co-pilot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
When I served as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army, my co-pilots were everything to me.| | | Fellow Patriot, When I served as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army, my co-pilots were _everything_ to me.

Neither of us could achieve our missions alone, and our unwavering trust in each other helped us get the job done and DEFEND America.

_I may be out of the pilot’s seat, but now, I need a co-pilot for our new mission: defending our values and keeping the American Dream alive for the next generation._

body:

body:
|
#
Team, I want to make sure you saw this headline: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79730480/457306018/-697321275?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240225_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjJlNGY2ZS0zOWQ0LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3C6h_jT0jR2T72bFfPs8AkCB2QQGtqz5yTJCvo0QhF4=) We need to be prepared for everything McConnell is going to throw Democrats way. Some of my colleagues are in for tough re-election fights — in Montana, Wisconsin, Ohio, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and more. **I’m worried — but I also know what this grassroots team is capable of.** We proved everyone wrong in 2020 when we flipped control of the Senate. clean_body: | Team, I want to make sure you saw this headline: = We need to be prepared for everything McConnell is going to throw Democrats way. Some of my colleagues are in for tough re-election fights — in Montana, Wisconsin, Ohio, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and more. I’m worried — but I also know what this grassroots team is capable of. We proved everyone wrong in 2020 when we flipped control of the Senate. And in 2022, we did it again when we expanded our majority. It’s not going to be an easy election year for Senate Democrats — but with everyone pitching in, volunteering, and connecting with voters about the stakes of these elections, I know we can win again and protect the Senate majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you — I’m excited to roll up my sleeves and get to work protecting our majority and keeping up our progress. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.
